name: BREAKING update from NRSC HQ
subject: Cartels moving North
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
What this means for you
Fellow American, did you hear the latest testimony from the Border Patrol’s Union President? If not, you NEED to read this.

To begin, we want to address the fact that for many Americans, hearing about violence at the border is difficult to relate to because the media portrays them as isolated incidents and frankly, many of us are so far removed from the violence that it’s easy to write off but this testimony changes that.

He testified that cartels are opening fire on Border Patrol Agents and according to him, the cartels now have more control over the border than our Border Patrol does.

**He also warns that the cartel’s span of control and the violence that they bring with them is moving North every day while we continue to ignore the issue.**

When asked “are Americans in danger as a result of the open borders?” The Union President answered, yes. In the last calendar year, we lost over 100,000 Americans to fentanyl **making it the leading cause of death for young people, 18-45 years of age.** Fentanyl was the cartel’s leading import across our Southern Border.

The time of this being a distant issue has passed. Cartel fentanyl is killing young people in almost every town in America, so why aren’t we aggressively addressing the problem at our border? [**If you can, please send in $5 or more right now so that we can begin to push this issue. The leading cause of death for young American’s is waltzing across the border, let’s put an end to it.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fe7d893c53284307b144018eef19350b&_e=JGogYrZBF3e14hbekhgrZKFVRt8ljH0SdWJK7WsMwY7b4HhK8NOcrXHhsX-tF0nsjFiJAOgx5eadnY4bDOc8wFn__MCVkLX63MYdVSFdjNHdp7T2KpKnEd5PJFaO6RDHZ7i0VS0iyG7Us6QaTMUcIWy_OZj3m6NkneOaVak_gLtTD_D_LOH225wYoGtYrVK5FO4f6vhgZlx3Lp8hQfqcTlQWhBA6Lmb8oT1rYr0cltBhsCJUCSb-_cuUOiFgtONkFbrl_kUl5uLHFK8mV1fEi1fvV9LWo717yRiCj1FCohsq7TK6ou5aREVQIzPx__5Mbn3rlH3Idzl-mZsGa1umTHOtU45HskbvRsfPXzMtKOMSFrjJS_IrITZfJhdMHMHTnv1jPc4zJD_1nUcYJViwzEQ_MUHaX7rJIPpP-0d3z8ImPByGsIHFs5uUFiF_j_Mf)

[**HELP US DRAW ATTENTION TO THIS CRISIS -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fe7d893c53284307b144018eef19350b&_e=JGogYrZBF3e14hbekhgrZKFVRt8ljH0SdWJK7WsMwY7b4HhK8NOcrXHhsX-tF0nsjFiJAOgx5eadnY4bDOc8wFn__MCVkLX63MYdVSFdjNHdp7T2KpKnEd5PJFaO6RDHZ7i0VS0iyG7Us6QaTMUcIWy_OZj3m6NkneOaVak_gLtTD_D_LOH225wYoGtYrVK5FO4f6vhgZlx3Lp8hQfqcTlQWhBA6Lmb8oT1rYr0cltBfjaiN_UCrZ8wJfFUT9Tp6sQowWAbwAKu_Ijg1UU8e0gKYRGy4GJYXet7lLHcV9Agia0pP7b_dcNN9hIQGDI6cfg8UuTR3Hm7UwfBsKe4O13Ks1wuMzp_tcgEX1t5nS2FUTs8YiOq8KFaqMTCfieZ5NTQRp0P_agy7UjtoH-Xe6J0dKV6voxLF45ETNBSZ6Q9ZDSgHKDANWCMAOyo2A_Ha)
Several federal laws, including the Secure Fence Act of 2006, require our government to maintain our border’s security with fencing and other facilities. **Now, the Biden administration is acting contrary to the law by paying contractors not to build the fencing using millions in tax-payer dollars that Congress had appropriated for fencing to be built.**

It’s time for us to take a stand Friend. Kamala Harris was appointed to handle our border and she’s failed to fix it. It’s a testament to her complete lack of competence and with a 50/50 split in the Senate, she holds the deciding vote. We can’t allow her to continue ignoring her charge.

**Friend, whether you live close to the border or not, the evil of the cartels will come knocking on your door soon enough if we don’t put an end to this sooner rather than later.** [**Let’s get this issue trending. It’s time we address what’s going on at our front door. Please, send in whatever you can spare to help us make sure our border gets the attention it deserves.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fe7d893c53284307b144018eef19350b&_e=JGogYrZBF3e14hbekhgrZKFVRt8ljH0SdWJK7WsMwY7b4HhK8NOcrXHhsX-tF0nsjFiJAOgx5eadnY4bDOc8wFn__MCVkLX63MYdVSFdjNHdp7T2KpKnEd5PJFaO6RDHZ7i0VS0iyG7Us6QaTMUcIWy_OZj3m6NkneOaVak_gLtTD_D_LOH225wYoGtYrVK5FO4f6vhgZlx3Lp8hQfqcTlQWhBA6Lmb8oT1rYr0cltBfpqHpABFiLSeh6euPkZFFVjvfXn-9RavfWNUgXLNEsWk6BU9V7uVk-DS97YFFXtAXEFaMd8isBPFefoPobCm_TJnf_V9O8q7pLvrQ24vVZ26D1Yg8a6g0R60e9dHdnoiAI7q81G9H6_kSVFf81GQ8x0iYN1-Zkd3f_88DSMj3wCKZuAWOkQ4huSRjkPXFiTpIRAQsICiA6nhm7JEE-Ag2)

name: Teresa Fedor
subject: My abortion story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee
body:
| It won’t be easy to share, but it’s a story that must be told. Hi, friend — My name is Teresa Fedor, and I’m proudly running for Lieutenant Governor of Ohio. I’ve dedicated over two decades of my life to public service as a member of the Ohio General Assembly, and before that, I served in the U.S. Air Force and Ohio National Guard for over six years — so I'm prepared to kickstart Ohio’s comeback. **And, if you’ve followed Ohio politics, you know that in 2015 — while I was a state representative — I raised my voice loud and clear in opposition to H.B. 69, a bill that would have effectively outlawed abortion.** But I didn’t just voice my opposition, I also shared my own story — the story of my rape while I served in the military and of the subsequent termination of the resulting pregnancy. It’s a story shared so often by so many women, yet it just as often goes wholly ignored, falling on the deaf ears of lawmakers — often male — across the country. **Friend, I shared my story because I had watched for _years_ as Ohio lawmakers introduced legislation to chisel away at reproductive rights. ** Because this happened to me at such a young age, I refused to let this victimization define who I was going to be. More importantly, I was thankful that I had the freedom to make this decision, _but that was back then._ Unfortunately, this freedom could still be stripped from women today. That’s why I joined the Cranley-Fedor ticket. I know that John _does_ respect my story — the story of countless women across Ohio — and that he will stand up for and protect the reproductive rights of every Ohioan. **Together, I know John and I will be effective partners in the fight against these unconstitutional, invasive, and inhumane attacks on the right to choose.** **[Friend, if you’re able, the Cranley-Fedor campaign could really use your help today. Donate $10 to our campaign to help us win this race and defend abortion access in clean_body: | It won’t be easy to share, but it’s a story that must be told. Hi, friend — My name is Teresa Fedor, and I’m proudly running for Lieutenant Governor of Ohio. I’ve dedicated over two decades of my life to public service as a member of the Ohio General Assembly, and before that, I served in the U.S. Air Force and Ohio National Guard for over six years — so I'm prepared to kickstart Ohio’s comeback. And, if you’ve followed Ohio politics, you know that in 2015 — while I was a state representative — I raised my voice loud and clear in opposition to H.B. 69, a bill that would have effectively outlawed abortion. But I didn’t just voice my opposition, I also shared my own story — the story of my rape while I served in the military and of the subsequent termination of the resulting pregnancy. It’s a story shared so often by so many women, yet it just as often goes wholly ignored, falling on the deaf ears of lawmakers — often male — across the country. Friend, I shared my story because I had watched for years as Ohio lawmakers introduced legislation to chisel away at reproductive rights. Because this happened to me at such a young age, I refused to let this victimization define who I was going to be. More importantly, I was thankful that I had the freedom to make this decision, but that was back then. Unfortunately, this freedom could still be stripped from women today. That’s why I joined the Cranley-Fedor ticket. I know that John does respect my story — the story of countless women across Ohio — and that he will stand up for and protect the reproductive rights of every Ohioan. Together, I know John and I will be effective partners in the fight against these unconstitutional, invasive, and inhumane attacks on the right to choose. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for taking the time to read my story. It’s not the easiest read, but I know that it’s a story that must be told if we’re to protect abortion access for future generations of Ohioans. All the best, Teresa = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO COMMITTEE 545 EAST TOWN STREET COLUMBUS, OH 43215 United States Click here to

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Build Back Better is our way to build on the American Rescue Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We MUST deliver for the voters who put us in this position, and for all the working people, families, and communities in America.
#
Peter,
Democrats control Congress. Voters delivered us the White House and majorities in the House and Senate to solve the biggest problems facing the country. We MUST deliver for the voters who put us in this position, and for all the working people, families, and communities in America.
Democrats delivered for the people when we passed the American Rescue Plan (including the expanded Child Tax Credit) in early 2021, but corporate interests stopped our progress, and prevented critical policies like the extension of the tax credit.
**Build Back Better is our way to build on the American Rescue Plan** , address climate change, secure paid family and medical leave, Medicare expansion, extend the Child Tax Credit, and so much more. This can’t wait. After the expanded Child Tax Credit expired last month, child poverty rose by 41%.
Pramila is continuing her fight to pass transformative Build Back Better legislation to invest in the care economy and the fight against climate change. This is the only way we take care of our people, our communities, and our planet.
[**Can you fuel Pramila’s fight to deliver for the people and our planet? We can’t fail to enact progressive change during this critical midterm election year.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10846?refcode=em20220223-1054&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1054%2E420207%2ENreAmI)
**[Chip in](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10846?refcode=em20220223-1054&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1054%2E420207%2ENreAmI)**
This has been a long fight. Corporations and their unlimited resources have delayed progress. Corporate lobbyists have had their voice heard, but we must ensure that the voice of the people prevails. And Pramila believes that the power of our grassroots movement can succeed if we continue organizing.
The people cannot wait any longer.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220223-1054-footer&t=21&refcode2=1054_420207_NreAmI&akid=1054%2E420207%2ENreAmI)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Charles Booker
subject: I would be honored if you would join us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Today, we mourn the death of Ahmaud Arbery. Exactly two years ago, he was
murdered while on an afternoon jog.

And just this week, his killers were charged with federal hate crimes.
This is right and necessary for accountability — but true justice would
have been for Ahmaud to still have breath in his body.

I grieve for his family, who have been robbed of the chance to hug their
son ever again. I pray for their peace.

Peter, this
killing was a 21st-century lynching. It’s another painful reason the
Emmett Till Antilynching Act needs to become law. And it’s another painful
reminder that Rand Paul single-handedly blocked that legislation — and
that he’s the sole reason that lynching is not a federal crime.

Politicians like Rand would rather block anti-lynching legislation, spread
lies about the 2020 election, and harm our LGBT children than make sure
everyone has the opportunity to live a healthy, gainful life.

But as I continue our travels across Kentucky, meeting people from all
walks of life, I realize more and more that our purpose — our work — is
bigger than just running for one office or replacing one shameful
politician.

It’s to continue the work for justice, until everyone has the ability to
safely jog in their neighborhood, peacefully sleep in their beds, lift
their voices in pursuit of healing, and pursue their dreams in every
corner of our country.

Our work is about coming together, from the Hood to the Holler. It’s about
love, justice, community, and healing. No matter what.

And Peter, I
would be honored if you would join us.

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220223-1597-footer&t=1001&refcode2=1597_346206_c2_4ox&akid=1597%2E346206%2Ec2_4ox

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1597%2E346206%2Ec2_4ox

And just this week, his killers were charged with federal hate crimes. This is right and necessary for accountability — but true justice would have been for Ahmaud to still have breath in his body. I grieve for his family, who have been robbed of the chance to hug their son ever again. I pray for their peace. Peter, this killing was a 21st-century lynching. It’s another painful reason the Emmett Till Antilynching Act needs to become law. And it’s another painful reminder that Rand Paul single-handedly blocked that legislation — and that he’s the sole reason that lynching is not a federal crime. Politicians like Rand would rather block anti-lynching legislation, spread lies about the 2020 election, and harm our LGBT children than make sure everyone has the opportunity to live a healthy, gainful life. But as I continue our travels across Kentucky, meeting people from all walks of life, I realize more and more that our purpose — our work — is bigger than just running for one office or replacing one shameful politician. It’s to continue the work for justice, until everyone has the ability to safely jog in their neighborhood, peacefully sleep in their beds, lift their voices in pursuit of healing, and pursue their dreams in every corner of our country. Our work is about coming together, from the Hood to the Holler. It’s about love, justice, community, and healing. No matter what. And Peter, I would be honored if you would join us. Together, Charles Contribute to Charles Booker:

body:
Watch the video here!

| [](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=328ae42175cb4cdbabd1f37b47174553&_e=04Yb-hN4YOceHtp8XHWw0HEdkRRJ4PrEN32eb0g_H_4f_hkjMzwjhgObolRE17fSEDD0RCytp35lfO3MicnGTLuU5OTG_ys0xIvwaccOD_2toxc1M5RbzWdVQa7lSKLJWsl55uto4JlXbGF10NchBI8KJARoIxlj2DWeoI7hmmc3Zl_ANg2E1Gsa1_p59HAU-bhKmY1Np4F7zDsZ0UdzMP7C-s_D3P4cRKoaBZ6dZNXzrmzW-fzlBK5jXP_lyLKnz6I6hVEUToUsF7WD-BWsre4DH-S-LL_UhJpG2EnsZqevcr62fyIAaKI_SnUguBSSDd4VWI2CXDLOMstGf-FIVuHIPZeOdi8FOQ576JjulbC3VJ6dnZwAn70PZG5xsWitagDTpFUiIIzY87c2OzUnqSbdHfsl4sWrx7dWh_BAwelqYlMtMY3-ePsFNCagh7xcE5x2Zeafz2VM8vGou-iaxJJctt8HDNESY3KHn4O9gDyokwG6TctC-VQ6CJywU9bj3Zn0A9Ll6AInE9ZkuRp-0k_eudGIBH542cP8PlYbkhQ%3D)
---
Friends,

It’s Mike Durant here. I’m a former Prisoner of War and a 22-year Army veteran. You might know my story from _Black Hawk Down_.

**I recently joined Fox Business to talk about Joe Biden’s foreign policy failures.**
[ ](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=328ae42175cb4cdbabd1f37b47174553&_e=04Yb-hN4YOceHtp8XHWw0HEdkRRJ4PrEN32eb0g_H_4f_hkjMzwjhgObolRE17fSEDD0RCytp35lfO3MicnGTLuU5OTG_ys0xIvwaccOD_2toxc1M5RbzWdVQa7lSKLJWsl55uto4JlXbGF10NchBI8KJARoIxlj2DWeoI7hmmc3Zl_ANg2E1Gsa1_p59HAU-bhKmY1Np4F7zDsZ0UdzMP7C-s_D3P4cRKoaBZ6dZNXzrmzW-fzlBK5jXP_lyLKnz6I6hVEUToUsF7WD-BWsre4DH-S-LL_UhJpG2EnsZqevcr62fyIAaKI_SnUguBSSDd4VWI2CXDLOMstGf-FIVsgqgW7BpjT7LmyQa1VlrapE9WGvdaeEltuW7Tt6WCJkTf8941m4d_WizxvBaPF69ciK-LuoWjOurRIQbYcglUvfIdp01lAqBIMTVpOPnMeoWWI7MY81NMZ1Vi7aMayHPcKCsaU_sXjbFseKfT4K3utDBfKCb3TvtyDTOwFeuiBj6h_AwpgDQxv9Suf7RbQqOk-fOGbWKQH764qw8p0GouM%3D) | [**WATCH HERE**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=328ae42175cb4cdbabd1f37b47174553&_e=04Yb-hN4YOceHtp8XHWw0HEdkRRJ4PrEN32eb0g_H_4f_hkjMzwjhgObolRE17fSEDD0RCytp35lfO3MicnGTLuU5OTG_ys0xIvwaccOD_2toxc1M5RbzWdVQa7lSKLJWsl55uto4JlXbGF10NchBI8KJARoIxlj2DWeoI7hmmc3Zl_ANg2E1Gsa1_p59HAU-bhKmY1Np4F7zDsZ0UdzMP7C-s_D3P4cRKoaBZ6dZNXzrmzW-fzlBK5jXP_lyLKnz6I6hVEUToUsF7WD-BWsre4DH-S-LL_UhJpG2EnsZqevcr62fyIAaKI_SnUguBSSDd4VWI2CXDLOMstGf-FIVuFT_gKAeuba6xNBhAcekXxImIJv-Koz6-PQjHXW8A3dPG6gCBNmAPH-3NA0Al2PmVG-gShFsR0TlW-MA4vHHvrU0bDgSRY4ZBF8Nq51uvJEe-uk9XNyAYyVdsFTsWCQLFPV3gJ9xEQCmo46QpwHhbGDGApT706w9-NSpLQxMwBmlDbq3Rd617gp21jV8ik_Ceo5RjAJOb5Jr2GjEJ49Sm4%3D)
---

_I know what it’s like to serve my country._ And I know that Career Politicians like Joe Biden don’t understand the gravity of what it’s like to go to war.

The last thing we need is to deploy troops and put boots on the ground in Ukraine.

Unfortunately, Joe Biden has continued to fail America and puts us LAST on the global stage. He won’t stand up to China, he won’t stand up to Russia, and he won’t stand up for freedom. He’s our Commander in Chief, and it’s about time he acted like it.

With his “leadership” in the White House, we’ll continue to see these massive foreign policy blunders. He could learn a thing or two from President Trump.

President Trump always fought for America and fought for freedom. I’ll carry his vision forward in the U.S. Senate.

I’m signing up for one more tour of duty to serve my country and to serve Alabama.

clean_body: Watch the video here! | Friends, It’s Mike Durant here. I’m a former Prisoner of War and a 22-year Army veteran. You might know my story from Black Hawk Down. I recently joined Fox Business to talk about Joe Biden’s foreign policy failures. | I know what it’s like to serve my country. And I know that Career Politicians like Joe Biden don’t understand the gravity of what it’s like to go to war. The last thing we need is to deploy troops and put boots on the ground in Ukraine. Unfortunately, Joe Biden has continued to fail America and puts us LAST on the global stage. He won’t stand up to China, he won’t stand up to Russia, and he won’t stand up for freedom. He’s our Commander in Chief, and it’s about time he acted like it. With his “leadership” in the White House, we’ll continue to see these massive foreign policy blunders. He could learn a thing or two from President Trump. President Trump always fought for America and fought for freedom. I’ll carry his vision forward in the U.S. Senate. I’m signing up for one more tour of duty to serve my country and to serve Alabama. Join my team today: Thank you, Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down PAID FOR BY DURANT FOR SENATE Not authorized by any other candidate. DURANT FOR SENATE PO Box 11548 Huntsville, AL 35814 Mike Durant is retired from the U.S. Army, where he served for 22 years. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Departments of Army or Defense.

---
| | Peter,

George Washington’s birthday was on the calendar this week, and seeing his name made me stop and reflect on the sacrifices our Founding Fathers made so long ago.

Our first president offered the totality of his God-given talents and skills to a cause which would have failed without his commitment as a free man.
---
| [ ](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=d1812943fe&e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
| **Washington served as a leader for his country because he was needed, tested, and called to stand up for our God-given rights.**

Today, Americans are being called once again to stand up to tyranny and corruption, which has been made evident in the radical Left agenda of failed president Biden and the radical socialists in Congress.
---
| [ ](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=33c4841132&e=36bbc8e2ca)

name: Alex Walker
subject: I’m going to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6314?t=7&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6) Hi - I’m Alex, and I’m running for Congress against the most deranged, brainwashed, dumpster-fire-of-a-human in Colorado... Lauren Boebert. [Today is our campaign’s big launch, so I’m asking if you could help us build our team as big as possible by splitting a donation between us and Voter Protection Project.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6314?t=8&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6) **Let’s face it:** I’m running against a conspiracy theorist who somehow wandered into Congress in a delirious rage. Her racist rants, failed attempts to overthrow the government, and the fact that she gets her policies from QAnon Reddit posts all feed into this epic shit-storm that is politics today.

And all the while, folks like us are left behind to deal with actual, real world problems.

**We deserve better:** I’m not a sellout. I don’t change my opinions based on what polls well. I stick to my values, and don’t waiver just for a big check or a shout out.

And I’m building a team of skeptics like me who are tired of the bullshit, the pandering, and the mind-numbing stupidity that people like Boebert have brought to the table.

[**So I’m asking you to join me. Will you split a donation between our team and Voter Protection Project today so we can take down the national embarrassment that is Lauren Boebert?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6314?t=9&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6315?t=10&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6316?t=11&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6317?t=12&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6318?t=13&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/6319?t=14&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6)
Let’s build something real – something that can bring more common sense governing and less phony grandstanding. And let’s burn the MAGA-machine to the ground.

Thank you,

Alex Walker
Democratic Candidate for Colorado-03
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=1322%2E878179%2EaVNRA6)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: About that time John wore shorts in a snowstorm…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We said what we said.
#
So, about that time John wore shorts in a snowstorm (and ended up meeting President Biden)...
It led to this photo. And it’s so good we had to turn it into a sticker:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44895?refcode=em20220223-4708&t=1&akid=4708%2E434096%2EFmpG1E)
**Guess what, Derek?** **[If you donate any amount today to help elect John, we’ll send you this glorious sticker for FREE. Get yours now!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44895?refcode=em20220223-4708&t=2&akid=4708%2E434096%2EFmpG1E)**
**[Get Your Sticker »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44895?amount=5&refcode=em20220223-4708&t=3&akid=4708%2E434096%2EFmpG1E)**
Honestly, we think this offer speaks for itself.
But what the heck, we’ll give you three more reasons to take us up on it:
1. If someone sees your sticker and ask who that tall, shorts-clad dude in a snowstorm is, you’ll get to tell them all about John and what he’s fighting for!
2. It’s time to normalize 👏 shorts 👏 in 👏 winter 👏
3. Your donation, no matter the amount, will take us one step closer to electing John as our 51st Democratic vote in the U.S. Senate.

John doesn’t look like a typical politician, and more importantly, he doesn’t act like one. **And we’re proud of it.****[So let us send you a FREE ‘Shorts’ sticker from Team Fetterman today — all you have to do is chip in to this link.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44895?amount=5&refcode=em20220223-4708&t=4&akid=4708%2E434096%2EFmpG1E)**
Thank you for everything,
Team Fetterman
**[Get Your Sticker »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/44895?amount=5&refcode=em20220223-4708&t=5&akid=4708%2E434096%2EFmpG1E)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220223-4708-footer&t=6&refcode2=4708_434096_FmpG1E&akid=4708%2E434096%2EFmpG1E)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

And it’s so good we had to turn it into a sticker: Guess what, Derek? Honestly, we think this offer speaks for itself. But what the heck, we’ll give you three more reasons to take us up on it: 1. If someone sees your sticker and ask who that tall, shorts-clad dude in a snowstorm is, you’ll get to tell them all about John and what he’s fighting for! 2. It’s time to normalize 👏 shorts 👏 in 👏 winter 👏 3. Your donation, no matter the amount, will take us one step closer to electing John as our 51st Democratic vote in the U.S. Senate. John doesn’t look like a typical politician, and more importantly, he doesn’t act like one. And we’re proud of it. Thank you for everything, Team Fetterman | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:
| | | [****WOW! Since Republicans launched over 400 voter suppression bills across the country to suppress the vote, Barack AND Michelle Obama have BOTH called us to action to fight back. They 're asking every last Democrat to STOP these Republican schemes attacking our voting rights and PROTECT our critical Democratic Majorities. We're calling for 280 gifts before our midnight deadline to answer their calls, DEFEAT House Republicans, and make the Obamas proud. Will you step up with $3 to defend our House Majority? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcXrK-AM-)

We need to move quickly.

**FIRST:**

After Republicans rushed over 400 voter suppression bills across the country to suppress the vote, President Obama broke his silence:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_Vfx3EN_)

**THEN:**

Michelle Obama spoke out too -- and personally called us to action to protect our House Majority:

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)
**
NOW:**

We're calling for 280 gifts before our midnight deadline to answer Michelle and Barack's calls to protect our House Majority.

**When two of our most beloved Democrats ask for our help, we wouldn 't dare let them down.**

**[So will you stand with the Obamas and rush $3 to defend our House Majority?>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

clean_body: The latest polling shows we’re leading this critical Senate race by one point. Let’s make sure we build on the momentum. | GEORGIA SENATE POLLING: WALKER 49% - Warnock 48% This is urgent, Fellow American. The latest polling shows we're leading this critical Senate race in Georgia by just one point. You have been one of our most loyal supporters since launching our campaign, and we need your help again. Polling shows we cannot afford to let up - not even for one day. Our opponent knows the race is a dead heat, so he's already spending millions on his first advertising blitzes when we're still 8 months before the election! This poll has already fired up the Democrats in Washington, who are determined to do whatever it takes to hold their Senate majority. Let's win! name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: ALERT: Stop Vaccine Mandate Vote on Thursday
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_stop_vaccine_mandate&n=1)
---
## ALERT: Stop Vaccine Mandate Vote on Thursday!!
Friend, The Minnesota House is voting on the Frontline Workers Pay bill TOMORROW and luckily for us, Liberty Champion Rep Erik Mortensen has filed a [**Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment**](https://www.action4liberty.com/alert_stop_vaccine_mandates_vote_on_thursday?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_stop_vaccine_mandate&n=2) to the bill. This is what he promised to do ever since the Legislature was flirting with a Special Session to pass the bill last fall. But as you can probably imagine, the Political Class DOES NOT want the vote. They'll either rule it out of order saying it nots germane (it is), refuse to give Mortensen hands for a recorded roll call vote or even, have their own watered down amendment that doesn't save people's jobs. They'll do their best to not even let Mortensen speak about the importance of the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment.
## **Don't let them get away with it.**
The time has come to finally Stop Vaccine Mandates once and for all! No other politician at the Capitol has forced a vote on this important issue. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/alert_stop_vaccine_mandates_vote_on_thursday?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_stop_vaccine_mandate&n=3) Here's what I need you to do... **Contact your State Representative IMMEDIATELY and tell him or her to not pass the Frontline Workers Pay bill unless they add the Rep Mortensen Stop Vaccine Mandate Amendment.** Remember - these politicians work for YOU! They need to Stand with Mort and force a vote on Stopping Vaccine Mandates. Silence is NOT an option! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoeydXsGz92cVrFhOOGKxAVM6_YCm43WSS4uZsz0eMdEnx&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_stop_vaccine_mandate&n=4 "FIND MY STATE REP") [FIND MY STATE REP](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoeydXsGz92cVrFhOOGKxAVM6_YCm43WSS4uZsz0eMdEnx&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_stop_vaccine_mandate&n=4)
---
**SCRIPT: Rep ________, you are about to vote on the Frontline Workers Pay bill. It's important that you do not support this legislation UNLESS it has the Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment attached to it. Support Rep Erik Mortensen as he brings the amendment up for a vote. I'll be watching!**
* * *
**ALTERNATE SCRIPT: Rep ________, now is the time to protect the health rights of Minnesotans. Support Rep Erik Mortensen's Stop Vaccine Mandates Amendment on HF 2900. I'll be watching and expect you to fight for this Amendment and provide a hand for a recorded roll call vote.******
Thank you in advance for contacting your State Representative. This makes a BIG difference!
**Jake Duesenberg**
**Action 4 Liberty**
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_stop_vaccine_mandate&n=5 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_stop_vaccine_mandate&n=5)
---
Action 4 Liberty · United States

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_stop_vaccine_mandate&n=7).

name: BREAKING update from NRSC HQ
subject: Cartels moving North
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Why are we allowing it across the border?
Peter, did you hear the latest testimony from the Border Patrol’s Union President? If not, you NEED to read this.

To begin, we want to address the fact that for many Americans, hearing about violence at the border is difficult to relate to because the media portrays them as isolated incidents and frankly, many of us are so far removed from the violence that it’s easy to write off but this testimony changes that.

He testified that cartels are opening fire on Border Patrol Agents and according to him, the cartels now have more control over the border than our Border Patrol does.

**He also warns that the cartel’s span of control and the violence that they bring with them is moving North every day while we continue to ignore the issue.**

When asked “are Americans in danger as a result of the open borders?” The Union President answered, yes. In the last calendar year, we lost over 100,000 Americans to fentanyl **making it the leading cause of death for young people, 18-45 years of age.** Fentanyl was the cartel’s leading import across our Southern Border.

The time of this being a distant issue has passed. Cartel fentanyl is killing young people in almost every town in America, so why aren’t we aggressively addressing the problem at our border? [**If you can, please send in $5 or more right now so that we can begin to push this issue. The leading cause of death for young American’s is waltzing across the border, let’s put an end to it.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78686569fda1485c8020520171889387&_e=UzwReRDS26rcb25yu6sVYyThXOsrowMrZWnei2VAx9lkXGktlEDEos5xnQGNJy-IQM-AmycFFN-hPugRPbEyJwroAdjeVagDRjav11wwBEKjLO6JE2sGW0Cvysv0jOAeDKNKWn84zDwcimTYXvME-pAz3GdoydXDdk1M8IiUgZpeBYEGhqaQ08ehcY2QsjV-tyQTaP-a6RPmvjD4uso6MTlv0vr-d9OmA7y2J5WVFr6NWi38bbAy6RKJxtuRhaE8kH5XRnO3aqDrBlCQx2uGkTKnR_CopQTrTZNRxYV87jOM_GA8FOqwPBZoGcHeDmLu4S5s_KkZfuNedfb0BmokXK_lgNxI6IPZadYd_9GAVcNcvbW8n4i1MkC_2kH7OwsYE0ySe8CTMIHOV7ZQlbfqcK9dnI_ajvMIfvZZfcyjcI--KsA6NGn8YbDFxtKM_XAAD6mqrKSoi-tZUh9xq-U1gA%3D%3D)

[**HELP US DRAW ATTENTION TO THIS CRISIS -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78686569fda1485c8020520171889387&_e=UzwReRDS26rcb25yu6sVYyThXOsrowMrZWnei2VAx9lkXGktlEDEos5xnQGNJy-IQM-AmycFFN-hPugRPbEyJwroAdjeVagDRjav11wwBEKjLO6JE2sGW0Cvysv0jOAeDKNKWn84zDwcimTYXvME-pAz3GdoydXDdk1M8IiUgZpeBYEGhqaQ08ehcY2QsjV-tyQTaP-a6RPmvjD4uso6MTlv0vr-d9OmA7y2J5WVFr6NWi38bbAy6RKJxtuRhaE8n7JiGot41M3ws7REQikTUvx068h6BaiLh71mdXhKmBXFEMM5yNi5TWtLpGRhnpyOTUS9u7Ww6lec4Vy-bju2ClEmTDZR-WhTdk2aW_Pw2IcDz9JvkJUaojWIkZhlafiNeamIDLbZdrU3LCQaT_mCLKmAWg-Iu4aHgNxu3-OQVO_hgB2fne4f4ArZocP0IqnjIzliTmI0h3WUMLRmSo5Wmg%3D%3D)
Several federal laws, including the Secure Fence Act of 2006, require our government to maintain our border’s security with fencing and other facilities. **Now, the Biden administration is acting contrary to the law by paying contractors not to build the fencing using millions in tax-payer dollars that Congress had appropriated for fencing to be built.**

It’s time for us to take a stand Peter. Kamala Harris was appointed to handle our border and she’s failed to fix it. It’s a testament to her complete lack of competence and with a 50/50 split in the Senate, she holds the deciding vote. We can’t allow her to continue ignoring her charge.

**Peter, whether you live close to the border or not, the evil of the cartels will come knocking on your door soon enough if we don’t put an end to this sooner rather than later.** [**Let’s get this issue trending. It’s time we address what’s going on at our front door. Please, send in whatever you can spare to help us make sure our border gets the attention it deserves.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78686569fda1485c8020520171889387&_e=UzwReRDS26rcb25yu6sVYyThXOsrowMrZWnei2VAx9lkXGktlEDEos5xnQGNJy-IQM-AmycFFN-hPugRPbEyJwroAdjeVagDRjav11wwBEKjLO6JE2sGW0Cvysv0jOAeDKNKWn84zDwcimTYXvME-pAz3GdoydXDdk1M8IiUgZpeBYEGhqaQ08ehcY2QsjV-tyQTaP-a6RPmvjD4uso6MTlv0vr-d9OmA7y2J5WVFr6NWi38bbAy6RKJxtuRhaE8dUL39EzSO15exWQVEKme3cntC-umpVUG4a2B2y_quuqdIpkMzbIMSi9lXBJQTHk0i0kqq9CFvZyPCZwkJHJGzs4YsdSkhpT-Qyhffp8EGjhY7F4_AHGDm25DLWc7Jpsm4qCJKi4Yg1hQ1sAxmvnbYTk-Nnl5cHIZWhGfxqi-tPPWDstZ3B86zDxMDpRVoLddwfCyUy4FHqgsl-eTwcDTPg%3D%3D)

[**HELP US DRAW ATTENTION TO THIS CRISIS -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78686569fda1485c8020520171889387&_e=UzwReRDS26rcb25yu6sVYyThXOsrowMrZWnei2VAx9lkXGktlEDEos5xnQGNJy-IQM-AmycFFN-hPugRPbEyJwroAdjeVagDRjav11wwBEKjLO6JE2sGW0Cvysv0jOAeDKNKWn84zDwcimTYXvME-pAz3GdoydXDdk1M8IiUgZpeBYEGhqaQ08ehcY2QsjV-tyQTaP-a6RPmvjD4uso6MTlv0vr-d9OmA7y2J5WVFr6NWi38bbAy6RKJxtuRhaE8SpVrhQcOrr_XJnB9RPef6eV1Sx708y_-0sRjgqTxv_bLzSexOHltwKwv0JZ-D-S1ItSh7niEHekoRQOIcWVh78I2IY-gZB8fA4XOQps0KrCsJb568JxKJBJOcwIY2LoXg0JiiGDg_vuyQuPwab48a5WP9RPWhGEB6MiRBWukoHwVe5G8dKxAaESgMova8_m1Ein4yrRHa37ZcK1s29pTyw%3D%3D)
Thank you,

Team NRSC

name: Caroline at Jacobs for Congress
subject: We're so close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Our goal is within reach Peter, I’m reaching out to you today, because as one of Matt’s strong supporters, we thought we could count on you to help us out.
We have a CRITICAL fundraising deadline coming up next week, and we’re **just $6,463 shy of our goal**. Are you able to help us reach it in time, Peter? name: Jeremy Sheftel
subject: Breaking News 🚨
body:
| | | |
---
[](www.loubarletta.com)
---
Hi Peter Willis,
Today the Democrat-majority on the State Supreme Court issued an order starting the petition circulation process for statewide candidates on Friday of this week and ending on March 15.
This cuts the traditional three-week circulation period down to roughly two and a half weeks.
As a statewide candidate, Lou must collect thousands of signatures from registered Republicans across PA.

**Whether you think you could get 5 or 500 of your fellow Republicans to sign a petition, we would like to ask for your help.**
Can you help Lou take this critical step in the campaign? Please sign up to circulate petitions for Lou today.
---

clean_body: | | | | www.loubarletta.com Hi Peter Willis, Today the Democrat-majority on the State Supreme Court issued an order starting the petition circulation process for statewide candidates on Friday of this week and ending on March 15. This cuts the traditional three-week circulation period down to roughly two and a half weeks. As a statewide candidate, Lou must collect thousands of signatures from registered Republicans across PA. Whether you think you could get 5 or 500 of your fellow Republicans to sign a petition, we would like to ask for your help. Can you help Lou take this critical step in the campaign? Please sign up to circulate petitions for Lou today. | As always, thank you for your continued support and we look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail soon. Thanks, Jeremy Sheftel Campaign Manager Lou Barletta for Governor www.loubarletta.com | | | | ==

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: When journalists undermine democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
When journalists who cover politics silence immigrant candidates to instead focus their articles on hypothetical future candidates drawn from the ranks of white, wealthy inheritors of private fortunes, what does that suggest about our democracy? | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78OfUg7g0bT3KWj5PFlOrwylcmVHgVhvfe2ZPl5W7AdMaskdqhpBY624ZJ0XisRvMPqUCr8z2d8rVNC-O5z535A1Bss6PSRvNQSI0PwrzbzUWdGPoOP8mRhgQc5-6VZAJBPSw7gsQmsOK6S9WtQPbMmGQHGjrSrI8BN0X9KyZmeBi8GyYPaf2Tz6oVb-GgN05Rz8A8Oqa2h9D3kZtxbdM8s70y5mmZF55WSqcngS5pnEpPibTuzt4dctGD1kUPXdZQPKD1hWcTl1fhsqdzmGtNWaCz1IrShbfPqjJIJ8RF3OMqWSYMwmH-Ji9G0Uc3Bgkit-Ohmx47S4pkbd2H95NnDwNA6wAgsfa0qi6GDAZRGW0c/3ju/4yiCXRSFTJaPvNG7ThkO3Q/h0/Bd9v7grLSKbuEhQkcsjuxR95Qh7MI9_YkVPjba3sl6A)
| | Dear Peter, Our campaign is an open challenge to the bipartisan corruption that has enveloped Washington. It might come as no surprise, then, to witness institutions arraying themselves to insulate the machine that we confront, call out, and aim—with your support—to dismantle. [**Can you join us today to help level the playing field and enable a legitimate election free from propaganda?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLdDvHcxplpFdymJpkMLvunFbnDyWsRiCafdZfxmgmwUbZQvyvoQrPfil1JKxqyN15AIAbvIkwTe5RFKqnW89FuYCR2qMDpnN9bHgpL7sVuuXBsl0uNJB_OSn0NqcPrPyseOOeLKmgmSqre1BMNitFiOC8_oTjF-EjgWrRj7pTMLmN-tGWk2cgl64ag_mws7sC9BKYRnb3WMW4KiVxG5-N3tKFkmBqY53a7v4DvpfqZeu0KDJVFoSmjiAwI7wNUIOGLXhJ6g1n8NknDeUNTbDuwS_JsTofjhhKQN-5ZxBtc8dfw_fNcrGpi0gw8LlZVJIHa6xAcszRJZqGMZUe0lD23/3ju/4yiCXRSFTJaPvNG7ThkO3Q/h1/cf3XBP5ZsrBtpZpfmjtUPHg-_zX9Gmip1Obohf6Umjw)**** We’ve encountered more examples of electoral illegitimacy then I can frankly count: from the effectively limitless wealth of an oligarch enriching herself at the public’s expense for an entire generation while ducking debates, to being silenced as a general election candidate on seemingly neutral platforms from Wikipedia to YouTube. Ultimately, the results are policy outcomes favoring capital and corporations, to which Pelosi & her allies are more committed than their constituents. Few examples of the corruption of our political system, however, alarm me as much as the abdication of press ethics by journalists across the political spectrum. From national corporate news outlets to local “independent” news organizations, reporting on our race has consistently obscured and suppressed facts in favor of corporate Democratic Party narratives. For example, outlets from the _San Francisco Chronicle_ to _48 Hills_ in 2020 “reported” orchestrated lies fabricated to mislead voters, suppressing [whistleblowers](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTLY2u3YHPIM3KX2WLf6ifWQ_rWiyf_2ZGRtME2XxofXa00CXRW8ou6hT7DH4FOsYJUH0MlcYWUtlDcV4C8t1XiskW9u9PSUQzxVT8-oZSA-CaBJaYkVS_s3BDF2pqPRX09JCkQCLZWJseiY-uasoLNmb6-u2hgPOy8yyr8iDAs-rOuVNSvM4Z0-eyUGheiaEWcAsXLOswkBhkqstif3rm9-p-sdAZacg2_aRAHRNwxAjDstl5emtQIcSRx3jhma0Wd6YoztTmGdJjggRQ2PjprCpFXM6R7qGpmFAFogRxTNqf4lQoEK-3lTnkrNkybpgVF-7-k_VYQxPFtB5InNLpN4H5gHEtmettJE6lfkxSyTk/3ju/4yiCXRSFTJaPvNG7ThkO3Q/h2/5fBps8jx5FxZfZ7f03xNU9-clNtkxmFDCeuuOAAGRrE), disregarding evidence, and ignoring conflicts of interests among their sources (and in some cases, even the journalists themselves). It took nearly a year before anyone in the press observed what the SF Bayview described as “a civic lynching” organized by Pelosi’s party patronage network to subvert an election. To address the bias we encountered in 2020, we’re currently in federal court to hold _the Chronicle_ accountable for publishing racist election disinformation without ever correcting itself. Mark your calendar for March 17 at 1:30pm PT, when [we invite you to join us via videoconference](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmk0BXJxEM8XutBsFmGVNDiGkKm9LxIQRh1um-p7fZYgxwwL3RjVH0cqpTYYm2WAV-R3WjgbYEoQAmtTZHOdSVpuLznXXNFCL_XWsCu69cj__LrKI2Cl2XR9ADc93zgYxSE9OOaJZG-UtGFkc69qAD8I_tC3X6lQ_jT047wlBaPh1WhgWmddIujZqbSd92UHN9wEiLbNXNABoaljt8Rt9GITOuVNpVZLHWpvtRRX-GBJahCO7cpuqj8cKsYFemSkTSWNGOH8INEHSVLH61DuoOKCIlqoxdm-vhjusyU-YXb2bMzW8VwzU8iqEI_mGvYIFg/3ju/4yiCXRSFTJaPvNG7ThkO3Q/h3/mTMpcqBHdSqDF5vImWrycYefMbGOvHmTxN7N2lIXTwg) for a crucial court hearing. Those lies were just one example among many. Beyond the disinformation promoted by gullible journalists, even worse are the obvious questions about the incumbent’s policy record that bizarrely went unasked for decades before finally prompting controversy when a rare journalist showed up for work. This pattern—which explains how the long overdue controversy about congressional insider trading finally reached the public after decades of open corruption in broad daylight—is as unfortunate as it has been unfortunately consistent. [**Can you stand with us today to help educate voters about the policy record of the incumbent suppressed by press outlets, and the alternatives to it that news organizations also continue to undermine?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLdDvHcxplpFdymJpkMLvunFbnDyWsRiCafdZfxmgmwUbZQvyvoQrPfil1JKxqyN15tUFAAJEMv5bJmDctKtY261BZsuXtymRSFaT_oH6d6Vp0KGUuwcJKBD0xg5bI3AMVP3hMMeXmgpmU5wHXR5vrZ7tqkmdvwpjDSGkrfndtDgFTM3SdvFN7ZD0mgU4rAU9P3TElbKAGwsKBoMX7iuMqYEP5NUnLeENVG-p-jDHKM0CqHjUYmwZHgPTk8CdWXFzU1fwfnBYTraDOQ-bnmir-v-iK4K5PWsVVtoxFmNQ69kwLrp6q-nytT-PypwTyE23XLWVu43kIzV5LZ6F4tGOqN/3ju/4yiCXRSFTJaPvNG7ThkO3Q/h4/xXgDoFB4LS48wtWTZ-qN0ELHNTLyte6mCdX3PALD-dQ) Just this morning, _Puck News_ published the latest in a series of articles about our 2022 race, to which _Politico_ and _SF Gate_ both linked. Like its previous articles, the latest from _Puck News_ refers only to wealthy, white, hypothetical “candidates” who are not in fact running for office, including one who affirmatively rejected the possibility in the wake of the article's publication. The article effectively presented the 2022 election as a given, entirely ignoring the candidates who are actually running in an election that remains nine months away. A lot can happen in nine months. It gets worse. Each of the figures named by _Politico_ and _Puck News_ are not only wealthy white aspirants to political power, but their only claim to influence is based on inheritance. Christine Pelosi and Reed Jobs were both born into immense privilege, lacking any policy experience, or qualification beyond the circumstances of their birth. The last time I checked, the United States still claimed to respect democracy. The open promotion of oligarchy by journalists, however, represents an assault on democratic principles, as well as press ethics. When the candidates ignored by the press include an immigrant who has won more votes than any previous challenger to the incumbent over the course of her 34-year career, after decades of advocacy forcing policy change in jurisdictions across the United States, the failures of press ethics attain even more disturbing dimensions. The impacts of this kind of propaganda-masquerading-as-news-coverage include corruption, corporate control, and ultimately, white supremacy—not as an ideology easy to observe, but rather as a social condition more difficult to discern. The ultimate reason I’m running for office is to defend human rights from the ongoing abuses of a corrupt system in Washington. On the way there, I’ve been forced to defend press freedom even while [the press has abandoned its own interests](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhjCB1Z8H0TLUFI912OKefiY7vmEnH8Gp3W_JLeXNPf_gqTp1pM4f170E-PcWoKhUOyufiKdQeAh9AQQjEe_s0mwOCPCgq-FYCbXonGoU7ccn696WCZ1bHVcoioN18EdT1VLnXU8JsMRiHYqdSSDmnwU1uFYJH5xIK2uRSD8WLQKkG7ELZAU9Hq1nAqetq7qDRimKpf9hsNfc7TB-uoad2wmFuN6okl9ivbudpDGAqsuaRx-Lng0WWOf5zjsK5lj85SE5CzN-4cQhZSgGrqa4q1MQ94_sx3W584dFUaay8TW6JLu7lwVROHMw9_A-pqt3AOaVHndC5ZMuMYhnUt2Dlw1Ad2UKkmL8eRwgyuJ2G21F/3ju/4yiCXRSFTJaPvNG7ThkO3Q/h5/TThb0t3fZN3QLYqgSsAHmVVBG-gTPUpe2ueubBsxqi8), and labor rights even when [labor leaders have abandoned the interests of their rank and file](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhjCB1Z8H0TLUFI912OKefiY7vmEnH8Gp3W_JLeXNPf_gBDlQphpN1UxbXROFk-8ZSNUX7na5YSOHf7iliH2HsWSzNIMUWkS3INd4MkHlGUyD5MG3FWpbuRt7yLipnPBXex2dac1GAzmzslJzDVOFLrHyyBRMbnKDHaIU7X3Za2wqTsQPZ89A3NE5HIzdNzyc9WrD9J39h9DxPPTc5Xg4hS3mK_BOgjG3yjNi7hw7ee08SVu1-8mdtKU7_QPQGzIS2Qs1fxDonL3T5BVYhBuYFRUZ02R8IlaZo6fTvLoITQXDVxpPzSEGyMH29IwlgUjh4Aby75WOby0EgUdr3TdrdRKaTGTc2ggQXKsUOELPmK4L/3ju/4yiCXRSFTJaPvNG7ThkO3Q/h6/0CKW8WgGtOhXi5TagoUaK0CA4TGAIDsZPmNCljaSEfU). I’m not afraid of a fight. But I am vastly outgunned by an oligarch wielding an intergenerational dynasty, a national political party, and the press as weapons against democracy and accountability. That’s why we need your help today. [**Can you stand with us to defend the future from the dynasty and career politicians who have done so much to push it off a cliff? With journalists doing so much to enable establishment narratives and keep the public in the dark about alternatives, we need your help to shine a light on the choices before voters.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MLdDvHcxplpFdymJpkMLvunFbnDyWsRiCafdZfxmgmwUbZQvyvoQrPfil1JKxqyN17ro5fyOVEf1a8uoUrG624KhFjBRGQCeQYyJgCQCxQbF5uf_RHq8ll2wYg56SWJ8XrrtRZ1SGPUNAILy0YtDb_nOaURb5kDGHbR11y0Z0m9rJsCgMz_ft-bbi1k9gwURENMOsVzvbgU6uiV6Tynb9aV7UsDty-Jca3mdl3Si5LpFPo1m3yN4Eud2ONcDVArOfITDVvkE9gLehcuYwFeXLELEdxGnFeyWR5kWX0T4R1n7UrkSqQJjzGZulX79RDPtPy1mg7RklnD29oK_6uWBjWc/3ju/4yiCXRSFTJaPvNG7ThkO3Q/h7/51vkrGFuH8_bJVpiCE4ld-3pvcGQVDZRYvBZoQmJJxs) After seeing the _Puck News_ and _Politico_ stories this morning, we took the fight to Pelosi during her weekly press conference in Washington. clean_body: When journalists who cover politics silence immigrant candidates to instead focus their articles on hypothetical future candidates drawn from the ranks of white, wealthy inheritors of private fortunes, what does that suggest about our democracy? | | | | | Dear Peter, Our campaign is an open challenge to the bipartisan corruption that has enveloped Washington. It might come as no surprise, then, to witness institutions arraying themselves to insulate the machine that we confront, call out, and aim—with your support—to dismantle. **** We’ve encountered more examples of electoral illegitimacy then I can frankly count: from the effectively limitless wealth of an oligarch enriching herself at the public’s expense for an entire generation while ducking debates, to being silenced as a general election candidate on seemingly neutral platforms from Wikipedia to YouTube. Ultimately, the results are policy outcomes favoring capital and corporations, to which Pelosi & her allies are more committed than their constituents. Few examples of the corruption of our political system, however, alarm me as much as the abdication of press ethics by journalists across the political spectrum. From national corporate news outlets to local “independent” news organizations, reporting on our race has consistently obscured and suppressed facts in favor of corporate Democratic Party narratives. For example, outlets from the San Francisco Chronicle to 48 Hills in 2020 “reported” orchestrated lies fabricated to mislead voters, suppressing , disregarding evidence, and ignoring conflicts of interests among their sources (and in some cases, even the journalists themselves). It took nearly a year before anyone in the press observed what the SF Bayview described as “a civic lynching” organized by Pelosi’s party patronage network to subvert an election. To address the bias we encountered in 2020, we’re currently in federal court to hold the Chronicle accountable for publishing racist election disinformation without ever correcting itself. Mark your calendar for March 17 at 1:30pm PT, when for a crucial court hearing. Those lies were just one example among many. Beyond the disinformation promoted by gullible journalists, even worse are the obvious questions about the incumbent’s policy record that bizarrely went unasked for decades before finally prompting controversy when a rare journalist showed up for work. This pattern—which explains how the long overdue controversy about congressional insider trading finally reached the public after decades of open corruption in broad daylight—is as unfortunate as it has been unfortunately consistent. Just this morning, Puck News published the latest in a series of articles about our 2022 race, to which Politico and SF Gate both linked. Like its previous articles, the latest from Puck News refers only to wealthy, white, hypothetical “candidates” who are not in fact running for office, including one who affirmatively rejected the possibility in the wake of the article's publication. The article effectively presented the 2022 election as a given, entirely ignoring the candidates who are actually running in an election that remains nine months away. A lot can happen in nine months. It gets worse. Each of the figures named by Politico and Puck News are not only wealthy white aspirants to political power, but their only claim to influence is based on inheritance. Christine Pelosi and Reed Jobs were both born into immense privilege, lacking any policy experience, or qualification beyond the circumstances of their birth. The last time I checked, the United States still claimed to respect democracy. The open promotion of oligarchy by journalists, however, represents an assault on democratic principles, as well as press ethics. When the candidates ignored by the press include an immigrant who has won more votes than any previous challenger to the incumbent over the course of her 34-year career, after decades of advocacy forcing policy change in jurisdictions across the United States, the failures of press ethics attain even more disturbing dimensions. The impacts of this kind of propaganda-masquerading-as-news-coverage include corruption, corporate control, and ultimately, white supremacy—not as an ideology easy to observe, but rather as a social condition more difficult to discern. The ultimate reason I’m running for office is to defend human rights from the ongoing abuses of a corrupt system in Washington. On the way there, I’ve been forced to defend press freedom even while , and labor rights even when . I’m not afraid of a fight. But I am vastly outgunned by an oligarch wielding an intergenerational dynasty, a national political party, and the press as weapons against democracy and accountability. That’s why we need your help today. After seeing the Puck News and Politico stories this morning, we took the fight to Pelosi during her weekly press conference in Washington. Both and within , we suggested several questions that journalists have yet to ask, while also sharing an interview from just yesterday with Irami Osei-Frimpong that explored the many dimensions of corruption embodied by the incumbent we're challenging. We’ll soon announce a 5-point policy plan to address bipartisan corruption in Washington. In the meantime, one political goal would do as much as any of those policy proposals to support the future: removing the agents of the past who continue to dominate Congress. Thanks for standing with us! Yours, Shahid | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . Team -- Senate Republicans just put forward a plan for what they'll do if they win the midterms, **_and it's even worse than you think._**

The centerpiece of their proposal? A promise to **raise taxes on more than 100 MILLION Americans** \-- including as much as HALF of Social Security recipients!

President Biden and Senate Democrats CUT taxes for tens of millions of Americans, but now the GOP is trying to **_do the opposite_** \-- and we only have a short window of time to stop them.

**We need 100,000 Democrats to speak up TODAY, before Republicans get any closer to making their tax hikes a reality! Please act before MIDNIGHT:**

**[Add your name to OPPOSE the GOP’s proposed tax hike on working Americans and seniors:](https://go.dscc.org/go/6757?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220223-NewsAlert-RickScottTaxHike-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220223-NewsAlert-RickScottTaxHike-ETG-sl1&akid=3100%2E9716520%2E7F7mea)**

| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/6757?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220223-NewsAlert-RickScottTaxHike-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220223-NewsAlert-RickScottTaxHike-ETG-sl1&akid=3100%2E9716520%2E7F7mea)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

body:

### [A Wave is Coming](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyljddjk-kujkulhluu-j/)
Democrats have screwed up a lot of things since they took over complete control of the government. None more so than our children's education. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyljddjk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyljddjk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [The Key to Saving the World](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyljddjk-kujkulhluu-d/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the five principal challenges we face on the international scene, and what to do about them. Let me know what you think. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyljddjk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyljddjk-kujkulhluu-k/)

### [Is Hillary Running for President Again?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tyljddjk-kujkulhluu-n/)
Joe Biden's been a disaster. Kamala Harris is a disaster. So who's going to be the Democrat nominee for President in 2024. Hillary again? Read about it in this week's blog. And how about those Bengals!!! name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Biden's Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, our border is in shambles and the Biden Administration has consistently failed to take serious action to fix our border crisis.
Hi Peter,**Our border is in shambles and the Biden Administration has consistently failed to take serious action to fix our border crisis.** Our border patrol is underfunded, and criminal actors have begun to take advantage of this. The influx of fentanyl from Mexico highlights the increased power of the cartels and the failure to stop illegal immigrants has led to record border crossings. **_Last fiscal year, 11,201 pounds of fentanyl were seized by Border Patrol. That is enough to kill every American 7 times. In 2021, the highest annual total of migrant crossings was recorded at 1.6 million._** Our border is out of control.**It is no coincidence that these problems were accelerated as soon as President Biden rolled back President Trump 's border policies. We must take back the House from the Democrats and secure our border.**[If you are able, we ask that you please consider donating to our campaign so we can take back the House in 2022 from the Democrats and begin fixing our border crisis.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdyaky-idtjvlhlh-r/) **[We must put an end to their far left open borders agenda.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdyaky-idtjvlhlh-y/)** Thanks,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdyaky-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdyaky-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdyaky-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdyaky-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zdyaky-l-k) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

STEIL FOR WISCONSIN
1818 MILTON AVE. #1448
JANESVILLE, WI 53545 [Read our Privacy Policy](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zdyaky-idtjvlhlh-h/) You are receiving this email as you are subscribed for expressing interest in campaign updates from Steil for Wisconsin Inc.

## February 21, 2022
---
| |

|

|
# There is only one option in the Republican Primary if you want real change.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pqNuuShAm3ZIXA7HzXldYSjESrB53uTVDkUFL0rEHEfwa62Zp_BeSo4Cd6j8DANfduTFR8AsaOPCW8IyL5slm5FBN2VVzU5a6EwTXGcNBeCHkBbq4OiCZyHCPD8n8uK_4hxSXxfLITDrqiL6lKETvg==&c=5O7px9Hlf-R4G7IjOFk50OIotdsHRfuqdbAd1HznxFCxygNSpB0SWQ==&ch=-NxtFIx_RCSI9MIvC9c-_3cIIMO3ZhK9pxuDB59bhSIxn-mXmbFjEQ==)
---
|
# If you are sick of career politicians, please donate RIGHT NOW to this campaign!
---
| | [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pqNuuShAm3ZIXA7HzXldYSjESrB53uTVDkUFL0rEHEfwa62Zp_BeSoeHc6Xn5KdfWz0409u5NVlSGjav7Rx6ZjHQDjkPWh3QRe4Ahwg0FhCsARrduJO0VFCfxRdALa7jMVZPrfD3NyIDERnJXd6p2p6BQmwNHFLUjEbfzdc8Jvs-BefpH-UHfxa88-IoWDsP&c=5O7px9Hlf-R4G7IjOFk50OIotdsHRfuqdbAd1HznxFCxygNSpB0SWQ==&ch=-NxtFIx_RCSI9MIvC9c-_3cIIMO3ZhK9pxuDB59bhSIxn-mXmbFjEQ==)
---
|
##

## We need a leader who is not part of the "good old boy" club. We need to disrupt the status quo.
##

Socialist policies like "wealth redistribution" and "central planning" have gained a solid foothold in Idaho. Too many Republicans who campaigned as "conservatives" have run a political game of "socialism-lite". Idahoans need a governor that will stand firm in the face of federal tyranny and uphold the values that made America great.
Ed shares the alarm of those who see individual freedoms being erased in the name of collective good. Nowhere has this been clearer than in the state Covid-19 lockdowns where the state liquor stores were essential, but churches were shut down; where big box stores stayed open, but the small "Mom and Pop" stores were shuttered.
---
| | [Read More](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pqNuuShAm3ZIXA7HzXldYSjESrB53uTVDkUFL0rEHEfwa62Zp_BeSo4Cd6j8DANfvD6yGdjAmFQAFvQRrKck855e0PfaB2Ld2goR4kJgW1ohIW7nPmvni6c4tStxSNGD2coK_cKaqqFAeMOA7YiA0GcOH8GTV2KRHoHXCVbMzAVoHZaC-WTMHvFaUGUvr6oafzxov0D5iCGRxJaaRP-ZmcicqnED1HzYhq9E1qWJxLc=&c=5O7px9Hlf-R4G7IjOFk50OIotdsHRfuqdbAd1HznxFCxygNSpB0SWQ==&ch=-NxtFIx_RCSI9MIvC9c-_3cIIMO3ZhK9pxuDB59bhSIxn-mXmbFjEQ==)

Thank you [Idaho Pizza Company](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pqNuuShAm3ZIXA7HzXldYSjESrB53uTVDkUFL0rEHEfwa62Zp_BeSo4Cd6j8DANf89wr3H3jFL9o5rbY-Qn7HYc9snL77m-H4SDPmKjsj7b6RMdNtxl97efVuI-upSHf3GJ9CmVSXwrZeLXBaAJ3MOcPv0UpLCt1CbLCb0wwHi4rummW2y6pEjaP5h-GHxVQq5B0ZDmO7iFdCHTvBhsBCZMxclEx0ZBSV173IsEKAYZAQAyot0nhaiuv4PEpcHNAu--AaeyE9BQ4Cn5p2xjXXlTnmau41lp3GESGUBru8nhYdKh4gZwtcUNBXF_Q90pBSXFoVAEP_0jGALnZCpsbtr_ysevNCb9dMg3CQZguKm4I9IbQXSGb2wgWCI_4FrCwLICOJCrjOeNvOAsHpzBUMXmBqcIg1FmMo_qAWsEzbKg=&c=5O7px9Hlf-R4G7IjOFk50OIotdsHRfuqdbAd1HznxFCxygNSpB0SWQ==&ch=-NxtFIx_RCSI9MIvC9c-_3cIIMO3ZhK9pxuDB59bhSIxn-mXmbFjEQ==) for hosting us!

Do not play politics! Stand up for what you believe in!

### February 17 - Malad City, ID

Gaining steam! There's only one option in the Republican primary if you want real change.
---
| | |

### February 18 - Blackfoot, ID

The hardest working candidate for Governor!
---
| |

---
| |

# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---

### Grassroots support from Patriots just like you is what makes this effort successful.
---
| | [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pqNuuShAm3ZIXA7HzXldYSjESrB53uTVDkUFL0rEHEfwa62Zp_BeSm4Hza7LK-s4ENfNsTM3Ukn57KggeU_b44Lyr_8f6nVvoxhIBdqbpi72NhSHSWYqFVhXR2JekwWRic6UwcF4e4ZLNQ6gc2fta8ddRB7hNrEBpuGZMRGvqxjLUIkVBlszWv_y_ct1tnFLOWRvo0Q4MHaIpuGHaE909SAuxYia_NYQIrQgTY6Cr7m8uVxzeGuPy7R_TXJIAB8Vlu3F0d8CygUJIwSWdfQ9zcEPJWyf_1Md7SLJTgTbN68gAtQv_TBEIS-KFfG7lDwZ&c=5O7px9Hlf-R4G7IjOFk50OIotdsHRfuqdbAd1HznxFCxygNSpB0SWQ==&ch=-NxtFIx_RCSI9MIvC9c-_3cIIMO3ZhK9pxuDB59bhSIxn-mXmbFjEQ==)

### JOIN THE MOVEMENT

If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and I welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. We need to disrupt the status quo. Socialist policies like "wealth redistribution" and "central planning" have gained a solid foothold in Idaho. Too many Republicans who campaigned as "conservatives" have run a political game of "socialism-lite". Idahoans need a governor that will stand firm in the face of federal tyranny and uphold the values that made America great. Ed shares the alarm of those who see individual freedoms being erased in the name of collective good. Nowhere has this been clearer than in the state Covid-19 lockdowns where the state liquor stores were essential, but churches were shut down; where big box stores stayed open, but the small "Mom and Pop" stores were shuttered. | | == | | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | February 15 - Emmett, ID Idaho is the last foxhole for the American Dream. We can be a state that celebrates == and rewards hard work. Thank you == for hosting us! | | | | February 16 - Idaho Falls, ID Do not play politics! Stand up for what you believe in! | | | | February 17 - Malad City, ID Gaining steam! There's only one option in the Republican primary if you want real change. | | | | February 18 - Blackfoot, ID The hardest working candidate for Governor! | | | | | Principles Above Politics | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | == == | == | | | | | Grassroots support from Patriots just like you is what makes this effort successful. | | == | | | | | JOIN THE MOVEMENT If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
March 2nd we’re hitting the road.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0sekq5fsoc5o30baobrefdavf2lc2csl5r2gcog_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq7d1heirr7d1hm9qj0tbi66qbcd1jm1rr3cdkmerj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongm1gneor1m5j76odkm5qb1pr564r76sbjc5hmfclkmlgb4t3nc2r61c9h6pj3fduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb4mmqjfdj0coqm1ddksuobapbi4no)
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsol9607k46kgoq11348bo15hh2950sjbu02dj88_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh2bs)
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!** **_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z23t6b4ast9atlntbb70l14sofp9s73faje1prfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh2bs "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4cocceqr7e518e6ni6p60s35j7n1a9b9hbcdc28_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh2bs "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpom1vepdbber33416vg5tj1i2100oml9pvormu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3o56fqjspq7tmploce73gk0a5o1c8bt26mqdfvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z90nlbm1gor0kc0uonutaopsn4rek8mhkgjpaeu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zra7p6u8s696d36dpu7kt8a6etecv8u6njdb2acg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znh5ni02cirjdvbqnd5ikie4beepa2fghdsf9080_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")
[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqoq4n2ff8sve41r7qr9bbr0v17fg6avj9fi601g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zstkb982cn9ifjtvo3ibp5jcbo7a0jnar9pacfbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob3cjh2bs "So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.")_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

name: Jay Collins, Green Beret & Purple Heart Recipient
subject: I know that freedom isn’t free
body:
I lost a leg fighting for this country. The only thing AOC gave up was her bartending gig.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z502cjqfv3b8sjtru14n86givqa2hk0f4iplqi9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfapdgm9j70t5letjb0phheuo79cpgmgr63dbgscpjccjlc2on6dtim5q3ctpjmurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8qmccbn6dg6fchjcoqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
American Patriot, Freedom isn’t free. In fact, nothing is — even though AOC and the radical left Democrats think so. Well, AOC, your understanding of “free stuff?” It’s simply socialism. America is not a socialist country — and God willing, we never will be. That’s why we need America First, MAGA patriots in Washington to save our country from the radical left. I know what it means to fight — and I know the price of our freedom. **I am ready to stand up to radical socialists like AOC and Nancy Pelosi.** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfnmiv5hi8tafmaimjvfpvh34i40qee1961e4vsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob6c9h2bs) [**STOP THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc5htk6n2clsabnlprmmie9octt52louh47b3bp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob6c9h2bs) AOC and the progressives love to whine like bratty children until they get what they want. And weak “leaders” like Joe Biden cave every time. I won’t cave to AOC. And though Nancy Pelosi may scare the members of her party into following her in lockstep, nothing scares me. I have had enough of the radical left's socialist experiment. It’s time we take our country back. **[CHIP IN TODAY and join my fight. >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsrvhe20vs0dnoe4002g5mfol4hv8tuv92610sn0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob6c9h2bs)** Thank you for your support, Jay Collins, Green Beret & Purple Heart Recipient [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8cpaom1gob7mspi6kljsu229jegdsf2rucnp1mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob6c9h2bs) Jay Collins is a retired Green Beret, non-profit executive, father, husband and Republican candidate for congress. Collins has fought to protect and provide for American families for over two decades. He’s ready to continue that fight in Congress and put a stop to the far left socialist agenda that hikes taxes, blows out government spending, threatens national security, and fails to put the American people first. [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeop00tekk6oua65gil7ehhk20vbpcunj1lf5rjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob6c9h2bs) PAID FOR BY JAY COLLINS FOR CONGRESS Use of military rank, job titles, and related details does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive calls and text messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from Jay Collins for Congress. Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. Terms & conditions/privacy policy apply: [PRIVACY POLICY & TERMS OF USE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdmvsaidoupvdei9u6tfmt01b904i60u7gpt7asg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg60ob6c9h2bs).

clean_body: I lost a leg fighting for this country. The only thing AOC gave up was her bartending gig. American Patriot, Freedom isn’t free. In fact, nothing is — even though AOC and the radical left Democrats think so. Well, AOC, your understanding of “free stuff?” It’s simply socialism. America is not a socialist country — and God willing, we never will be. That’s why we need America First, MAGA patriots in Washington to save our country from the radical left. I know what it means to fight — and I know the price of our freedom. I am ready to stand up to radical socialists like AOC and Nancy Pelosi. AOC and the progressives love to whine like bratty children until they get what they want. And weak “leaders” like Joe Biden cave every time. I won’t cave to AOC. And though Nancy Pelosi may scare the members of her party into following her in lockstep, nothing scares me. I have had enough of the radical left's socialist experiment. It’s time we take our country back. Thank you for your support, Jay Collins, Green Beret & Purple Heart Recipient Jay Collins is a retired Green Beret, non-profit executive, father, husband and Republican candidate for congress. Collins has fought to protect and provide for American families for over two decades. He’s ready to continue that fight in Congress and put a stop to the far left socialist agenda that hikes taxes, blows out government spending, threatens national security, and fails to put the American people first.
