name: United American Patriots
subject: We need to get this to Biden’s desk ASAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United American Patriots |
body:
We can’t erase the grave injustice that has been committed. But we can help get Staff Sergeant Robert Bales a presidential par
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdhr1v84ea03s2vigtemo04kh574vom83a49ufjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62o34s5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5jedge0s3ncmon6tb1cooj2ttkmqq6bc75e9qj8cbkcqrmfdtlclp64odhe5rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3aphhespm4ptmc5j7ao5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| |
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9nhf5fur7e328tge5c5sl4lrg1f9bn1jb2ahl48_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62o34s5h2bs)
|
---
Fellow patriot,

Have you heard about what happened to Staff Sergeant Robert Bales?

**It’s going to make you absolutely FURIOUS.**

Keep reading to find out why. ⬇️

While serving in Afghanistan, SSgt. Bales conducted a preemptive attack against Taliban fighters who had previously harmed U.S. servicemen and were coordinating another attack.

The Afghans claimed he killed 16 people, including women and children. Bales claimed he killed 20, including Taliban enemy combatants.

**SSgt. Bales was just trying to do his job and protect his men...but he was treated like a criminal for it.**

During prosecution, the U.S. government:

**❌ _DID NOT_** assume Bales was innocent until proven guilty
**❌ _DID NOT_** challenge allegations the Afghan’s made against Bales, a U.S. Soldier
**❌ _DID NOT_** confirm if those killed were enemy combatants, despite having DNA evidence
**❌ _DID NOT_** disclose that the Army administered Bales “mefloquine” - an anti-malaria drug known to cause psychotic episodes
**❌ _DID NOT_** appropriately evaluate the intent for his actions

What they _**DID**_ do was threaten Bales with the death penalty to coerce him into testifying...

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze27f9b3no9i0koubkunqdocn611jb0pautfrbso_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62o34s5h2bs)

SSgt. Bales is a decorated infantry Soldier who is serving a life sentence without ever having seen a trial.

His only hope is that the president takes a second look at the facts of his case...

**We’re on a mission to get SSgt. Bales case on Biden’s desk, but we’re going to need your help to make it happen. Fellow patriot****, can we count on you to chip in a few bucks and help us get this case in front of the president?**
[**YES, I’LL CHIP IN!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvss22b1f6o0jtvmvkersoljiiejpsbkmj8jfqbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62o34s5h2bs)
Right now, this Warrior is stuck behind bars while 150 Taliban prisoners who were on death row for “heinous war crimes” are walking free...

We can’t erase the grave injustice that has been committed. **But we can help get Staff Sergeant Robert Bales a presidential pardon so he can return home to his wife and children. **

**[Click here to pitch in whatever you can and help us make it happen. >>>](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znt7g0hl085lp1u201asrksqoa1hm4rpqqeld8to_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62o34s5h2bs)**

Thank you,
United American Patriots
**_[UAP.org](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2ocmkfj8bjk5sg9veor9uc0pvmhcqttibe5iseo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62o34s5h2bs)_**
---
United American Patriots is a grassroots organization that helps provide financial support to our nation’s Warriors who have been wrongly accused, prosecuted, or imprisoned for crimes they did not commit. We rely on donations from our network of patriots to help these American heroes and their families.

_If you want to help support our mission, you can make a donation to our Warrior Fund today._
[**SUPPORT AMERICA’S WARRIORS**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze08eq6afnj99dsqs69nrjk6umdue45mm3l12kao_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62o34s5h2bs)
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: You can help restore hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z23tpdn16k5bfvog06vi5vd2ntsj03plc5f2188g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62p30c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpn3dr0edg69ddkepjjeddie9pb5dj0s5h6cojgcdi6acjks2oj8tj1e6oracrnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66libbd9nmpi6cc5n6di6fc5lclp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z37ardid2b5lrjf0d0pqk4jk0jdvrass4ihcd488_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62p30c3h2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zftcibc9i2ocpmi8cduj5g9qtrttcej6rne1bo38_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62p30c3h2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zavc69525vfg02aujalqqpdkpjt09c5kkv3uqqug_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62p30c3h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhsj1ouh1spoabrs3hhi6c4bv790ofb7t3c00o50_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62p30c3h2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsn777t47i1654q2q8e25539pkqobua3p5itorc0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctg62p30c3h2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

| Today, the Republican Party announced a candidate who decided to run just a few days ago would get their support.
You deserve to hear the truth.
They sought out an individual who does not live in the district and is being thrown up as part of a menagerie of political deal making. Our Republican party has intentionally given up on this race clearing a path for the Democrats to get their way this November.
My loyalty has and will continue to be to you - the hard-working men and women of this district. Our campaign is focused on putting America First and your Families First. Just as President Trump stood in the gap and took the hits for us, I pledge to do the same for you and your family.
America is at a crossroads. If we continue with politics as usual, there will be no more democracy. We need patriots to run for office who focus less on self-preservation and more on saving the soul of this nation.
Now is the time for us to rise up!
Join me in this fight.

clean_body: Political Deals, Deals, and More Deals | | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | Never, Never, Never, Give Up | == | Today, the Republican Party announced a candidate who decided to run just a few days ago would get their support. You deserve to hear the truth. They sought out an individual who does not live in the district and is being thrown up as part of a menagerie of political deal making. Our Republican party has intentionally given up on this race clearing a path for the Democrats to get their way this November. My loyalty has and will continue to be to you - the hard-working men and women of this district. Our campaign is focused on putting America First and your Families First. Just as President Trump stood in the gap and took the hits for us, I pledge to do the same for you and your family. America is at a crossroads. If we continue with politics as usual, there will be no more democracy. We need patriots to run for office who focus less on self-preservation and more on saving the soul of this nation. Now is the time for us to rise up! name: Ashley Ward
subject: Final NC Congressional Maps:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
https://www.ashleywardforcongress.com [https://www.ashleywardforcongress.com]
Hi everyone!
We've all watched the redistricting process unfold over the last many months. I am happy to share with you that we have finally reached the conclusion of this long and frustrating process.
Today, the NC courts determined the new US Congressional Districts for NC. My new district is District 04, which includes Alamance, Durham, Granville, Orange, and Person counties. I am so very excited and honored to be able to run for office in this district that has played such an important role in my life.
I have strong roots in this district. My family has lived in Durham for nearly 100 years, first migrating as sharecroppers to work in the tobacco factories. I was born in Durham and lived there until I was 13, when I moved with my mother to Person County. I am a proud graduate from Person High and Piedmont Community College. My husband, Lynn Ward, is a 30-year teaching veteran in Person county. After we were married, we moved to Orange County for work and school opportunities for me. I returned to school and graduated from UNC-Chapel Hill. I've lived in Durham, Orange, and Person counties and currently have family in Durham, Alamance, and Granville Counties.
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/2022%20Interim%20Congressional%20%281%29.png]
I believe that we need people with practical experience in Congress writing policy, not playing politics. My lived and professional experiences at NOAA and Duke include work on the ground and federal policy implementation in NC and beyond. My experiences have prepared me to provide services for you in our district as well as develop effective policy in Washington.
We are 12 weeks from the NC Primary on May 17th! Early voting begins on April 28th. We need all hands on deck!
If you haven't already, please follow along on social media (links below) and sign up to volunteer!
Finally, if you are able, please donate to my campaign. Your donations mean so much to a grassroots campaign like mine and will be used to purchase yard signs and other materials to help get my name and message out.
Thank you so much for your support! I look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail!
Ashley
SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
Friends of Ashley Ward
P.O. Box 1092
Mebane, NC 27302
United States

# ******CRISPI CALLS ON SMITH TO DENOUNCE HORRIFIC TREATMENT OF TRUCKERS**
****
**Seaside Park, NJ –** America First conservative Mike Crispi today called on Congressman Chris Smith, (RINO-VA), to call out the human rights abuses of Justin Trudeau and his horseback mounted police force.
“ _Peaceful protestors have gathered to make their voices heard, yet Justin Trudeau is trampling their rights,_ ” Crispi said. “ _Where is 41-year Congressman Chris Smith who fancies himself as a champion of human rights?_ ”
Crispi lamented seeing the bank accounts of peaceful protestors frozen and the protestors themselves trampled by Canadian police sent in on horseback on the orders of Trudeau and other insecure, leftwing, statist politicians.
“ _The images we see of the horseback mounted police trampling peaceful protestors are horrific,_ ” Crispi said. “ _Where is Chris Smith? It’s easy to call out human rights abuses in third world countries most Americans have never heard of, but where is Smith when these crimes are perpetrated on our neighbors to the north?_ ”
Crispi pointed out that American convoys of truckers protesting for freedom are now coalescing around America and he demanded that Smith have the courage to be proactive in protecting their rights to peacefully assemble.
“ _Congressman Smith and the other RINOs in Congress should be reminding the Biden Administration that American truckers are protected by the First Amendment and that no harm should come to them if and when they peacefully assemble in the nation’s capital,_ ” Crispi said. “ _These men and women deserve proactive leadership, but Smith is silent because he’s become part and parcel of the Washington elite_.”****

name: Capt. Hung Cao
subject: Are you proud to be an American?
body:
I know what it’s like when Communism destroys your country. When I was four years old, my family narrowly escaped the Communi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4s2rdikq65v7kquh15jo5bkiln93a1titnn617o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti68oj1c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf5djgsqpj4sjic3j76p7661omed36m9i37d36e6p30ojgc8pned74m3inaotlc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8qmccbkmdgefclkcoq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
Fellow Patriot, I know what it’s like when Communism destroys your country. When I was four years old, my family narrowly escaped the Communist takeover of South Vietnam. Saigon fell just ten days later. I arrived in America as a refugee, a boy without a country. To me, America has always been the bright, shining beacon of freedom in the world. **I cannot express to you how proud and thankful I am to be an American.**

I dedicated my life to the defense of this country and the freedom we hold so dear.

I served the whole world over on missions as a Navy Special Operations Officer. I fought in combat operations in Iraq, Afghanistan and Somalia.

I saw the worst of humanity in our enemies; but I also saw the best our country had to offer in the character of my fellow Soldiers, Sailors, Airmen, Marines and Coast Guardsmen.

**Throughout my _entire time_ as an American and a Naval Officer, I _always_ thought we could rely on our Commander in Chief to lead us to victory - until I saw what happened in Afghanistan under Joe Biden. **

_**I****have five close friends who are being kicked out of the Navy for refusing the Covid-19 vaccine.** These are Special Projects saturation divers, SEAL Team 6 operators, and world class pilots who have given their entire lives in defense of this Republic._ _Now, because of a vaccine for a virus against which they already have natural immunity, they are discarded like yesterday's trash. Some will not receive their benefits after years of service to our country.**This is wrong and no way to thank our men and women for their service.**_

**I knew I had to take action, and that’s why I’m running for Congress in Virginia’s 10th district.**

I hope you’ll join me in our mission to uphold the **freedom of choice** in our great country.

**[Pitch in today to send a retired U.S. Naval Officer to Congress who will FIGHT for the American dream and make America FREE again.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0v99cs8649tidrup5dgm0oe2ulcip8cqeg7n740_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti68oj1c1h2bs) **
[**PITCH IN $10**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zms6aa6ilq7us2fm8dr6pll5j0b80n0m5b2vea9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti68oj1c1h2bs) [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4boh6vuv9fullt99fcerd21g7tvno82c6d63kjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti68oj1c1h2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ceij0i2pi1b43aurjs9sq5j7cf9n7an2pjut9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti68oj1c1h2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgvjv7ccplm4jjfrihbl130knoqnpfi716ql9uso_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti68oj1c1h2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3q86d5eb9039ivrle2k52rmel637qsouak09dsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti68oj1c1h2bs) [**PITCH IN ANY OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5ks4jr1bmr7nocpigpfktfgrircdipda0n6hkao_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti68oj1c1h2bs) Thank you, Capt. Hung Cao
Former Navy Special Forces
Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10) [**JOIN THE TEAM**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0rrn2kjh7o5in0k4vgabv9rqfqvso7ra5jmnh9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti68oj1c1h2bs) Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Standing with Ukraine
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Today we are praying for strength, resolve, and ultimately peace for the people of Ukraine

Peter,

Today we are praying for strength, resolve, and ultimately peace for the people of Ukraine and her allies, including the United States. A free, democratic Ukraine is being attacked by one man, Vladimir Putin, and the military of Russia operating under his command.

This was not totally unexpected, but it is totally unprovoked. It's what happens when an authoritarian senses weakness and opportunity, in democracy, in public opinion, and through his recent history, lack of swift, damning economic or more forceful consequences.

That's why today I'm calling on our leaders in Florida to send an unambiguous message to Vladimir Putin, that the democracy-loving people of Florida condemn this act of war. We do not respect him. We do not fear him. We oppose all aggression against democracy anywhere.

We will send this message, hopefully, through bipartisan Cabinet and Legislative resolutions.

Some may not think this is important work for elected officials in Florida, but it is. Because if you respect or bow to Putin, then that sends a message to Maduro, Ortega, or Castro and Díaz-Canel, and any other authoritarian government or dictator Floridians have fled.

We must be clear. Florida does not respect authoritarians who steal from, abuse, and silence their people — or attack democracies outside their own borders. We will always stand with and for democracy.

May God bless and protect democracy.

— Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
March 2nd we’re hitting the road.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztha6fsntgi24cao9oct0l9k0qv6uc54l8rsd1tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5gmlom8cbj6eqm0pjn6drb1cphmmpb9djkeuq7ct5im5qn0tlgcipr8tbgeljrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5lmko7cp366pib6p1nm2qmash5u)
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6ul084l2n8iss28vn1u4fi8ckakbi4vpgibttlo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh2bs)
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!** **_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk90fh4djsofcvb6qc1po2139d1g5em64inj3ua8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh2bs)_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5s5q4t9enqdd6aq5cg87l15t4unhbi96ajaldq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh2bs)_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ziqd83084adm534nd8ke74si5jfheejgbnq6qhj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh2bs)_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbotoi4aib8it2r2723e1n0c0940i76onp0gmao0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh2bs)_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvf0jgb4rfciuugqr5moeh0b6kc8s7veirljod88_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh2bs)_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zko7dpso003018eq2tmg6nvm6vtri2j10ova0m00_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh2bs)_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrilvdke1adh2g36qbk6bq990ablmqsj08jj3rfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh2bs)
[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3iaoqehab0ian373d8pvev8kketn7mnetenkv1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh2bs)_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zav986tuf0qvhkldbn2g3neivp0ne1s358cknci8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cti62o74clh2bs)_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

name: Dr. Bob Lorinser
subject: Too many lives are at stake for war to be used as leverage by politicians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Too many lives are at stake for war to be used as leverage by politicians
"We must rise to the occasion with unified strength against an unhinged tyrant trying to rebuild an adversary empire." — Dr. Bob Lorinser
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
Dr. Bob Lorinser is a retired member of the United States State Department’s Foreign Services. The use of his diplomatic rank, job titles, and photographs depicting government entities does not imply endorsement by the Department of the State or the Foreign Services.
MAKE A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1] DONATE $50 ON CLICK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
- As Ukraine is under attack, the United States must be steadfast in its resolve to hold Vladimir Putin accountable without further endangering lives or deploying US troops on the ground.
The only entity responsible for this aggression is Putin and Russia.
This conflict is severe and volatile, threatening the lives and livelihoods of 40 million innocent people. It is not time to score points using substanceless rhetoric toward political opponents.
Especially on the international stage, Congress and the President need to be partners and in agreement as to how to address this issue. For the sake of the free world, Diplomats, Generals, Intelligence, Congresspeople, and the Biden administration need to come together, unified, in our support of the Ukrainian people
The invasion of Ukraine by Russia could result in tens of thousands of fatalities. The main priority of the United States should be to present real solutions for punishment, deterrence, de-escalation, aid, and peace.
This war is not just a struggle for an ally's independence and territorial/economic sovereignty. It is an attack on the free world.
It is not our war, but the ramifications will ripple beyond Eastern Europe. It is crucial our internal divisions and politicking cease for the common goal of preventing bloodshed and destruction. Without unified solutions, the world order is at risk of destabilization.
Right now is the exact time for principled leadership. It is time to galvanize all stakeholders. We must rise to the occasion with unified strength against an unhinged tyrant trying to rebuild an adversary empire.
MORE ON UKRAINE [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/is-there-still-room-for-diplomacy-in-ukraine-crisis]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Dr%20Lorinser%20Signature.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1] DONATE $50 ON CLICK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Dr. Bob Lorinser is a democratic candidate for Michigan's 1st District Congressional seat, a district spanning across the Northern lower peninsula and the Upper Peninsula. He would be honored to represent all the residents of the District, including the young and old, people of all genders, those that agree and disagree with him, moderates, and progressives.
He is an experienced diplomat, statesman, and physician from Northern Michigan running for Michigan's First Congressional District. With your support, Dr. Bob hopes to serve and represent the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan.
Why is he running for Congress? In one word: Service. He has a strong sense of duty and hope to offer Northern Michigan true, honest and ethical representation.
Together, with your support, he can fulfill the needs of our communities' everyday citizens and working families. He's confident he can be an effective member of Congress for the 1st District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American.
He will run on a bedrock of principles — wisdom, justice, courage, kindness, democratic freedom, and equality under the law.
You deserve a change. You deserve a Representative with a moral compass, integrity, someone who speaks the truth, and tries to embody all that is best in this great district. You deserve a Congressman with vision, who has the ability to recognize problems on the horizon and develop reasonable solutions, someone who has the ability to build a consensus to achieve that vision.
The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. It's time to unite. It's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities.
He strives to be Northern Michigan's voice of reason in Washington, D.C..
He's eager to continue his service. He's incredibly humbled to run and it would be his life's honor to represent you. Please share his message with your friends and family. Victory will not happen without your support and generosity.
Vision: Dr. Bob is interested in independent, reasonable solutions that best fit the First District, regardless of which side of the aisle those solutions originate. He is hyperfocused on the reunification of our communities and country.
Regardless of which party voters affiliate, he strives to be the Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan's 'voice of reason' in Washington, dedicated to advancing policies that reflect our common goals. Lorinser is confident his developing initiatives will be much more representative of the district's values and priorities than the current incumbent. Dr. Bob stands on certain principles that will guide his policy decisions and seeks to be a true representative of the people of the 1st District.

subject: Russia's invasion of Ukraine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | |
---
# **Friend — I wanted to share some thoughts with you about Russia's invasion of Ukraine, and to ask you to join us in praying for all in harm's way.**

---
We slashed our oil output while giving Putin a pipeline, showed weakness and incompetence in Afghanistan, and emboldened our adversaries. In return, we’re going to get $5 gas and further diminished global stature. Vacuums get filled. It’s simple physics. President Biden has projected a vacuum of leadership and Putin is filling it with cruelty and dreams of a new USSR Biden’s weakness has significant real-world implications as Ukrainians now, sadly, feel intimately. Please pray for the people of Ukraine, Americans overseas, and for our military.
---
---
Gary Black
---

name: Dawn Moore
subject: Help me help Wes
body:

name: Senate Majority Alert (Iowa)
subject: Mitch McConnell's $94 million to take back the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
This grassroots movement needs to keep pace with GOP megadonors
| | |
---
**Peter – the path to protecting our Senate majority runs through Iowa. Here's a critical update out of the Hawkeye State:**
**With our Senate control razor-thin, every single seat matters immensely – and right now, Sen. Grassley (R-IA) is more vulnerable than ever.** He's facing his LOWEST job approval ratings in nearly four decades, and recent data shows that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect him!
Democrat Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to take advantage of this unprecedented momentum among Democrats in Iowa to defeat Sen. Grassley. **If Abby wins, we'll be all but GUARANTEED to maintain Senate control!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42180460/331959789/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk629-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTY1M2Q1Mi04Nzk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i48lA6ZGAWMfolMxi7yIEa1e1bk9XAzEgwbK7j-nOew=)
That’s why this news is so awful: **Last year alone, Mitch McConnell's super PAC raised more than $94 MILLION** to defend vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and DEFEAT challengers like Abby.
**This grassroots movement needs to keep pace with GOP megadonors, but right now, Abby is falling short of her next big fundraising goal!** Abby has to keep hitting her goals or she won't have the resources to take on Sen. Grassley and the GOP.
**[It's crucial Abby starts the year off right by hitting all of her fundraising goals, and she needs to raise another $4,328 TONIGHT to get back on track. Can you rush a donation before 11:59 p.m. to help her reach her goal and defeat Sen. body:

I could not wait a minute longer to send you this email.

While millions of Americans are realizing that Joe Biden and the radical Left have brought our nation to the brink of ruin, I am working day and night to SAVE OUR NATION.

Everything great I've ever done is because of loyal Patriots like YOU, which is why I am pleased to invite you to join my _**[Inner Friend Circle.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59701383:s9zJNzHN5:m:1:2532013465:F8D0149866E257E8B5B8E52DDBF0C98A:r)**_

name: Team Jane
subject: The Last Stretch!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Friend,

We’re in the final stretch of this campaign with election day just five days away. The momentum for our grassroots campaign is building everyday! I’m confident we will make it to the runoff if we can close out strong. Can you help us in this final stretch? [secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask]

Opportunities over the coming days include Get Out The Vote block walking and helping on election day at the polls. Sign up for a volunteer shift below:

Saturday Blockwalk [https://bit.ly/JHHVolunteer]

Sunday Blockwalk [https://bit.ly/JHHVolunteer]

Poll Greeting - Election Day [https://bit.ly/JHHVolunteer]

Since day one, we’ve been committed to running a people-powered grassroots campaign focusing on the issues families across CD30 are facing. It’s that same people-powered spirit that will deliver a strong finish on election night. That’s why your help in this final stretch is crucial. Sign up to volunteer now. [https://bit.ly/JHHVolunteer]

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90478/images/HOPE%20is%20on%20the%20ballot.gif]

name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: The Collin Raye Concert was fantastic! Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Peter,Just wanted to publicly thank everyone that helped with the Collin Raye concert last night. It was such a great event! Wow, Collin is an amazing performer and was so entertaining. What a great down to earth person. He is also a patriot that understands what we face in this country. Yes, it was chilly but worth every minute! I would have liked to rub shoulders with more people but did not make my way around the room, forgive me on that one. Again, a big thank you to you all and for your tremendous support! Ammon BundyP.S. Please go to our social media pages to see all the videos and pictures. body:
February is almost over

|
---
**This email is going to be a bit of a long one. So before we explain, if you support Democrats and the work they’re doing to deliver a brighter economic future for families across Indiana,[chip in here >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42182175/331969770/405560545?refcode=idp-em-220223-eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTZkMjM3YS04ZDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6fE8aVTTxTJe3Uc56nwrYNcVMlEkWPtxsc1-kXnZ7do=)** Peter — we’re nearing the end of the shortest month of the year and we have some pretty ambitious fundraising goals we need to hit. We’ve set a $10,000 goal that we need to reach before we reach our end-of-month deadline and here’s why:
* **The Indiana Democratic Party is gearing up for the midterms.** Our team is starting to grow so that we can expand our efforts to elect Democrats to every office from the township level all the way to the U.S. Senate.
* **We’ve been working around the clock to expose the Indiana Republicans’ culture wars** and hold the legislature accountable to pass more meaningful legislation that addresses the kitchen-table issues Hoosiers care about most.
* **The INDems team is out on the road talking to Hoosiers in every corner of the state** about how Democrats continue to deliver a brighter future for Indiana families through the Jobs Act and the American Rescue Plan.
* **We won’t let the Indiana GOP’s culture wars diminish the bright future of our state.** Indiana Democrats are continuing to work hard to deliver on the kitchen table issues that matter most to Hoosier families.

**We’ve got a lot of big plans for 2022. We’re sending extreme Republicans like Todd Young packing and we’re electing Hoosier Democrats up and down the ballot. name: Greg Lopez for Governor
subject: Who Determines Who Becomes Governor in November?
body:
Yes, YOU, But There is More...
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Who Will be Voting in November?
---
| Friend, the Secretary of State Report is OUT!
On February 1, the Colorado Secretary of State's Office released a report of registered voters for the state. It showed:
Total Registered Voters: 4,266,466

* Republicans = 22.36%
* Active Voters: 954,102
* Inactive Voters: 108,875
* Pre-Registered Voters: 5,685

* Unaffiliates = 38.39%
* Active Voters: 1,637,864
* Inactive Voters: 227,643
* Pre-Registered Voters: 51,521

* Democrats = 25.10%
* Active Voters: 1,070,804
* Inactive Voters: 123,737
* Pre-Registered Voters: 4,785

* All Other Political Parties = 14.15%

For any Republican to win this Governor's race, we need a candidate who will take large blocks of voters in the Unaffiliate and Democrat demographics away from Jared Polis who have been betrayed by his policies and his leadership.
Greg Lopez is the only candidate who can do this.
He has the experience, credentials, and pre-existing relationships with the business, labor, and minority communities throughout Colorado.
Our campaign is thinking and working beyond the Primary, and we need a candidate who can convince the Unaffiliate and Democrat voters of their values of keeping the most of their hard-earned money, getting the government out of the way of their small business so it will thrive, and restoring Colorado back to its healthy way of life rest within our Republican Party.
What can you do to make a difference?
[Make A Donation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ot0AXz7kqwae0_VU4iBTKWA9RWiK1Cjyi3OwKkhlQJtgbwTASboeZlVj226ZhB__a7n7oXXYVvfBPrT2VuU5BXQRs_RoENCkxwwt2j4Fff8SzIJCtTlnJIJ4CXILJNZ84ghOSSKVRzhJR-6xejuX7Hfqn_Blx8-G&c=MkbFWKcM4L4KWJCqKlda030TPVhqyu-Cc9Pap8_-BCxvOaFlWdOQIA==&ch=ofLFJ-cRvfjYQgtnunwcM3UHFrHGKVPv0tAN9ucDnAqmp1uTIVTL1g==)

subject: Do you support student debt cancellation?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
John King came out as the first current or former U.S. Secretary of Education to call for cancellation.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42182868/331972893/1974367824?source=email-ngp-20220224-b2_pet_in-TK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220224-b2_pet_in-TK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220224&&&&utm_content=b2_pet_in&&&&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&&&&amount=15&refcode2=3f384e09-9295-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjM4NGUwOS05Mjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9U6LOMSRGBz6hB5DHOPsbQKdWwDMmtM7PmoDe9X6nGw=)

| Peter, we are in a student debt crisis. **Our state alone has a total of $34 BILLION in student debt across 804,600 Marylanders.** Student debt has become a state and national crisis that is keeping millions of us under a dark cloud. **That’s why John King came out as the first current or former U.S. Secretary of Education to call for unilateral cancellation.** _**[Will you sign John’s petition to CANCEL student loan debt?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42182869/331972894/-870097671?contactdata=rx9Jo1sGHhkWge2Wwr2qQRUn9Ie6DhAYKF6hSiZvcjm8J4Zu0AJjokaFSEWQ2aKBV2Xp%2BepkiU2VLZKtdGtDvAnQ5CHIPjgSmoytrhWHjENbGZcClyPmTj5UhI9eMkWG4Cb66Zw0c9a%2FHt0d78Eu2gYtRed9k39CZs4SUyDmPVyG4DCc6iRnO8%2FQykU7ICoicekjDnMqvDd%2FfG4HxPMuQg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjM4NGUwOS05Mjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9U6LOMSRGBz6hB5DHOPsbQKdWwDMmtM7PmoDe9X6nGw=&emci=17d6d3c5-e394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3f384e09-9295-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42182870/331972895/-870097671?contactdata=rx9Jo1sGHhkWge2Wwr2qQRUn9Ie6DhAYKF6hSiZvcjm8J4Zu0AJjokaFSEWQ2aKBV2Xp%2BepkiU2VLZKtdGtDvAnQ5CHIPjgSmoytrhWHjENbGZcClyPmTj5UhI9eMkWG4Cb66Zw0c9a%2FHt0d78Eu2gYtRed9k39CZs4SUyDmPVyG4DCc6iRnO8%2FQykU7ICoicekjDnMqvDd%2FfG4HxPMuQg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjM4NGUwOS05Mjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9U6LOMSRGBz6hB5DHOPsbQKdWwDMmtM7PmoDe9X6nGw=&emci=17d6d3c5-e394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3f384e09-9295-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
---
John knows how important education is — his family’s entire trajectory was changed by higher education. Just three generations ago, his great-grandfather was enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg, Maryland... only 25 miles from where his family lives today. A generation later his grandmother became one of the first Black women to graduate from the University of Maryland Eastern Shore, and John went on to serve as U.S. Secretary of Education under our nation’s first Black President. John also knows how difficult student loans can be to recover from — he was still paying his own student loans off when he was U.S. Secretary of Education! _**[Will you join our movement to unilaterally cancel student loans today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42182871/331972896/-870097671?contactdata=rx9Jo1sGHhkWge2Wwr2qQRUn9Ie6DhAYKF6hSiZvcjm8J4Zu0AJjokaFSEWQ2aKBV2Xp%2BepkiU2VLZKtdGtDvAnQ5CHIPjgSmoytrhWHjENbGZcClyPmTj5UhI9eMkWG4Cb66Zw0c9a%2FHt0d78Eu2gYtRed9k39CZs4SUyDmPVyG4DCc6iRnO8%2FQykU7ICoicekjDnMqvDd%2FfG4HxPMuQg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjM4NGUwOS05Mjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9U6LOMSRGBz6hB5DHOPsbQKdWwDMmtM7PmoDe9X6nGw=&emci=17d6d3c5-e394-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3f384e09-9295-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_ — Team King P.S. clean_body: John King came out as the first current or former U.S. Secretary of Education to call for cancellation. | = | Peter, we are in a student debt crisis. Our state alone has a total of $34 BILLION in student debt across 804,600 Marylanders. Student debt has become a state and national crisis that is keeping millions of us under a dark cloud. That’s why John King came out as the first current or former U.S. Secretary of Education to call for unilateral cancellation. | John knows how important education is — his family’s entire trajectory was changed by higher education. Just three generations ago, his great-grandfather was enslaved in a cabin in Gaithersburg, Maryland... only 25 miles from where his family lives today. A generation later his grandmother became one of the first Black women to graduate from the University of Maryland Eastern Shore, and John went on to serve as U.S. Secretary of Education under our nation’s first Black President. John also knows how difficult student loans can be to recover from — he was still paying his own student loans off when he was U.S. Secretary of Education! — Team King P.S. name: Emily Mellits
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend,

The Jocelyn Benson finance team recently ran through the fundraising numbers and we found an interesting datapoint that I want to share.
Our campaign’s average grassroots donation is $23.97.

This number confirms one of the core principles of our campaign. We’re not going to rely on large money special interests, nor is Jocelyn going to answer to them. Our campaign is supported by people just like you,friend, voters who believe in democracy and trust that Jocelyn is the best person to administer our elections.

As we look ahead to the end of the month, we need to raise another $10,000 to keep us on track for November. We’re not going to tap into an ultra-rich donor network or corporations. We just want to mobilize our grassroots supporters and ask for the average donation: $23.97.

Friend, will you contribute our campaign’s average donation of $23.97 so we can continue sustaining this campaign and make sure we’re in a great position to re-elect Jocelyn in November?

Donate>> [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=022422&amount=23.97

Appreciate your support!
Emily

subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW0dFTzHNG

While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who
slew the giant, they likely don't know his full story-especially
the tragedies that

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW0dFTzHNG

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

While
many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew
the giant, they likely don't know his full story-especially the
tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to
repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about
fathers and sons.

King
David's momentous story provides profound insights into many of
life's most important questions, including: What are my
responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I
lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way
to lead others?

Taught by
Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, "The David
Story: Shepherd, Father, King" examines the Old Testament books
of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores
David's character and the consequences of his choices on his
family and the people of Israel.

This is
why we've produced our online course, "The David Story: Shepherd,
Father, King," which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve
your copy using this secure link:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd

By
viewing the course, you'll learn more about the nature of God,
family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you'll learn
more about what truly matters in life.

I hope
you'll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with
your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or
homeschool curriculum.

Let's
learn what truly matters in life by studying "The David Story."

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

P.S. If
you'd like to secure a DVD box set of "The David Story" while
they're available, you can have one shipped directly to your home
for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching
millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve
your DVD box set using the secure link below:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW0dFTzHNG

name: Peter Franchot
subject: We Stand With Ukraine
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
The free world stands in solidarity with Ukraine.
Putin’s military aggression represents the largest threat to peace in Europe since WW2. [https://www.baltimoresun.com/news/nation-world/ct-aud-nw-russia-attacks-ukraine-20220224-vjsucwaogfhepkhjrlptujd5qa-story.html] The United States and our allies must respond with costly economic sanctions to hold Putin accountable, and we must do everything we can to help Ukrainian civilians fleeing the conflict, and help Ukraine stand up to Putin.
To Maryland’s Ukrainian-American community, my heart is with you. I am praying for the people of Ukraine as they fight for their freedom, their democracy, and their future.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/AdobeStock_62197495.jpeg]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Rand Paul
subject: it’s hard to be right again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
we are surrounded by tyrants. Leaders all over the world are using "emergency powers" to stifle freedom and crush dissent. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9516%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=rQepJydGbDiQKhZjNkBAgw&sysid=1)
**ANNOUNCEMENT: END-OF-MONTH MONEYBOMB $50,000 ** **_**ALL DONATIONS BEFORE BY 11:59PM ON FEB 28TH WILL BE DOUBLE MATCHED**_** **[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14028%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xcZHLjDUjbS2svYYRX0QTg&sysid=1)** __ | |
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14029%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7KYZz%2fWfrCntdFMBKxzYaA&sysid=1)
|
---
Friend, we are surrounded by tyrants.

Leaders all over the world are using "emergency powers" to stifle freedom and crush dissent.

We see it in our own country with Joe Biden and unelected bureaucrats calling the shots, demanding medical treatments to participate in society, and keeping us masked despite THE SCIENCE. Now, the same thing is happening in Canada. Justin Trudeau’s “emergency powers'' are freezing bank accounts, firing truckers, and eliminating freedom. _It’s probably giving our own tyrannical leaders an idea or two!_

There’s no way we can allow this abuse of power to continue. We WILL STAND UP. And I want to send that message to Washington. _T_ _hat’s why I had my team set up a huge end-of-month MONEYBOMB to help prove the momentum is on my side and freedom will prevail. _

Will you help me reach it by chipping in now?
__
[**END-OF-MONTH MONEYBOMB: $100**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14020%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EzrnA1Pt74ynrJydoVIA%2fA&sysid=1)
[**END-OF-MONTH MONEYBOMB: $75**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14021%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W4Dxq6sS20eQEURktKb2Iw&sysid=1)
[**END-OF-MONTH MONEYBOMB: $50**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14022%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bJ6fnCXmnT4iHVa3qGMomg&sysid=1)
[**END-OF-MONTH MONEYBOMB: $25**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14023%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=E9Vs7yMI7e6D9V8q6lLNUQ&sysid=1)
Friend, you know me. And you know exactly how hard I’ll fight to expose the power-hungry leftists for what they really are.

**And the freedom-fighters who are with me have agreed to DOUBLE MATCH every donation given before our deadline to help us succeed.**[**DONATE NOW: 2X MATCH >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14024%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g6rGBcC7ApQdBZtp6f8G3A&sysid=1)

_We’ve seen the progress already. We’ve seen people rise to defend freedom. COVID regulations are expiring everywhere because of it._ But we can’t afford to slow down now.

**Please, chip in what you can before the deadline:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3769557/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c14035%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ol54f3DoAsu2jHceZO1tDw&sysid=1)**

In liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: the cost of war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42186279/331988509/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWU3YTNmNC05ZDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMwOZILrDJWpbUBCr9V1nDu9U2ND1zQS7f3gtFdSWvQ=&emci=739b1e1b-9d95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8ae7a3f4-9d95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Russia has invaded the sovereign nation of Ukraine.
It is time now for the United States, along with our allies and other like-minded nations, to stand firm with the people of Ukraine against this unprovoked and unjustified act of war. We must employ the harshest economic sanctions, diplomatic isolation, and punitive measures available.
On my family’s farm in rural northwest Iowa, sometimes a banty rooster would become overly aggressive. We'd soon have him in a soup. Putin reminds me of that rooster.
We have not seen war of this nature in Eurasia since the 1940’s. America must once again be united against this kind of authoritarianism.
Unfortunately, we are still waiting for the GOP to state which side they are on – with a dictator in Moscow or democracy in Kyiv. I wonder, will my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley once again parrot Trump or is he smarter than that?
Maybe this is the moment where Republicans will finally break with Trump and Fox News. I am not holding my breath.
With nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy, I know the cost of war. We must do everything we can to achieve peace, but let’s not encourage despots, either.
Please keep the people of Ukraine in your thoughts.
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

VICE ADMIRAL FRANKEN (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.
clean_body: Hello, Russia has invaded the sovereign nation of Ukraine. It is time now for the United States, along with our allies and other like-minded nations, to stand firm with the people of Ukraine against this unprovoked and unjustified act of war. We must employ the harshest economic sanctions, diplomatic isolation, and punitive measures available. On my family’s farm in rural northwest Iowa, sometimes a banty rooster would become overly aggressive. We'd soon have him in a soup. Putin reminds me of that rooster. We have not seen war of this nature in Eurasia since the 1940’s. America must once again be united against this kind of authoritarianism. Unfortunately, we are still waiting for the GOP to state which side they are on – with a dictator in Moscow or democracy in Kyiv. I wonder, will my opponent Senator Chuck Grassley once again parrot Trump or is he smarter than that? Maybe this is the moment where Republicans will finally break with Trump and Fox News. I am not holding my breath. With nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy, I know the cost of war. We must do everything we can to achieve peace, but let’s not encourage despots, either. Please keep the people of Ukraine in your thoughts. Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: Erik Aadland statement on Ukraine
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CEVgfpN8Zj5CxVsDtqJlD1Poj7eRzO8xKMTbU5g-Ul1ic9uZ-qeKyczv2plo56dafwpHxD_fw4bpSOC5PUyHVggbhfsBGLCZwwETb0EeJ18mDiLbG9YW1MHmKKGPquZcj1HLI6SpqETODHls9VTIvwnHVd25vSEP&c=MXT_OIDLYz04Ry8QG56Oj_EhnPT1r7QtkRUtcp-4-GZJVnRo5g86Zw==&ch=Q6h8ap81K4ZyC3WxxebyJCgCDmYU8f8jr7-_vzn6hQBLnYWKj7wY9w==)
---
|
---
| Statement on Ukraine
---
| |
---|---
|
As a combat veteran, I have seen the horrors of war firsthand, and they are not to be taken lightly. What we are currently seeing in Ukraine right now does not justify a full-scale war with Russia. No intelligence indicates this is anything more than a military skirmish. Those who have never served in war should be very cautious about advocating for military action. This is nothing more than 'wag the dog,' and could have easily been avoided through better leadership.

First, we need to exhaust all diplomatic solutions and economic sanctions. We must also be clear on the U.S. interests in Ukraine that would cause us to get more deeply involved. Additionally, we have to be ready for war by turning on the Keystone pipeline and becoming energy independent once again. Then, and only then, when our country is secure with energy and our military is prepared, and we have determined that U.S. interests would best be served, should we have further involvement.
What are we trying to achieve in Ukraine and how are U.S. interests best served? Those are the questions that must be answered before American lives are put on the line.
---
| |
---

What we are currently seeing in Ukraine right now does not justify a full-scale war with Russia. No intelligence indicates this is anything more than a military skirmish. Those who have never served in war should be very cautious about advocating for military action. This is nothing more than 'wag the dog,' and could have easily been avoided through better leadership. First, we need to exhaust all diplomatic solutions and economic sanctions. We must also be clear on the U.S. interests in Ukraine that would cause us to get more deeply involved. Additionally, we have to be ready for war by turning on the Keystone pipeline and becoming energy independent once again. Then, and only then, when our country is secure with energy and our military is prepared, and we have determined that U.S. interests would best be served, should we have further involvement. What are we trying to achieve in Ukraine and how are U.S. interests best served? Those are the questions that must be answered before American lives are put on the line. | | | | == | | | Stand with Erik Today | Stand with me today by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. Donate today | == You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker about your concerns with government. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | == | Together we can stand against bad policy and for our future. | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, CO 80163 (720) 464 4488 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

name: Pro Life Update
subject: They’re “canceling” patriotism
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hill
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlobr35vovl92csrapacffgmd2h5rjob5n24qvjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf0ornm1gm4pthmjhm6slje9jr8d32e9hn6p3j6dr6edjmeeqn1p71mgor8ctjmurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9ddl6upb2pjksapm4ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk1ka3tgvhaomolicvhf68mmja59c2hbffj5mqvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c5h2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2vef06n0rilsb68l8kb6jmfrv3g4e13rk2ccm1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c5h2bs)** Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty.** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away.** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will...**
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I _mprimis_ ...for life).
* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.
* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”
* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support.** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5ier8oqj2sm7s4g6etnec8m80puf9inr1enimho_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c5h2bs)** After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost.** Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA

clean_body: I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hill This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include George Washington and Thomas Jefferson ... Abraham Lincoln and Frederick Douglass ... Winston Churchill , Margaret Thatcher , and Ronald Reagan. All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus —one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty—especially right now, a critical time for our country. Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a biased and distorted view of American history. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery—and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K–12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted—out of ignorance—to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past—many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. With the support of citizens like you—citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty—we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth. It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as The New York Times ’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is reaching and teaching millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. Your generous support today will... Expand the circulation of Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I mprimis ...for life). Send millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution. Increase the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.” Launch and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens. One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding—even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support. Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below: After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty—no matter the cost. Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Brett Guillory for Texas
subject: Reminder: Oh, Canada!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas
body:
And Why Elections Matter
| | | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001brVxF2QmY66N4hsD7gLPbP8gLVE7Se_7bGAlSfb9cPq7M0228YOVKk1Kmt4-82TkYj04aRhf1jaD2HdLdNWy5QBfldQSxLOMhIEzaKQdZ2qyNTe3zmYjFJN4RyI0aXruZns-adDX8lLEd2bhZ18yAFM8461qL3nRMHwSyApdJQ0=&c=TcXXY6YkIkHZVYPFkwTFGUHP_NFJL80uaGOnXzzgCxgRcPG87vR-2w==&ch=OAyLjtl3iJcgqkuo7zpFrilR46lHZlnuzxO1sCsOfkKr8KVeezeb_g==)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Neighbor,
Over the past month, all eyes have been on Canada. Thousands of citizens have taken a courageous stand for their own freedom and for the freedom of future generations. At great personal cost, these patriotic citizens of all colors and creeds have - lawfully - protested their government and its tyrannical mandates. They have truly been an inspiration to all of us who love liberty and strive to keep our own homeland free.
We've also seen how quickly a Western, democratic country can slip from being one of freedom, with its own constitution, to one of dictatorship and tyranny.
Justin Trudeau IS a tyrant.
He is a global elitist drunk on power and is wielding that power as a sledgehammer to crush his own people. Just in the past few days, we've watched as Canadians have had their financial accounts frozen and suspended, had their children removed from them, and then been assaulted and even trampled by Trudeau's thugs. It's been both horrifying and despicable.
So, why am I harping on Canada during the last week of early voting? Afterall, we live in Texas, USA.
Well, it's simple.
Elections Matter.
Who we elect and their willingness to address and call out tyranny and corruption determines how long we as Americans will continue to enjoy our own freedoms and individual rights.
To all who say, "Well, what's happening in Canada would never happen here," take note. It can always "happen here," and whether it does or not is determined by those whom we elect to office. To those who might think our Constitution will always protect us from becoming like Canada, consider the many ways in which our Constitution and our rights have been trampled since the 2020 election.
* Mike Lindell, prominent businessman and American citizen, has been de-banked for wrong groupthink. The silence from many of our leaders regarding this outrage is deafening.
* The January 6 prisoners have been jailed, some in solitary confinement, for over a year without formally being charged. They are political prisoners being denied their constitutional rights, yet so few are willing to speak out on their behalf because of "bad optics."
* Hundreds have had their 1st Amendment rights infringed through censorship and de-platforming.
* Children have and are still being forced to mask in schools.
* American citizens have had to take a vaccine they don't need or want or otherwise lose their jobs.
* In New York and Virginia, citizens were denied organ transplants because they were unvaccinated.
* On Friday, nineteen - Republican \- senators voted FOR continued funding of Biden's tyrannical vaccine mandates. Four other Republican senators didn't even think this issue was worth their time to show up to vote.

Think how different each of these situations would be if we had leaders who truly stood for freedom and for the people they represent. How different would things be if they had the courage to do what is right?
Yes, elections matter.
We need to elect the bold and courageous who aren't afraid to stand up and call out tyranny by its name. We need to elect those that have the courage of the truckers, who will stand toe-to-toe with tyranny itself and not back down. We need leaders who will find the time to show up to vote on major issues that have severe impact on our lives.
How many of your current leaders have you seen publicly and passionately denounce Trudeau and what he is doing to his citizens? (Our president definitely hasn't.) How many of the current candidates have used their platforms to also denounce Trudeau and then loudly proclaim that they stand with the Freedom Convoy and the patriotic, freedom loving citizens of Canada? Tweeting empty, feel-good platitudes of "thank goodness for our Founding Fathers and our Constitution" won't cut it. That only demonstrates either a complete disconnect from reality, ignorance of what we are facing in this country, or a willful decision to not "say too much" because of the blowback it might bring.
Friend, the line between freedom and tyranny is a fine one. We are always just one election away from remaining a free country to becoming that which we despise.
---
I began this campaign with a commitment to fight against all government overreach and protect our freedom, liberty, and our American way of life. Throughout the campaign, I have called out overreach and corruption as it has taken place, and have stood with doctors, parents, and children who have faced censorship, mandates, and more. My resolve to do continue to do so has never been more firm.
We do not live in nice times, but you have my promise to never be complacent and to always guard and protect your rights and liberties. I will always fight for you and will work to ensure that your children, grandchildren, and all future generations grow up in the free America that we have been blessed to know and love.
---
---
| |
---

name: Stop Stacey, Inc.
subject: Mask chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stop Stacey, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S2uWuv5ll_Wlj-sohQjwZDKFcNxZ_wUJk8_igqb_OtzIBcfevdegRcsX0APATNxF4YKQYdJdr0zsK_Z-cesiCuOEajpwDi6cCNYutiDWvhH_Lk5W3v6lH4SMDt8snRS5qbKpVo0u3nhS2BhPcF756yJMNwwrvqiRDgN3Sbhz2bvogxerq0-A4g==&c=yf2KR0lfEJPdAaik3tIjFRzYuUKQQdOJTCEXmnSAHQIo-kNsNOSEyA==&ch=j0QnQcUI6gKWUe5Hy-eIk_v8HCS_hTD6P7F1LoR43lH1G3VpthCsrg==)
---
| Peter,
Have you read the latest?
Business Insider: Democrats are in mask messaging chaos as Republicans gleefully shame AOC and Stacey Abrams for going without face-coverings
Yep! Radical Democrats like Stacey Abrams spent months offering their full throated endorsement of mask and vaccine mandates...
And then were caught not following the rules they helped put into place.
How does the old adage go?
"Rules for thee and not for me!"
Well, thanks to our hardworking - and incredibly generous - grassroots team at Stop Stacey, we have taken the now infamous photo of maskless Stacey Abrams posing amongst a room full of masked students and sent it to a few hundred thousand of our closest conservative friends in Georgia to truly showcase Stacey's hypcrisy.
As expected, the feedback was incredibly positive...and folks are joining our fight to Stop Stacey and Save America!
At the end of this week, we are going to send out another round of text messages to targeted voters but need your help to fund it.
[Think you can chip in $15, $100, or even $300 before Friday at Noon?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001S2uWuv5ll_Wlj-sohQjwZDKFcNxZ_wUJk8_igqb_OtzIBcfevdegRcsX0APATNxF4YKQYdJdr0zsK_Z-cesiCuOEajpwDi6cCNYutiDWvhH_Lk5W3v6lH4SMDt8snRS5qbKpVo0u3nhS2BhPcF756yJMNwwrvqiRDgN3Sbhz2bvogxerq0-A4g==&c=yf2KR0lfEJPdAaik3tIjFRzYuUKQQdOJTCEXmnSAHQIo-kNsNOSEyA==&ch=j0QnQcUI6gKWUe5Hy-eIk_v8HCS_hTD6P7F1LoR43lH1G3VpthCsrg==)
We know Biden inflation is impacting families and businesses across America but can you imagine the pain we will feel in the pocketbook if Stacey Abrams is elected Governor...or President? Brace yourselves for tax hikes, job-killing regulations, and government mandates that will undermine your freedom and way of life.
