name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
March 2nd we’re hitting the road.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zju857ua8kfddvu7ndo5um4ohrq9odj4ga6ti5u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmmqp79oj7mcpr8t1j6ipjepdks6p7adbleaomap1l64rr0pbhcphn9cdjmpge1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4db665ob6p77mapmcdj0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk9lqccjslv2o7tsgi7qfk50jde7gdbip3oktbso_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | | Friend,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!** **_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmr4q4ko6u4jdgqlmt6mbkkqap3kamvjcjrhhfdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h2bs)_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1p9ls4vkbhe2ijg1slqcgelv048k2bkgpg4l5r8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h2bs)_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf99hse0l8cd9j08ohkutgoj90gkuf8n0rdkk18g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h2bs)_**
**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z05k1p6unibo4q94p455k5pdp5jvulp4ohmh5pu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h2bs)_**
**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjra7jmg8ins5b7dfgo5fn5qfqj0sofplmcabr08_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h2bs)_**
**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zki4cs474bhkh4o3msbbt7o094tdn7okq553b230_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h2bs)_**
**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfu16hmmd4ukt21im7i1htdkfekttj0lqhrbihj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h2bs)
[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z47nhsu6hg8seckbsar003rtd0evs2aq3ed4biao_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h2bs)_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlbqod9f9oo60g9fp9so14gtu98tbljvor63nb0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5cth69oj6c3h2bs)_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

subject: Exciting Opportunities to join Team Perez/Sneed in Montgomery County this weekend!
body:
Join Shannon and me this weekend!
#

Dear Peter,
We’re just four months out from the Democratic Primary on June 28th, and things are heating up on the campaign trail. Thanks to your incredible support, our grassroots movement continues to build incredible momentum. **But we need your help to keep it going!**
With that in mind, I wanted to reach out with some exciting, no-cost opportunities to engage with Team Tom in Montgomery County this weekend! You can find more details and RSVP information below.
**[Meet Shannon Sneed, Maryland’s next Lieutenant Governor!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42187775/331995602/1671275422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTY1NmY3Mi1hNDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mlr_Y2LrtR_RsDuumUK2vr9R0WZeThNZucD86y8Cxbo=&emci=e28abace-9b95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7a656f72-a495-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**

**Join Team Perez/Sneed for an afternoon of door knocking!**

Veterans Plaza | 1 Veterans Pl, Silver Spring, MD 20910

**[Toast with Tom and Shannon at Denizens Brewing!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42187779/331995609/-1141426065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTY1NmY3Mi1hNDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mlr_Y2LrtR_RsDuumUK2vr9R0WZeThNZucD86y8Cxbo=&emci=e28abace-9b95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7a656f72-a495-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
Sunday, February 27th | 4:00 PM ET
Denizens Brewing Co. | 1115 E W Hwy. Silver Spring, MD 20910
**[RSVP HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42187781/331995611/-1141426065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTY1NmY3Mi1hNDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mlr_Y2LrtR_RsDuumUK2vr9R0WZeThNZucD86y8Cxbo=&emci=e28abace-9b95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7a656f72-a495-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**

| Fellow Conservative, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

Well, Peter, The Establishment is at it again.

Failed presidential nominee and head of the squishy Establishment, Mitt Romney, is now hosting a high-dollar fundraiser in Liz Cheney’s backyard in Northern Virginia.

Our campaign is so powerful in dethroning Cheney, that she had to call in every favor she could. She may have Coastal Elitists, but it doesn’t matter because we have YOU on Team Hageman!

We have LESS THAN ONE MONTH until the fundraiser takes place and we need to show our strength! Our fundraising team has set a goal of $72,300 to be raised by March 14.

Our campaign is so powerful in dethroning Cheney, that she had to call in every favor she could. She may have Coastal Elitists, but it doesn’t matter because we have YOU on Team Hageman! We have LESS THAN ONE MONTH until the fundraiser takes place and we need to show our strength! Our fundraising team has set a goal of $72,300 to be raised by March 14. If we have EVERY supporter STEP UP and make a contribution of $20.22 to represent the year we de-throne Cheney, we will easily beat our fundraising goal. No longer should we be beholden to the representatives that only care about themselves and advancing an agenda for them. Harriet has been fighting for the people of the great State of Wyoming as we’ve been under assault from Washington, D.C., and career politicians. For the last 20 years, she has been fighting back against Federal agencies that try to usurp our rights with overbearing regulations. She has never allowed her Conservative values to be shaken in the face of Left-Wing ideologues. Thanks, Team Hageman | | | |

name: Great America Update
subject: A work of unsurpassed beauty
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6719%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=1beq5mxA8VU2%2fFQbRmGPcg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69195%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AMNOhL6s2f0cRfRwGDGcBg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69196%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x9S6TldDdY%2fZzfYBjNa7Cg&sysid=1)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69197%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qcS0wBVkHL3KrFTf2dLx0g&sysid=1)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69196%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x9S6TldDdY%2fZzfYBjNa7Cg&sysid=1)**
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6719%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=1beq5mxA8VU2%2fFQbRmGPcg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6719%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=1beq5mxA8VU2%2fFQbRmGPcg&sysid=1)

I’m writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America’s truckers are fed up wi

| | |
Friend,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv5r6gtolii8rvu49s7ntg1ee26euknlul883bog_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj68o34cjh2bs "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb192i5gk1726ruq6nmuc95skeucu0rc9gmo4rko_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj68o34cjh2bs "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvp39sdah7a7b5nofadieec1rfdh7eie3mf4l6b0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj68o34cjh2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**

**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpag1giqrgoj9tv6b3r9d5fco5o7m7svbo39e8mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj68o34cjh2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**

**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5v2t5mt1kqv3f3o4q7dm32chp1cbtom48b47om8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj68o34cjh2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**

**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3hia5qvc0qhaa8vqod1i0rbikj23vc16u55spfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj68o34cjh2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**

**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdfiiglgd180ku8vaghb86fd3o1jg6f13jb226v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj68o34cjh2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")

[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcvs4ph31sta37nuiu4sl0mc84sihpr5rf062tf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj68o34cjh2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5o3tedcgq7b78e11kjkatcu7mp240lkdade25mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj68o34cjh2bs "So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.")_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

| Peter,

Yesterday, Pennsylvania released new congressional district maps based on the latest census, and it confirmed what we feared. **I won’t sugarcoat it: we are in real trouble.**

Republicans have made it clear that I am a top target in the midterm elections. I am on the National Republican Campaign Committee’s “offensive target” list, Republican groups are spending big on attack ads against me, and I already have three far-right Republican opponents.

| | | Dear Fellow Republicans:

Hello again! Yesterday I shared PART ONE of my Day One Plan and I am thrilled with the feedback we’ve been receiving. These plans are not only the right things to do – but they’re also what Minnesota voters are demanding.

My Day One Plan will help our party win on Election Day and be prepared to govern. I can’t wait to hear what you think about the rest of it!
**Today I’m announcing PART TWO of my Day One Plan:**

Our Law Enforcement Deserve Better... What you _might not know_ is that our core mission at _An America United_ is to support common sense solutions like investing more in our men and women in blue from coast to coast. We've seen success in states like Minnesota, which is the epicenter of the "defund the police" movement, but we broke through the noise. Governor Larry Hogan has been a leading champion for law enforcement, re-funding Maryland first responders with $500 million in new resources, continuing to be an example of what is needed across America. [**Right now, we are $5,301 short of our February fundraising goal.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=df2c7486cef44c77b93fe7dc0fc00bc3&_e=rzh_jH47xMFCsGc148HoX5zi66kofQzwhSKWaA7qPJeTY-0oyklxfA_nadesIQXA2hNBeZ-OZF4wNdgGA2DyOMSy6iA4bHV0j63uU_jCXc6vpZj3mVs7KjBnUu3knK5hwSWNlw90BKe2QWB8SW2mmA7gyG2eZQA1Yq1lGphr-h7z_pAgvAMWNEzo2mUSQFtlAAD_MKttDrBaKDr9dMe3WBkxZnYBKSf6_rUDw18DGW22ihJml8zPzhSZBFb376BFVu0dKda-YskjBYJNxo1VsxmDNDnu1i2yEGB6y-9xQv2biXvWHOihM_x5F3W7IttiyKq85rpKqQGdu2ClgxmThA%3D%3D) If we fall short this month, we won't have the proper funding for our important digital outreach & advocacy programs. If you are with us in our mission to support law enforcement in communities across America, [**please make a contribution from $5 to $50, $500 or maybe more to help close our February gap clean_body: Our Law Enforcement Deserve Better... Hey team, Our fight to defend and refund the police continues... What you might not know is that our core mission at An America United is to support common sense solutions like investing more in our men and women in blue from coast to coast. We've seen success in states like Minnesota, which is the epicenter of the "defund the police" movement, but we broke through the noise. Governor Larry Hogan has been a leading champion for law enforcement, re-funding Maryland first responders with $500 million in new resources, continuing to be an example of what is needed across America. If we fall short this month, we won't have the proper funding for our important digital outreach & advocacy programs. If you are with us in our mission to support law enforcement in communities across America, Just like Governor Hogan has done in Maryland, AAU is doing much more than paying lip service to our commitment to our heroes. We are taking action, pushing lawmakers and policymakers to equip law enforcement with the tools they need to effectively get their job done. , resisting radical calls to defund the police and making our communities safer. Thank you, An America United Join An America United on social media! | | | ---|--- | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. |

subject: And now.....War
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a56ae3ef7f00/conforti-for-congress-6793809?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

As of this morning, Russia has officially invaded Ukraine.

NATO has called it a 'brutal act of war'. 150,000 Russian troops have entered the heart of Ukraine. Major cities, including the capital of Kyiv, have been bombed. According to NDTV, over 70 military targets have been destroyed. Citizens are scrambling to gather belongs and cash and get to the western portion of the country. Putin's aim is to restore the country to the cold war era's land mass by retaking countries that were formed by the collapse of the Soviet Union in 1991.

It has only been a year, and this Administration has sunk America's stance on the world stage to the point of Putin seizing the opportunity to invade. We are in dangerous times!!

When I am in Congress, I will work to restore America's strength and protect our interests and those of the American people.

If you want your US Congressional Representative to fight for you and your rights, vote Conforti for Congress 2022!
Please consider donating to the Conforti for Congress campaign. [Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=9d3b5c3dd5&e=25f4fa3311)
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=b4b15318a9&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=9e8ed3f48c&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=5725585cce&e=25f4fa3311)!

| Free Beacon: 84 Percent of Warnock's Large Donations Came From Outside of Georgia
Alana Goodman • February 8, 2022
The vast majority of Georgia Democratic senator Raphael Warnock's record-setting fundraising haul came from outside of Georgia, according to campaign finance records.
Warnock received 84 percent of his itemized individual donations from out-of-state supporters and 16 percent from Georgia residents in the final three months of 2021. Itemized donations refer to contributions of more than $200, for which campaigns are required to disclose the addresses of individual donors...
"The fact that only 16 percent of Warnock's financial support came from inside the state is the clearest sign yet that Georgians can't afford another six years of Raphael Warnock--literally," said Stephen Lawson, a spokesman for 34N22, a super PAC that is backing his Republican opponent, Herschel Walker.
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ktyC99pYQVVYFIH7jeILEzLAFZFfbFa3oTCUdvxl-zxh-e8Xe9sFM5_ccMkDjPjrhZ5ZLH3MRC8pSocjbuSY7pQGJkcF9_dmxd9V-7IMWSCFuROiKbkg_X6OPKtI3WWcJqFByJAkhcePTiVFuLTewa6AViNZjXiRKSxVcgZpymVBHO1TyGvP-eY2ZPvgdVuxEP9nieQpnclb35oiSx6daZ6xiqLsSPTnebS-3OFlkienVQe0WIz0ozuVDxoHZ6W_&c=29Yd3fI-kkneduOelrV_SoImGhgDapFmkyRyiUexL2Sq8Qwpkw6Nrg==&ch=678H24r3DKOrm6AJ57gEDCxqhj5yGpVyvkj-2PD5l2OIrejgRjJRUQ==) to read the full article.

| Fox Business: Pro-Herschel Walker PAC hits Warnock over gas prices, inflation in billboard ads
Tyler Olson • January 18, 2022
FIRST ON FOX: A super PAC supporting Georgia GOP Senate candidate Herschel Walker is spending more than $50,000 on a billboard campaign attacking Sen. Raphael Warnock over inflation and gas prices as the midterms loom later this year.
The PAC, called 34N22, after Walker's number 34 from his playing days at the University of Georgia and in the NFL, says the billboards will appear in the major cities of Atlanta, Augusta, Macon and Savannah.
The two economically-focused billboards say "Inflation hurts families" and "Gas prices are insane." Each includes the hashtag "#WarnockIsn'tWorking."
A third billboard hits Warnock on law and order, saying, "Crime is killing Atlanta."
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ktyC99pYQVVYFIH7jeILEzLAFZFfbFa3oTCUdvxl-zxh-e8Xe9sFM5_ccMkDjPjr2TVzIhwPgbaUGHgZhCyBqMLg1xKtXQWDhPt_tfqmEsgZdxdaNGx5fqEX4UPa231oWRUrmjDDbn30EWjJPJWC4-BdxVUcpPtD4tHsrRtqtfzt_9lAKWS2ycG8pooxX_orQLJu5As3K5vpqPCof5G_tpTxXmA4i-F2wasnAmRcjLWksptazIS6ZaDdUP2VNAGi&c=29Yd3fI-kkneduOelrV_SoImGhgDapFmkyRyiUexL2Sq8Qwpkw6Nrg==&ch=678H24r3DKOrm6AJ57gEDCxqhj5yGpVyvkj-2PD5l2OIrejgRjJRUQ==) to read the full article, and see the below examples of 34N22's billboards going up around Georgia!

name: Rick Scott
subject: Do you back the blue?
body:
Peter,
Democrats have _thrown out_ the rule of law and picked criminals over law abiding citizens.

It’s time for us to _take back our streets_ , _clean up our cities_ , and **stop pretending that crime is okay.**

We need to have _zero tolerance_ for “protests” that attack our police officers and light our neighborhoods ablaze.

**Together, we can back the blue - but I need your help.**

**I put together an 11-point plan to “Rescue America,” and a _critical_ part of our mission is attacking crime and re-funding the police. **

My team put together a survey to find out if YOU back the blue, and we need every patriot to give their input.

[**Please take our “Back the Blue” survey TODAY and let us know if YOU support our police officers. name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
March 2nd we’re hitting the road.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6nm407t7ii151juvepbbolijgl7tsfd0ia4aqrg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uspb7cj5chq34dtlmph7ec9j6lpbepj4s8qj2orhmpgj9cb16ji34d376th7atpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlciqrac3im9j3cp5jc1jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cljmcoj0shg649fg)
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo17fpar5241bocon4h5lh1rfr882k4alth3ut2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj64o74c1h2bs)
---
| | |
Friend,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrdp95ufh4jan9pmdegl8n74tam7sbdoat6iucug_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj64o74c1h2bs "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsl95ts2fu4l1i0d573bfv6ifes1n599qhajlqt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj64o74c1h2bs "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjs8p86a8i6v2od4jpi5gpei3k51hlt0h9qfgiqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj64o74c1h2bs "$15 = 10 Miles")_**

**_[$30 = 20 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5tfu76b6b4aoslk912kc1ec8ercr1a3msmhrgeg_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj64o74c1h2bs "$30 = 20 Miles")_**

**_[$150 = 100 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs4dvv3upe090f8gu8eapgb0hems5vdi49dr4h68_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj64o74c1h2bs "$150 = 100 Miles")_**

**_[$375 = 250 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0l8asid0feugk7ujb8aou52f3k28djmu4rr0kf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj64o74c1h2bs "$375 = 250 Miles")_**

**_[$750 = 500 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9fbfhbqpkoigm0nj9knki26jc35umt8ocvkatt0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj64o74c1h2bs "$750 = 500 Miles")

[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znfps304k05od0bk3el25npgk8r0v399hk7broi8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj64o74c1h2bs "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you'll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf3ogpp152uhtle5purjckacigkav44t5ll01uho_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctj64o74c1h2bs "So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.")_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

| | Team, I wanted to make sure you heard about our latest news from the campaign trail: **I’m honored to have the endorsement from twenty racial justice leaders across the Commonwealth.
**
I’m proud to have the support of these elected officials, community leaders, activists, and organizational leaders who are all on the frontlines of the fight for racial equity. We have so much work to do to move the dial on racial justice in Massachusetts. We need to close the racial wealth divide, invest in our students of color, provide paths to homeownership, follow through on implementing our criminal legal reforms, and ensure that leaders of color are included at every decision making table. I’m grateful to have these champions in that fight with me.

I’ve spent my career fighting for racial justice on Beacon Hill alongside activists and community leaders, even when it wasn’t politically convenient. And I’ll continue championing this fight once elected Governor.

[_**Will you chip in $15 now to our grassroots campaign and say we’re ready for racial justice in Massachusetts now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42189545/332006743/-1275523729?refcode=em_20220224_f_s_update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWI1NGExYi1iMDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RmYWEQNAmzHWHddgwH11EQDbV_nRhoup0ocWj4A9KKA=)

Thanks for being in this movement with me. Saludos,

Sonia

I’m proud to have the support of these elected officials, community leaders, activists, and organizational leaders who are all on the frontlines of the fight for racial equity. We have so much work to do to move the dial on racial justice in Massachusetts. We need to close the racial wealth divide, invest in our students of color, provide paths to homeownership, follow through on implementing our criminal legal reforms, and ensure that leaders of color are included at every decision making table. I’m grateful to have these champions in that fight with me. I’ve spent my career fighting for racial justice on Beacon Hill alongside activists and community leaders, even when it wasn’t politically convenient. And I’ll continue championing this fight once elected Governor. = Thanks for being in this movement with me. name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: Volunteers needed this weekend!
body:
Booth at Outdoorama in Novi

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb24_27volunteer&n=1)
---
Friend -- Ralph Rebandt for Governor will have a booth at Outdoorama, a show that celebrates Michigan's great outdoors, in Novi this weekend. This is another great opportunity for us to get the signatures needed to get Ralph on the ballot! The show hours are Thursday and Friday 2-9:30, Saturday 10-9, and Sunday 10-5. If you have a few free hours this weekend and would be willing to help at the booth please email Adam at adam@ralphrebandtforgovernor.com. Thank you for your prayers and support! Ralph Rebandt For Governor
[http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb24_27volunteer&n=2)

name: Data and Communication Manager
subject: John Selker’s Forest Policy Conversation is Tuesday, March 1st at 7pm!
body:
John Selker of Corvallis is running to represent the people of Oregon District 4 in the US Congress since Peter DeFazio announced his plans to retire. John is an entrepreneur, OSU Distinguished Professor, woodworker and problem solver. He is hosting a weekly series of Policy Conversations on Zoom to learn more about what is important to the people of our large and diverse district, and to help people understand John’s position on key issues.

**On Tuesday Mar. 1st at 7 pm** on Zoom, John Selker is hosting the fourth in a series of Policy Conversations, this time focused on **Forest, Wildlife and Natural Resources Policy in Oregon. **
****

**Brenda McComb, retired OSU Vice Provost for Academic Affairs at Oregon State University and Professor Emerita in the OSU Department of Forest Ecosystems and Society will lead the discussion.**
Brenda McComb previously served on the faculty at the University of Kentucky, University of Massachusetts Amherst, and OSU. She has independently served as a Chief of the Watershed Ecology Branch in Corvallis for the U.S. EPA.
Brenda holds a BS and MS from the University of Connecticut, and a PhD in Forestry from Louisiana State University. She continues to advise graduate students working on forest habitat selection studies, is a consultant on forest management issues, and serves on the Oregon Board of Forestry and the Oregon Watershed Enhancement Board.
[**REGISTER HERE**](https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJwqcOqvrzguH935zz75baaWO3Ys6fVtlUSa) **to receive a Zoom link and passcode to join the conversation.**

After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting.

Melanie Place
Data and Communications Manager
[communication@selker4congress.org](mailto:communication@selker4congress.org)
Cell: 541-286-0109
John Selker for Congress Campaign, Candidate 4th House Seat
[Twitter](https://twitter.com/JohnSelker)
[FB](https://www.facebook.com/groups/352472833546656)
[https://selker4congress.org](https://selker4congress.org/)
<https://www.facebook.com/john.selker/videos/253974480183077>

name: Keystone Progress
subject: Standing with Ukraine & Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

With Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, we are witness to an attack that is offensive to decency and antithetical to a stable world order.

To invade a democratically elected government and its people... to attack a country with such important resources to the world... is simply unacceptable.

While all Pennsylvanians will feel the effects of this invasion economically and the supply chain interruptions that will surely occur — there is a strong Ukrainian population in our state, and many on this email list likely have family or friends there.

While Putin’s level of unprovoked aggression hasn’t been seen since 1939, Republican leadership seems to be reluctant to criticize. Trump unsurprisingly called Putin a genius, even as innocent young men and women were being needlessly slaughtered, and civilians of all ages were dying as collateral damage.

The world needs to stand together for Ukraine’s right to exist peacefully and democratically, and ALL Americans need to put partisanship aside and come together behind President Biden, for America’s interest and that of our allies.

To do anything less is to capitulate to Russia and to put our allies, and the world, on the brink of something even more disastrous. To turn our eyes away from the Ukrainians caught in the middle is to deny their right to their own future.

We must rise, as Americans, and stand for peace and stability in the world. Tell Congress to stand with Ukrainians by clicking below.

STAND WITH UKRAINE [https://keystoneprogressaction.com/stand-with-ukraine/]

Thank you!

Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42190190/332009489/-272948131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODNjNTM2MC1iNDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k-u3vP_wOHdwJUsuT4OBhmBK9YcAle8CkaQ2N3Hu054=&emci=63dead66-a995-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f83c5360-b495-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)
---
Friends, I am closely monitoring Russia’s invasion and attack on Ukraine, and I fully support President Biden imposing devastating economic consequences. Our resolve to hold Russia accountable for its actions must be strong and united. We all must be clear that there is no “genius” in the invasion and overthrow of a democratic country, only a brutal and unjust dictatorship that must be condemned. During times like this, we may feel helpless or even hopeless. But we can come together to help those impacted by this invasion. That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your support of these two organizations:
* **Voices of Children** is dedicated to providing psychological and psychosocial support to children affected by the war in eastern Ukraine. Their mission is to leave no child alone with the trauma of war.

* **United Help Ukraine** is providing individual first aid kits and other emergency medical supplies to the front lines and working with other emergency response organizations to give humanitarian aid to civilians.

clean_body: Friends, I am closely monitoring Russia’s invasion and attack on Ukraine, and I fully support President Biden imposing devastating economic consequences. Our resolve to hold Russia accountable for its actions must be strong and united. We all must be clear that there is no “genius” in the invasion and overthrow of a democratic country, only a brutal and unjust dictatorship that must be condemned. During times like this, we may feel helpless or even hopeless. But we can come together to help those impacted by this invasion. That’s why I’m reaching out to ask for your support of these two organizations: Voices of Children is dedicated to providing psychological and psychosocial support to children affected by the war in eastern Ukraine. Their mission is to leave no child alone with the trauma of war. United Help Ukraine is providing individual first aid kits and other emergency medical supplies to the front lines and working with other emergency response organizations to give humanitarian aid to civilians. Please, if you can, donate to Voices of Children and United Help Ukraine to support Ukrainians during this time: | Thank you for taking the time to support those who need our help the most. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. | | Hey there, I wanted to make sure you saw yesterday’s exciting announcement. Our team at the Fairness Project has already helped voters in Nebraska and Colorado to curb the predatory practice of payday lending, and now we’re taking this fight to Michigan. Payday loans are exploitative — full stop. Their entire business model targets people facing financial hardship by advertising these loans as quick help for an unexpected emergency. _In reality, these loans trap some of the most financially vulnerable Americans in a vicious cycle of debt._ [_**If you’re with us in the fight to bring some financial security back to working people, will you chip in to fuel our fight today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42190701/332011778/170251215?refcode=E14171-20220224-PaydayLendingMI2-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGVhODg3ZC1iNTk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yO7xYYL7BpnQ2lvssj_Z4kkwJfhT4_WcKaf7tqiNvMA=) [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42190702/332011779/1423568755?refcode=E14171-20220224-PaydayLendingMI2-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGVhODg3ZC1iNTk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yO7xYYL7BpnQ2lvssj_Z4kkwJfhT4_WcKaf7tqiNvMA=) Thanks for your support, Kelly

name: Tim Kaine
subject: My statement on the Russian invasion of Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | After President Putin's announcement of military operations against Ukraine, and Russian missiles and artillery reportedly striking cities across the country, I wanted to be sure to share with you my brief thoughts on the situation: Putin’s decision to attack Ukraine is a desperation move. The Ukrainian people have seen up close the devastation that Russian dominance has produced in Donetsk and Luhansk. And they want none of it. The shift in Ukrainian attitude away from Russia and toward the West, even in Russian-speaking areas near the Russian border, poses a threat to Putin’s personal power and ego. The U.S. and our increasingly tight-knit European allies made every effort to use diplomacy to avert war and bloodshed. Now we will make sure that Putin, and other authoritarian leaders everywhere, know that invasion of another’s sovereignty comes with steep costs. Economic sanctions and shutting off of Russia’s Nord Stream 2 pipeline are just the beginning. I am proud that America is once again affirming the value of alliances rather than demeaning organizations like NATO. There is a global competition between democracies and authoritarian nations. We’ve sadly felt that tension within American politics. But times like this clarify the stakes for all, at home and abroad. As a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee and the Foreign Relations Committee, as well as a cosponsor of the _Defending Ukraine Sovereignty Act of 2022_ , I am committed to standing strong against Russian aggression. I'll continue to update you as the situation develops. Tim Kaine

clean_body: | | After President Putin's announcement of military operations against Ukraine, and Russian missiles and artillery reportedly striking cities across the country, I wanted to be sure to share with you my brief thoughts on the situation: Putin’s decision to attack Ukraine is a desperation move. The Ukrainian people have seen up close the devastation that Russian dominance has produced in Donetsk and Luhansk. And they want none of it. The shift in Ukrainian attitude away from Russia and toward the West, even in Russian-speaking areas near the Russian border, poses a threat to Putin’s personal power and ego. The U.S. and our increasingly tight-knit European allies made every effort to use diplomacy to avert war and bloodshed. Now we will make sure that Putin, and other authoritarian leaders everywhere, know that invasion of another’s sovereignty comes with steep costs. Economic sanctions and shutting off of Russia’s Nord Stream 2 pipeline are just the beginning. I am proud that America is once again affirming the value of alliances rather than demeaning organizations like NATO. There is a global competition between democracies and authoritarian nations. We’ve sadly felt that tension within American politics. But times like this clarify the stakes for all, at home and abroad. As a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee and the Foreign Relations Committee, as well as a cosponsor of the Defending Ukraine Sovereignty Act of 2022 , I am committed to standing strong against Russian aggression. I'll continue to update you as the situation develops. Tim Kaine Paid for by Kaine for Virginia Kaine for Virginia P.O. | Peter,
I just got off the stage at CPAC in the great state of Florida, where I was joined by thousands of fellow conservatives from across America! These freedom lovers believe in our mission, and they know what's at stake in the upcoming elections this November. As I told CPAC attendees, the corrupt and dishonest legacy media is working to divide us. They are not in the business of telling the truth. They are in the business of spinning partisan narratives.
The corporate media is defending the regime in power. And make no mistake that's going to intensify leading up to November. They're going to try to do anything they can to protect Biden and they will try to fool the American people.

name: Paxton's Patriots
subject: Joe Biden Needs to Focus On Doing His Job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 24, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 24, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** At a time when Joe Biden and his radical administration should be focused on fighting rampant inflation, the raging crisis at our border that is harming Texans, and Russian aggression, it’s telling that he’s chosen to attack Ken Paxton and our state’s authority. Ken Paxton will always defend our children.

**Link: **[https://twitter.com/KenPaxtonTX/status/1496663188380786688?s=20&t=tfj48kunYkIOd0WSvp2jeA](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=ad5cd090b91446a69024ac1a0acb424f&_e=B88chEBC-og5rrv6TP-HsPGo5JgeY8_R-LhcggYsh7yf2okw10dBbxUWnpaU37bBWruoh7e-Lktcms3pPMBzEGzNFqWMcOSQppvqlwkWKSEELTHkHOWddJdZpca1eqx8SNTrBakVD6UgQykcm5xbqmLLYu1fK0BvDdHpxTaigXspx644AS-CN37ITpyGx7dTw27H8v9oOM30fUaIrZKjTBUKIKuHu95710pGSasSKNjje0IFAvrNP6c28Ndi6POCoaLToy6H7K28ZuMrHKOT9LzVQrNdFZo6yh935t4Fsc4IgYI9M1QtDXqqxoHJzVKxptFPcJHiGXDzdYpxafwaeBqqQwsPm_jDku5KglpxV88%3D)

**Theme of the Day: Joe Biden Needs to Focus On Doing His Job**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ After Ken Paxton issued an opinion that certain child gender modification procedures such as puberty blockers and other medical procedures to change a child’s gender should be treated as abuse, Joe Biden attacked Ken Paxton for protecting our children. At a time when Joe Biden and his radical administration should be focused on fighting rampant inflation, the raging crisis at our border that is harming Texans, and Russian aggression, it’s telling that he’s chosen to attack Ken Paxton and our state’s authority. Ken Paxton will always defend our children. ~ Del Rio is now the epicenter of Joe Biden's border crisis. Last month, 30,773 people were encountered illegally crossing the border in Border Patrol's Del Rio sector, which spans 240 miles of the 2,000-mile U.S.-Mexico boundary. For each of the town of Del Rio’s 34,673 residents, one illegal immigrant was taken into custody. Ken Paxton will continue his efforts to hold Joe Biden and his administration for their radical and reckless refusal to enforce our immigration law.

~ As Joe Biden faces crisis after crisis, he's set to announce his pick for the Supreme court in the coming days. As Democrats in Washington will seek to nominate a judicial activist to support their lawless agenda, Ken Paxton knows Texans want Justices will interpret the Constitution as written and understood by the founders – not make laws from the bench.
We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=ad5cd090b91446a69024ac1a0acb424f&_e=B88chEBC-og5rrv6TP-HsH1eXcEVBKNsz0XqKiS3DdJsb8SGNgoyE9dJ6J2y7jvsbNVCTDy4maC8y-XAkXger4Cqw-122SyIEq9XzIDnr2XDSdGXWRIm_xCIx6fIK1AQSSFe-z9D-_wny4DC1SMWO7h0A_1fA8c6PLFiPuN9vgIXMZeEYnnR85RAgVtNrJiMuG4NCUE2uE9exDYGSmRp_VcOuMj2R1xV90D9ip4Les9PhpoVPybey0NzMKpRF9h0bIkfjmVTIdwN-VW6DaY8QA%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=ad5cd090b91446a69024ac1a0acb424f&_e=B88chEBC-og5rrv6TP-HsH1eXcEVBKNsz0XqKiS3DdJsb8SGNgoyE9dJ6J2y7jvsYhYRRiANyRvm4vhN0Eu7EM6NdjUPVsbn8qTmT3gttc5m0zBvqtZX8zUUb-56jxu689V4svmjKgnloS32vBlnI8csf7lBo41qxG4vp6K36hJ9nBFtAiX_DqQCNa3eteZv3Gj4Cx3noKNaQzsL-lAJZ1aqny3oowr8avPME1pD0T6LpPtl9ciu2TSip94MJKgBKn87ZhUPoI2v-hZRjitPPw%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=ad5cd090b91446a69024ac1a0acb424f&_e=B88chEBC-og5rrv6TP-HsH1eXcEVBKNsz0XqKiS3DdJsb8SGNgoyE9dJ6J2y7jvsKnR8tfhFE94xKtEaVYCBrBahAn7U-BAlH1f85QMmypISwACel3Wol8998C7ILbZZVeW26yaqjTUtLR-xgc18Rq2WFOQMnmLcE3KUuazVn01BFLTqsRmxV2IdmnbwNAaltkeoK5oFg9Lp4scsP9nkYS_99jdvGrUHIzdNNoAVxxpSIFRp2LR4HIAQaJcHZnT6oCKUERPdb7rvQ9Mj-3neDA%3D%3D)

I was joined by thousands of fellow conservatives from across America. These freedom lovers believe in our mission, and they know what’s at stake in the upcoming elections this November.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001agWx8FcrTV5-OOKodXx73VFbPO8tofqMh-AGpf9kV7u9O81AAfiqLP6tAgvB6AIsiYkJvyvSufDo1WhQ0YdwqgZm5N-fu90iBJIjN9nPbHEffCsqCBv032twbYOwdEZ9SxEvSTlhu2A-MbGAmBuLk43kBCf6BJLPXp--DrZkLnuFlUm5EDNvNoIHhPWPrp38&c=ov7PbO5vNI79-ZVt183q0Dwciy281fkf9SOxCA1uCvXwut-HznDq7A==&ch=FJ0cOtmr39zKyaie5_BkdR95n7OTygX84lFrLOCuoslieOrGgMQhBw==)

| Peter,
I just got off the stage at CPAC in the great state of Florida, where I was joined by thousands of fellow conservatives from across America! These freedom lovers believe in our mission, and they know what's at stake in the upcoming elections this November. As I told CPAC attendees, the corrupt and dishonest legacy media is working to divide us. They are not in the business of telling the truth. They are in the business of spinning partisan narratives.
The corporate media is defending the regime in power. And make no mistake that's going to intensify leading up to November. They're going to try to do anything they can to protect Biden and they will try to fool the American people.
I need your support to keep them from taking our great state and turning it into a liberal wasteland. [Rush in a contribution to help us continue the fight against the liberal machine >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001agWx8FcrTV5-OOKodXx73VFbPO8tofqMh-AGpf9kV7u9O81AAfiqLP6tAgvB6AIsiYkJvyvSufDo1WhQ0YdwqgZm5N-fu90iBJIjN9nPbHEffCsqCBv032twbYOwdEZ9SxEvSTlhu2A-MbGAmBuLk43kBCf6BJLPXp--DrZkLnuFlUm5EDNvNoIHhPWPrp38&c=ov7PbO5vNI79-ZVt183q0Dwciy281fkf9SOxCA1uCvXwut-HznDq7A==&ch=FJ0cOtmr39zKyaie5_BkdR95n7OTygX84lFrLOCuoslieOrGgMQhBw==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001agWx8FcrTV5-OOKodXx73VFbPO8tofqMh-AGpf9kV7u9O81AAfiqLP6tAgvB6AIsiYkJvyvSufDo1WhQ0YdwqgZm5N-fu90iBJIjN9nPbHEffCsqCBv032twbYOwdEZ9SxEvSTlhu2A-MbGAmBuLk43kBCf6BJLPXp--DrZkLnuFlUm5EDNvNoIHhPWPrp38&c=ov7PbO5vNI79-ZVt183q0Dwciy281fkf9SOxCA1uCvXwut-HznDq7A==&ch=FJ0cOtmr39zKyaie5_BkdR95n7OTygX84lFrLOCuoslieOrGgMQhBw==) We cannot allow socialists to destroy our economy, impose job-killing regulations, raise taxes, and continue to inflict unscientific COVID mandates on our children. We've achieved so much together, but now isn't the time to slow down or become complacent. With just a single election, Democrats will try their best to undo our accomplishments. That's why I need you to get off the sidelines and help us continue to fight back, Peter. There's too much at stake for us to slow down now. [<<< Rush in a contribution >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001agWx8FcrTV5-OOKodXx73VFbPO8tofqMh-AGpf9kV7u9O81AAfiqLP6tAgvB6AIsiYkJvyvSufDo1WhQ0YdwqgZm5N-fu90iBJIjN9nPbHEffCsqCBv032twbYOwdEZ9SxEvSTlhu2A-MbGAmBuLk43kBCf6BJLPXp--DrZkLnuFlUm5EDNvNoIHhPWPrp38&c=ov7PbO5vNI79-ZVt183q0Dwciy281fkf9SOxCA1uCvXwut-HznDq7A==&ch=FJ0cOtmr39zKyaie5_BkdR95n7OTygX84lFrLOCuoslieOrGgMQhBw==) [<<< Rush in $25 >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001agWx8FcrTV5-OOKodXx73VFbPO8tofqMh-AGpf9kV7u9O81AAfiqLP6tAgvB6AIsiYkJvyvSufDo1WhQ0YdwqgZm5N-fu90iBJIjN9nPbHEffCsqCBv032twbYOwdEZ9SxEvSTlhu2A-MbGAmBuLk43kBCf6BJLPXp--DrZkLnuFlUm5EDNvNoIHhPWPrp38&c=ov7PbO5vNI79-ZVt183q0Dwciy281fkf9SOxCA1uCvXwut-HznDq7A==&ch=FJ0cOtmr39zKyaie5_BkdR95n7OTygX84lFrLOCuoslieOrGgMQhBw==) [<<< Rush in $15 >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001agWx8FcrTV5-OOKodXx73VFbPO8tofqMh-AGpf9kV7u9O81AAfiqLP6tAgvB6AIsiYkJvyvSufDo1WhQ0YdwqgZm5N-fu90iBJIjN9nPbHEffCsqCBv032twbYOwdEZ9SxEvSTlhu2A-MbGAmBuLk43kBCf6BJLPXp--DrZkLnuFlUm5EDNvNoIHhPWPrp38&c=ov7PbO5vNI79-ZVt183q0Dwciy281fkf9SOxCA1uCvXwut-HznDq7A==&ch=FJ0cOtmr39zKyaie5_BkdR95n7OTygX84lFrLOCuoslieOrGgMQhBw==) God bless you and God bless the GREAT state of Florida!

name: Dylan Doody
subject: Where we go from redistricting
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/PniWLOJXlo5uRfpj7CjOITAB8CDjsL3oQafOC-0lGG4=/592TeTnfkQWLmQQJOoRJDHXExxlh1R4E6HaZHqdb50k=?refcode=022422)
| | Friend, The race for control of the legislature is now fully underway. Last week, a panel of judges released the new maps and kicked off 2022. **We are working hard to find candidates in these new districts and build up amazing recruits and incumbents continuing in their new districts.** I have worked in legislative politics for a long time and I have not yet seen a slate of candidates as impressive as the one we are assembling right now. I know that you probably get a lot of asks for donations, but this one is the most important and impactful, I guarantee it. Your donation today helps fund local races and sets us up for victory in the fall. _[**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PniWLOJXlo5uRfpj7CjOITAB8CDjsL3oQafOC-0lGG4=/592TeTnfkQWLmQQJOoRJDHXExxlh1R4E6HaZHqdb50k=?refcode=022422)_ **Hiring more organizers and supporting more races increases our chances of winning -- that's the impact of your donation.** There is so much on the line: reducing health care costs, pushing for reforms to ensure Minnesota has a public safety system that protects everyone, and protecting access to reproductive care. We can win. This year we have the opportunity to build and protect our House DFL Majority. Will you join us by making a contribution today? Thank you, Dylan Doody Campaign Manager Minnesota House DFL Campaign [_P.S. The Minnesota Political Contribution Refund program has been renewed for 2022. Minnesotans can make a fully refundable donation of $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year. Take advantage of it today!_](https://act.myngp.com/el/PniWLOJXlo5uRfpj7CjOITAB8CDjsL3oQafOC-0lGG4=/592TeTnfkQWLmQQJOoRJDHXExxlh1R4E6HaZHqdb50k=?refcode=022422) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PniWLOJXlo5uRfpj7CjOITAB8CDjsL3oQafOC-0lGG4=/592TeTnfkQWLmQQJOoRJDHXExxlh1R4E6HaZHqdb50k=?refcode=022422)

Peter,

Our country is in deep trouble right now.

In the last year, Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the Squad of far-left socialists in Congress have transformed America into a country we barely recognize.

* Their support for vaccine mandates is threatening to destroy the medical freedom of millions of Americans.
* Their push to teach radical ideologies like Critical Race Theory in public schools is poisoning our children’s minds.
* Their pathetic mismanagement of the Afghanistan withdrawal was a national embarrassment.
* And their reckless government spending has led to the worst inflation crisis in 40 years.

There’s only one way to stop them – TAKE BACK the House and bring their leftist agenda to a screeching halt.

Please help Jennifer win this race and reclaim our country with a generous donation of $5, (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_successful-republicans?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_susccessful-republicans_20220218&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=susccessful-republicans&utm_agency=PG&amount=5) $10, (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_successful-republicans?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_susccessful-republicans_20220218&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=susccessful-republicans&utm_agency=PG&amount=10) $25, (https://secure.winred.com/strahan-for-congress/e_successful-republicans?utm_source=E-HouseFile&utm_campaign=StrahanJ_susccessful-republicans_20220218&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=susccessful-republicans&utm_agency=PG&amount=25) or more >>

name: Team ODP
subject: Don't worry, Mike, we'll help you remember what you said about fair maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| The Republican-controlled redistricting commission failed to produce maps that reflect the political realities of our state for the third time. Mike DeWine is now in overdrive, doing as much damage control as possible. But we have the receipts to prove just how out of touch DeWine is about the redistricting process:

From October 2018...
**“The rules are pretty clear -- the voters said that the redistricting process should be done in a bipartisan way and when I am governor there will be an expectation that the new district maps honor the voters’ wishes,”
\-- Mike DeWine to _The Cincinnati Enquirer_**
To January 2022...
**“Ohio Gov. Mike DeWine and his cronies gerrymander again, but will the Supreme Court stop them?”
_\-- Cleveland.com _**
**It's clear:** DeWine had every opportunity to do his job to produce fair maps. Instead, he slapped Ohioans in the face, crumbled to political pressure, and caved to the extreme rightwing of the Ohio Republican Party.

Our maps are being held in limbo as the DeWine-led redistricting committee continues to refuse to comply with the Ohio Supreme Court's orders. If this isn't further proof it's time to vote DeWine out, we don't know what is.

[**Can we count on your support in the fight to defeat Mike DeWine in November? We set a goal to raise $10,000 before Monday at midnight to help fight for a blue Ohio in 2022. clean_body: | The Republican-controlled redistricting commission failed to produce maps that reflect the political realities of our state for the third time. Mike DeWine is now in overdrive, doing as much damage control as possible. But we have the receipts to prove just how out of touch DeWine is about the redistricting process: From October 2018... “The rules are pretty clear -- the voters said that the redistricting process should be done in a bipartisan way and when I am governor there will be an expectation that the new district maps honor the voters’ wishes,” \-- Mike DeWine to The Cincinnati Enquirer To January 2022... “Ohio Gov. Mike DeWine and his cronies gerrymander again, but will the Supreme Court stop them?” \-- Cleveland.com It's clear: DeWine had every opportunity to do his job to produce fair maps. Instead, he slapped Ohioans in the face, crumbled to political pressure, and caved to the extreme rightwing of the Ohio Republican Party. Our maps are being held in limbo as the DeWine-led redistricting committee continues to refuse to comply with the Ohio Supreme Court's orders. Fellow Conservative, As you’ve heard, there’s a vacancy in the Supreme Court. **Now, the Biden Administration is searching for the most liberal judge they can find to fill the spot.**

_Biden’s pick is expected to be the most liberal justice in history to serve on the Supreme Court._

**Democrats _wish_ we didn’t say this, but we have a plan...**

A strong, conservative Senate majority is our _only chance_ at stopping an extreme far Left justice from forcing _endless COVID mandates_ , green-lighting late-term abortion, and **approving the Democrats’ socialist agenda**..

This is our final shot at preventing a total SOCIALIST TAKEOVER of our country.

name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: Will you volunteer at a Weekend of Action event?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
In order to turn out a historic number of voters on Election Day, we need all hands on deck.
#
The Texas primary elections are quickly approaching on Tuesday, and our team is gearing up to reach our goal of contacting 4 million Texas voters before March 1st.
Our team of volunteers is over 44,000 people strong and we've already made huge progress towards our goal. **But in order to turn out a historic number of voters on Election Day, we need all hands on deck.**
That's why we're hosting a HUGE Weekend of Action with phone banks today, Saturday, Monday, and Tuesday. Beto will be kicking off the Monday phone bank!
[**Sign up today to make calls to Texans on or before Election Day and help build support for Beto!**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53469?t=1&akid=177695%2E444211%2EhDaOAv) You'll have the opportunity to meet other supporters and make calls together after a brief training. Our phone banks are hosted virtually, so you can join us from anywhere.
**[Make calls for Beto »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53469?t=2&akid=177695%2E444211%2EhDaOAv)**
Winning in Texas won't be easy, especially with the extreme voter suppression happening right in front of our eyes. But we know that we're capable of generating once-in-a-lifetime voter turnout if we put in the work right now.
Thank you for being part of this,
Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas
**[Donate now »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53470?refcode=ema20220224-177695&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=177695%2E444211%2EhDaOAv)**

body:
Denver Colorado is number 1 in Car Thefts
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NtnHTIOmjE8Oy7hxdAZ-7Vp0JuLEXhYCXtEaPknkjtNduRxkdx5HUrQO9xhQD8HRC8dNj5vnHZZMrqBbpJMSidOP2yO2AyNdV3cyilQbcGupNBSVyArmge3hD0s69C01ZZj3LyCuGEfdxoq6foaUVmkMyK0xCd_K&c=rshDpHMMHV2Pf2uabSIBZw4EZ2EeiHZaQaTNQpIV9B2aPPDa2IOEEw==&ch=gXXODf85RZAHzXr-SGsLDT-yukkYI_M3ZRaZzWFPYitTaOhjm_rQ6Q==)
---
|
---
| Not A Distinction To Be Proud Of...
---
| |
---|---
|
Under one-party Democrat rule, Denver Colorado is No. 1

IN THE NUMBER OF CAR THEFTS!

And while the rate of car thefts was high this time last year, a new study shows that the number of auto thefts is up 82% statewide since 2019. Denver leads the charge with a 61% increase, followed by Colorado Springs, Aurora, Lakewood and Pueblo, as reported by the Denver Gazette.

The cost? The Gazette reported that officials estimate the average losses INCREASED by almost $62 million between 2019 and 2020, and reports will likely show it has grown another $68.4 million between 2020 and 2021.

Meanwhile the Democrats in Denver--especially the leading Democratic candidate (my opponent in Congressional District 7 race)--have voted to reduce mandatory sentences and amend sentencing requirements for certain crimes. Just last year, Democrats were considering a measure that would essentially allow criminals who break into businesses or STEAL CARS to simply receive an invitation to court before returning to the community at-large! The Democratic candidate also voted to restrict local law enforcement from helping to enforce federal civil immigration laws.

While crime must be handled at the local and state level, stopping the flow of illegal immigrants from across our southern border is critical to reducing crime. That CAN be remedied at the federal level. We cannot allow a Democrat with a demonstrated record of being soft on crime represent us in Washington.

Join our cause and donate today, helping me bring solutions our district through sound lawmaking in Congress. Together we can make a difference. Join today!

name: Derek Marshall
subject: A better foreign policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
It’s with a heavy heart that I woke up this morning to the news of Russia’s brutal invasion of Ukraine. **Words, thoughts, and prayers cannot help the people of Ukraine now, but our government does have the power to make a real difference in their lives.** What America does now matters.
We know that Russian imperialism never really ended, only took on new forms. We are seeing the consequences of fascism and authoritarianism play out in front of our eyes. **When political leaders isolate themselves from the rest of the world and shun our globalized society, it puts themselves and their people at risk. **
But as our leaders know, we are all interconnected. President Biden, alongside European nations, has promised severe economic sanctions in response to Russia’s violent invasion. **But these sanctions, like the ones leveled at Russia after the invasion of Crimea, are designed to cripple the entire Russian economy.** That means regular people, Russians who don’t want this war, will face the consequences of one man’s rash actions.
**Today, it is the everyday Ukrainians and Russians who I am thinking of, those whose lives have been turned upside down overnight.** Ukrainians who have to flee or face life and death situations, and Russians who never asked for war but will pay for it anyway.
The working class is not responsible for Russia’s invasion, Putin and his generals are. **Our sanctions should be carefully crafted to hit those with power in Russia the hardest: the oligarchs and members of Putin’s inner circle.** The clear path forward is to cut these wealthy Russians off from their resources, and deny them access to European and American banking. If they feel the impacts of our international pressure, so will Putin.
I’ve said before that I plan to sit on the Foreign Affairs Committee as a future Member of Congress.**I believe in a long-term approach to foreign policy, one that seeks peace and privileges diplomacy over military interventions.** No doubt, the Ukrainian people must defend themselves against this threat to their sovereignty. But we here in America must also prepare to support the Ukrainian people however we can.
We must welcome those who come to our shores to seek refuge. **As we saw with the withdrawal of our troops from Afghanistan, every military conflict, no matter the intention, creates circumstances where people must flee their homes.** And as with Afghanistan, the U.S. is not wholly prepared to accept those who need our help now. It’s time for us to create a new framework around immigration and asylum, one that prioritizes our humanity over our borders.
And as we look to the future, we must consider the crucial changes to our economy and society that will allow us to withstand the impacts of the kind of sanctions we have leveled against Russia. **There is a lot of talk of our reliance on imported “foreign” oil, and there are some who would respond to this crisis by increasing our domestic production of fossil fuels. **
The way forward is to invest heavily in the technology needed to create a society that runs on renewable energy, not dirty energy. **We can address the climate crisis and safeguard ourselves from global economic changes like the one we are currently experiencing. **
**We do not need to rely on the same old failed tactics that have brought us to where we are today, whether we’re talking about war or energy policy.** We can and must do better. Change is slow, but I do believe it is coming.

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
* * *

clean_body: Peter, It’s with a heavy heart that I woke up this morning to the news of Russia’s brutal invasion of Ukraine. Words, thoughts, and prayers cannot help the people of Ukraine now, but our government does have the power to make a real difference in their lives. What America does now matters. We know that Russian imperialism never really ended, only took on new forms. We are seeing the consequences of fascism and authoritarianism play out in front of our eyes. When political leaders isolate themselves from the rest of the world and shun our globalized society, it puts themselves and their people at risk. But as our leaders know, we are all interconnected. President Biden, alongside European nations, has promised severe economic sanctions in response to Russia’s violent invasion. But these sanctions, like the ones leveled at Russia after the invasion of Crimea, are designed to cripple the entire Russian economy. That means regular people, Russians who don’t want this war, will face the consequences of one man’s rash actions. Today, it is the everyday Ukrainians and Russians who I am thinking of, those whose lives have been turned upside down overnight. Ukrainians who have to flee or face life and death situations, and Russians who never asked for war but will pay for it anyway. The working class is not responsible for Russia’s invasion, Putin and his generals are. Our sanctions should be carefully crafted to hit those with power in Russia the hardest: the oligarchs and members of Putin’s inner circle. The clear path forward is to cut these wealthy Russians off from their resources, and deny them access to European and American banking. If they feel the impacts of our international pressure, so will Putin. I’ve said before that I plan to sit on the Foreign Affairs Committee as a future Member of Congress.I believe in a long-term approach to foreign policy, one that seeks peace and privileges diplomacy over military interventions. No doubt, the Ukrainian people must defend themselves against this threat to their sovereignty. But we here in America must also prepare to support the Ukrainian people however we can. We must welcome those who come to our shores to seek refuge. As we saw with the withdrawal of our troops from Afghanistan, every military conflict, no matter the intention, creates circumstances where people must flee their homes. And as with Afghanistan, the U.S. is not wholly prepared to accept those who need our help now. It’s time for us to create a new framework around immigration and asylum, one that prioritizes our humanity over our borders. And as we look to the future, we must consider the crucial changes to our economy and society that will allow us to withstand the impacts of the kind of sanctions we have leveled against Russia. There is a lot of talk of our reliance on imported “foreign” oil, and there are some who would respond to this crisis by increasing our domestic production of fossil fuels. The way forward is to invest heavily in the technology needed to create a society that runs on renewable energy, not dirty energy. We can address the climate crisis and safeguard ourselves from global economic changes like the one we are currently experiencing. We do not need to rely on the same old failed tactics that have brought us to where we are today, whether we’re talking about war or energy policy. We can and must do better. Change is slow, but I do believe it is coming. In solidarity, Derek Marshall Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23 * Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

My Dear Fellow American,

My name is Jena Tarantin, you’ve probably heard from my husband, [**James, who is running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3435ff734b5442668167d1d13f3d3d35&_e=DZC-etCKq44WYZuldfx-F4183V0cpofaK-JUHINq7Mqoz8SMcyKQtAjyqriWSZyZfXR4O4bt3BMbPMI7Rru9tQIzEXwNhmshdiXyYpzNMMe163BuKkLIEofs_xV7CmGW9U6AjV2Q_gF7C3TzCPzB6IbDefSmWnOGZNexflTEAEsgbpge9UwIBqsCPQ--YlT98XHTDlzXorPfNZFdCHRjfMI_DAYV5UyNNY3OkiYjhX5sM4Jnq8NqzAv-Kydnma4LqCXkr9kCOSI2s7y8jSnHEcIDux2jD21LFhZpXi6gu1At_GF_jGt8QCGOV4TtE3RJ4ka6AK-adz2M9KKwUzehwjstjtRY0EAhgt6m2lm1LIc9f2CpgiZNvnb_wFCdKeISwrTYhbWbTqn5RG-gwZzg93HgCsX1uBedhOV1y0TQQ16Vrbyt7-vJdDJCAmvuVOEfG7AKh1vd-jfZdIIVV6RNFPlqUI8__yXneg9YM-dEdAA%3D)

I know you’re busy, but I wanted to reach out because as a mother and a U.S. citizen, I am worried about what we’re seeing in our nation.

My parents and I lived during the dark times of the communist Soviet Union. I remember all the restrictions that were imposed on my family and all the liberties that were taken away from us.

Despite being so young, I remember those days, and I remember when my parents decided to take me and my sister to America – **the land of opportunity.**

My parents’ brave decision to leave everything behind and pursue the American Dream, allowed me to become a nurse and a mother of two wonderful boys in the land of the free.

However, I am truly worried that the dark times my parents escaped from, is the same thing that is slowly coming back again!

**As Ronald Reagan once said,** __**“If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on Earth.”**__

**He wasn’t wrong,** that’s why so much of what we’re seeing these days has me worried.

I am worried that career politicians want power and not our best interest.

I am worried that many cities support crime as it benefits them politically.

I am worried that some cities and states are allowing illegal immigrants to vote.

I am worried that inflation is robbing our savings.

I am worried that people and their livelihoods are being replaced by robots.

I am worried that Iran will gain nuclear weapons and threaten us all.

I am worried that politicians want to control our children’s education.

I am worried that our children are being mandated to get vaccines.

I am worried that our traditional values are vanishing!

_**I am worried that we are experiencing the death of the American Dream.**_

**The land of the free is only as free as we the people allow it to be.** Without that, there is no America Dream, and there is no shining city on the hill.

[**We need solutions, not worries.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3435ff734b5442668167d1d13f3d3d35&_e=DZC-etCKq44WYZuldfx-F4183V0cpofaK-JUHINq7Mqoz8SMcyKQtAjyqriWSZyZfXR4O4bt3BMbPMI7Rru9tQIzEXwNhmshdiXyYpzNMMe163BuKkLIEofs_xV7CmGW9U6AjV2Q_gF7C3TzCPzB6IbDefSmWnOGZNexflTEAEsgbpge9UwIBqsCPQ--YlT98XHTDlzXorPfNZFdCHRjfMI_DAYV5UyNNY3OkiYjhX5sM4Jnq8NqzAv-Kydnma4LqCXkr9kCOSI2s7y8jSnHEZ-D24vDS2KZrVpCB73sU_ZemAVum87lNAnuaLbq2-Q5vSrJgFFmN9mmwnHTJCkoC6Q0M4X0FDZnEplA48AjvM_AAPCrQ8gLePXqu-P117NN3kTZe1aQBIrXVSjDkXVAD--TE_mbmThx4pspO6q0phGtz6dSzi2ynpjHclxxDfmN6ryIQpincvAZ6LvHG2QbJ-OusLgEBaW6ZtYR4eifJvE%3D) That’s why my husband, James Tarantin, is running to make history by being the first Israeli-Born Senator in the history of our country.

James is a wonderful father, a loving husband, a man of faith, an honorable fighter for traditional values and a successful businessman who legally immigrated to America with no money, no family, and no connections but was still able to build a successful life here.

Our family, along with families like yours, truly represent the American Dream. So if you are worried like I am about what we’re seeing in American, [**then please hear my voice and support my husband for the United States Senate.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3435ff734b5442668167d1d13f3d3d35&_e=DZC-etCKq44WYZuldfx-F4183V0cpofaK-JUHINq7Mqoz8SMcyKQtAjyqriWSZyZfXR4O4bt3BMbPMI7Rru9tQIzEXwNhmshdiXyYpzNMMe163BuKkLIEofs_xV7CmGW9U6AjV2Q_gF7C3TzCPzB6IbDefSmWnOGZNexflTEAEsgbpge9UwIBqsCPQ--YlT98XHTDlzXorPfNZFdCHRjfMI_DAYV5UyNNY3OkiYjhX5sM4Jnq8NqzAv-Kydnma4LqCXkr9kCOSI2s7y8jSnHEePFIjoiMFNj3DCj7lLDiJ__oLi9hNK42OPwHUEe8aNvYSmOdNRphQX0rNxiEcsp94-_qeHoh4Qn2wU58iTYF00LXI7xGoO8XOqdG8RiEj8b0qeKkAUwJmLlSKe6RIzTcgiHx99hix6Ft6FWXS8iXfIH2K1EXZBP4Q06OZ4_43fe5yADJ4QittNjbZS3-3nTfAskz7szEotHbKSEYZWjo2I%3D)

[**We must be a United Front.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3435ff734b5442668167d1d13f3d3d35&_e=DZC-etCKq44WYZuldfx-F4183V0cpofaK-JUHINq7Mqoz8SMcyKQtAjyqriWSZyZfXR4O4bt3BMbPMI7Rru9tQIzEXwNhmshdiXyYpzNMMe163BuKkLIEofs_xV7CmGW9U6AjV2Q_gF7C3TzCPzB6IbDefSmWnOGZNexflTEAEsgbpge9UwIBqsCPQ--YlT98XHTDlzXorPfNZFdCHRjfMI_DAYV5UyNNY3OkiYjhX5sM4Jnq8NqzAv-Kydnma4LqCXkr9kCOSI2s7y8jSnHERDwxLAqw0Y-qyEVhh0LTP6Ne0gJmfL3oWzFqWUBX6r2D7LYUV3MTJyIhbQUg1REenx1TjG5fTyzY2vFzzjG7jZwNtg-zJvwYzolQryatmB7jSuwAnXFOR2jnJvBTGrCKa7pc1_hKA2jOcqAsygi9hFqgc1h46s8cSOIUfJJSETNaIXlXC_dKGq2HjIq92nYif4LV3xd9rql_mD-AOdS4co%3D) Please... if not for me, then for the love of God and our Country.

James is not a career politician. [**He is You. Our story is an America story.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3435ff734b5442668167d1d13f3d3d35&_e=DZC-etCKq44WYZuldfx-F4183V0cpofaK-JUHINq7Mqoz8SMcyKQtAjyqriWSZyZfXR4O4bt3BMbPMI7Rru9tQIzEXwNhmshdiXyYpzNMMe163BuKkLIEofs_xV7CmGW9U6AjV2Q_gF7C3TzCPzB6IbDefSmWnOGZNexflTEAEsgbpge9UwIBqsCPQ--YlT98XHTDlzXorPfNZFdCHRjfMI_DAYV5UyNNY3OkiYjhX5sM4Jnq8NqzAv-Kydnma4LqCXkr9kCOSI2s7y8jSnHEdVgE0jzRIOB9YzaR2LEh-rH5Obvm96BYwZo9z-z6epj1vE3OorGoWe83-w0kADK5-sHdAZkCA23HcW0btccqtVGO-6m2PH9ci8RTWbyLCTzYEoyNnFByGvQei5r7vJbFZQmbZ3jML6vaVfqotfIviCUcY3oqFepjClow5xw8IuduMQ1yTattSYeHIkAm_c9r9_bD0hVL5__zVQ1nqTucYU%3D)

America’s future is up to us, let’s work together and leave it better than we found it.

Thank you,

**Jena Tarantin**

P.S. I wish to share with you a note my grandfather left for me before he passed away in the Soviet Union:

May the American People be with you down every road you roam.
And may its compassion surround you when you're far from my wooden home.
And may you grow to be conservative, kind and true.
And do unto others as you'd have done to you.
Be brave my dear child as the fighters in World War Two.
And in my heart you'll always stay bright as the Light that comes America’s shores.

America Forever
America Forever

subject: My stance on the invasion of Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Brent Hennrich For Washington**](https://www
body:
It is with a heavy heart today that I send my most sincere hope for peace to the people of Ukraine, as well as all Ukrainian Americans in Wa
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f2Nyil0kZ/c?w=5v5JlmY1UkR1WAYbHeor7sGHvaWKnf-vEpOr4ZD7LBw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vc28vZjJOeWlsMGtaP2xhbmd1YWdlVGFnPWVuIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | It is with a heavy heart today that I send my most sincere hope for peace to the people of Ukraine, as well as all Ukrainian Americans in Washington and across the country. Last night’s unprovoked, full-scale invasion of Ukraine’s sovereign territory by the military forces of Russia, must not be allowed to stand. Ukraine is a free country with a democratically elected government.The people of their country deserve nothing less than the full support of every free nation in the world.Support must come in many forms, from military aid to the most forceful economic and diplomatic sanctions that governments can impose. There is no room in this world for such brazen attacks and Russia must face consequences. I look forward to a day, hopefully in the not too distant future; that Ukraine will once again be the free and peaceful country they worked so hard to be. Anybody who does not declare clearly that Russia is the aggressor in this matter or that says it is anyone’s fault besides Vladimir Putin’s does not respect the rule of law and the necessity of democratically chosen liberty in this world. -Brent Hennrich
---
| | | [**Paid For By Brent Hennrich For Washington**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/f2Nyil0kZ/c?w=i88Fw3TtpnRB4gn-yIUm0cOx6_uV4h_0TpMbRl9eLUE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vIiwiciI6IjUzMTg1NjFjLWFmMDctNDVhNi1mMWQzLTc4MWE1ZTQxZDU1MSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)

| | | **_In Case You Missed It_**

This afternoon, Tom went on WABCNY to discuss the unprovoked Russian invasion of Ukraine, why it matters to our country, and what the United States should be doing to protect our interests at home and abroad.

This is a threat not just to Ukraine, but to the whole world order the United States has tried to build since WWII.
