name: Jena Tarantin
subject: True Story - Russian War
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
|
---
My Dear Fellow American,

My name is Jena Tarantin, you’ve probably heard from my husband, [**James, who is running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5d80b962abd74e02bd6e86f5b263961b&_e=h7FX2dkTi2gLzsOqCx753YUV5FZ5oXL_EUGcwiX0IS8EFC05n5oL6TonWbx_hYHViw47o3GpYuI5SHAMAfnuQVW1veMLVnlb5HXjvLzbCc9cwP8zkv-lseNYZjOLMDhLEyRlS5qrNiFOOewWoNfG8XlWqlBVej-uP_LGDi_2wWhPh1t2pAWZ62ckZul0qZyRDUCyz1hCJ2-sK3Hh9Ti4kKI8QqhpAPrLRtFkLh4n2Zg06sSMZuHnVyTkNz-45qWP5LxoeDzHO_kb1RH8n3on2GUOPDbCzTUi5E4IktT0s_6iwVsd3UvheUa1YcFxuisQgr7DnZwiftGSTwDZ86dQ0BwRI4Xfn2g_Hcl76_ixKsOvxOB_kf0GeW60hyhvJveaP3o2qsmieRna1ODaw9Bs55BORAG5hOwAh8rrAxxpEfI6CerWNRaSz8fg5Hhg_pK0QVers6FlAL7knj8HSGyevwIxyVBeCwq7QcAn9iXC8b8%3D)

I know you’re busy, but I wanted to reach out because as a mother and a U.S. citizen, I am worried about what we’re seeing in our nation.

My parents and I lived during the dark times of the communist Soviet Union. I remember all the restrictions that were imposed on my family and all the liberties that were taken away from us.

Despite being so young, I remember those days, and I remember when my parents decided to take me and my sister to America – **the land of opportunity.**

My parents’ brave decision to leave everything behind and pursue the American Dream, allowed me to become a nurse and a mother of two wonderful boys in the land of the free.

However, I am truly worried that the dark times my parents escaped from, is the same thing that is slowly coming back again!

**As Ronald Reagan once said,** __**“If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on Earth.”**__

**He wasn’t wrong,** that’s why so much of what we’re seeing these days has me worried.

I am worried that career politicians want power and not our best interest.

I am worried that many cities support crime as it benefits them politically.

I am worried that some cities and states are allowing illegal immigrants to vote.

I am worried that inflation is robbing our savings.

I am worried that people and their livelihoods are being replaced by robots.

I am worried that Iran will gain nuclear weapons and threaten us all.

I am worried that politicians want to control our children’s education.

I am worried that our children are being mandated to get vaccines.

I am worried that our traditional values are vanishing!

_**I am worried that we are experiencing the death of the American Dream.**_

**The land of the free is only as free as we the people allow it to be.** Without that, there is no America Dream, and there is no shining city on the hill.

[**We need solutions, not worries.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5d80b962abd74e02bd6e86f5b263961b&_e=h7FX2dkTi2gLzsOqCx753YUV5FZ5oXL_EUGcwiX0IS8EFC05n5oL6TonWbx_hYHViw47o3GpYuI5SHAMAfnuQVW1veMLVnlb5HXjvLzbCc9cwP8zkv-lseNYZjOLMDhLEyRlS5qrNiFOOewWoNfG8XlWqlBVej-uP_LGDi_2wWhPh1t2pAWZ62ckZul0qZyRDUCyz1hCJ2-sK3Hh9Ti4kKI8QqhpAPrLRtFkLh4n2Zg06sSMZuHnVyTkNz-45qWP5LxoeDzHO_kb1RH8n3on2PUojCM4GX1ByuFuhrC_ts_GYpqz7zE2FCJRIHo7aVt8u_NTMkqOLRj9-_zJwZBL1qkBLE2yZwj7ODM3u-oYO4h4XZuHi_DzuRBkBm4TU-IuyYK020Ur-ylTrN7ZdZScjo5ZO8VA__NDWDqmMRIAnawZP-_dOENhXj7Zr6zqax_1VYfGxQt2zq1VZ5N-DH-umZnp8IRGi6TzUCo3EqDhPZo%3D) That’s why my husband, James Tarantin, is running to make history by being the first Israeli-Born Senator in the history of our country.

James is a wonderful father, a loving husband, a man of faith, an honorable fighter for traditional values and a successful businessman who legally immigrated to America with no money, no family, and no connections but was still able to build a successful life here.

Our family, along with families like yours, truly represent the American Dream. So if you are worried like I am about what we’re seeing in American, [**then please hear my voice and support my husband for the United States Senate.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5d80b962abd74e02bd6e86f5b263961b&_e=h7FX2dkTi2gLzsOqCx753YUV5FZ5oXL_EUGcwiX0IS8EFC05n5oL6TonWbx_hYHViw47o3GpYuI5SHAMAfnuQVW1veMLVnlb5HXjvLzbCc9cwP8zkv-lseNYZjOLMDhLEyRlS5qrNiFOOewWoNfG8XlWqlBVej-uP_LGDi_2wWhPh1t2pAWZ62ckZul0qZyRDUCyz1hCJ2-sK3Hh9Ti4kKI8QqhpAPrLRtFkLh4n2Zg06sSMZuHnVyTkNz-45qWP5LxoeDzHO_kb1RH8n3on2DwGVFB-6960hB63gt0BmCyA7Bpdlru5fEAC1bmOomvymU_pRkJwBC3pmJ53FDo2-DEef1qZWJw6e0W06D5AR3Rt4yXH0WNvo3wUU8PYglJ5M9UCFazYUKBeaOAsNQ7koRfXgVmLe7tXYmc_GI-_Trn9zzM_KM5DxRPc1r3Qh-0mIM7GEaB68oSkHyouX3EkiIigNUHE0nFJ3mcd8JIdIsM%3D)

[**We must be a United Front.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5d80b962abd74e02bd6e86f5b263961b&_e=h7FX2dkTi2gLzsOqCx753YUV5FZ5oXL_EUGcwiX0IS8EFC05n5oL6TonWbx_hYHViw47o3GpYuI5SHAMAfnuQVW1veMLVnlb5HXjvLzbCc9cwP8zkv-lseNYZjOLMDhLEyRlS5qrNiFOOewWoNfG8XlWqlBVej-uP_LGDi_2wWhPh1t2pAWZ62ckZul0qZyRDUCyz1hCJ2-sK3Hh9Ti4kKI8QqhpAPrLRtFkLh4n2Zg06sSMZuHnVyTkNz-45qWP5LxoeDzHO_kb1RH8n3on2HZ-yp8FB_PvpTS-sNqMEy-fDeubByq_wX63xxBlVrswYN63u9WlJ1HYFV58uZDLkVBHUvy8wrhiERRYcqNnKI_cPP4aNjyA-ZabW5RCgOliRylBq7UACCigDoDjCg0YwsszptFkjc0sZxSQQIH70EMwe9gyX8o9sumvAxt62HXEnlRF18WuSEo2MIs7MpMnbVwVYDyT3ImaChk2qOXA7TI%3D) Please... if not for me, then for the love of God and our Country.

James is not a career politician. [**He is You. Our story is an America story.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5d80b962abd74e02bd6e86f5b263961b&_e=h7FX2dkTi2gLzsOqCx753YUV5FZ5oXL_EUGcwiX0IS8EFC05n5oL6TonWbx_hYHViw47o3GpYuI5SHAMAfnuQVW1veMLVnlb5HXjvLzbCc9cwP8zkv-lseNYZjOLMDhLEyRlS5qrNiFOOewWoNfG8XlWqlBVej-uP_LGDi_2wWhPh1t2pAWZ62ckZul0qZyRDUCyz1hCJ2-sK3Hh9Ti4kKI8QqhpAPrLRtFkLh4n2Zg06sSMZuHnVyTkNz-45qWP5LxoeDzHO_kb1RH8n3on2Da01lV7xgYVtTEdw5PcsILlknznxZFwY2YEqItntw6KCFH9sp_39m215R0t6T1hR_zBdBAa2BY4HlTgHv7MCS1ALHw0gK8R6Hh5Su0LzGtYM3irE8IMCfa7zRvFu-BAeI7zWmiQsFEiY8Mj3XnbezWorpslt-3HPKGazBfEgtc1rqw0kr35VjZUQAbeFVPdW7PfmMjukD8mocMBJdIqtxI%3D)

America’s future is up to us, let’s work together and leave it better than we found it.

Thank you,

**Jena Tarantin**

P.S. I wish to share with you a note my grandfather left for me before he passed away in the Soviet Union:

May the American People be with you down every road you roam.
And may its compassion surround you when you're far from my wooden home.
And may you grow to be conservative, kind and true.
And do unto others as you'd have done to you.
Be brave my dear child as the fighters in World War Two.
And in my heart you'll always stay bright as the Light that comes America’s shores.

America Forever
America Forever

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5d80b962abd74e02bd6e86f5b263961b&_e=h7FX2dkTi2gLzsOqCx753YUV5FZ5oXL_EUGcwiX0IS8EFC05n5oL6TonWbx_hYHViw47o3GpYuI5SHAMAfnuQVW1veMLVnlb5HXjvLzbCc9cwP8zkv-lseNYZjOLMDhLEyRlS5qrNiFOOewWoNfG8XlWqlBVej-uP_LGDi_2wWhPh1t2pAWZ62ckZul0qZyRDUCyz1hCJ2-sK3Hh9Ti4kKI8QqhpAPrLRtFkLh4n2Zg06sSMZuHnVyTkNz-45qWP5LxoeDzHO_kb1RH8n3on2FDk-NTIoANlERyv1dU6Fw34NX2GOYqvI-cavDjrtUPTGUzmw3iLRmtLa69dm3RGbMGI_WKhm-jA6bYmsfmOXKPTPm9hGF0HLn_KYc33UmFzyc1UeIWBLdc_QrVyZm3CWJoYOZge23xYgkjGlXvYk9LwtsfDCKUgXcMXZWWa104LidMTAoR29VEDg8l91M9Yz8nLl2fh_SaePjwU7NZT7yA%3D)

clean_body: | My Dear Fellow American, My name is Jena Tarantin, you’ve probably heard from my husband, I know you’re busy, but I wanted to reach out because as a mother and a U.S. citizen, I am worried about what we’re seeing in our nation. My parents and I lived during the dark times of the communist Soviet Union. I remember all the restrictions that were imposed on my family and all the liberties that were taken away from us. Despite being so young, I remember those days, and I remember when my parents decided to take me and my sister to America – the land of opportunity. My parents’ brave decision to leave everything behind and pursue the American Dream, allowed me to become a nurse and a mother of two wonderful boys in the land of the free. However, I am truly worried that the dark times my parents escaped from, is the same thing that is slowly coming back again! As Ronald Reagan once said, “If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on Earth.” He wasn’t wrong, that’s why so much of what we’re seeing these days has me worried. I am worried that career politicians want power and not our best interest. I am worried that many cities support crime as it benefits them politically. I am worried that some cities and states are allowing illegal immigrants to vote. I am worried that inflation is robbing our savings. I am worried that people and their livelihoods are being replaced by robots. I am worried that Iran will gain nuclear weapons and threaten us all. I am worried that politicians want to control our children’s education. I am worried that our children are being mandated to get vaccines. I am worried that our traditional values are vanishing! I am worried that we are experiencing the death of the American Dream. The land of the free is only as free as we the people allow it to be. Without that, there is no America Dream, and there is no shining city on the hill. That’s why my husband, James Tarantin, is running to make history by being the first Israeli-Born Senator in the history of our country. James is a wonderful father, a loving husband, a man of faith, an honorable fighter for traditional values and a successful businessman who legally immigrated to America with no money, no family, and no connections but was still able to build a successful life here. Our family, along with families like yours, truly represent the American Dream. name: Christina Davidson
subject: I’m suing the federal government and need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Health Freedom Defense Fund
body:
I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z42k4rbfem4eeq9m7la5kapg603anite7ejclolo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctgm8o72cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj1c8rmfctmmurracpimhir4d3164prddhkmiqn8d3ks8qncpjmc9hrctth6goefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3aphhesqr1ptnc9j32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common. I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake. You know that freedoms given away are never given back... | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zkumr04qopmttc3qtgvhbjlf5gkaud822agen25g_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctgm8o72cth2bs)
---

Friend,

I don't know you and you don't know me, but the government is forcing me to choose between the jab and my job, and I'm writing to you today because I think we have something important in common.

I think you're a patriot, and I think you know what's at stake.

You know that freedoms given away are never given back.

And no matter your vaccination status, you know that your medical decisions are between you and your doctor - not you and your government, or you and your boss.

**That's why I'm suing the federal government alongside of 6,000 other federal employees with the help of the Health Freedom Defense Fund and why I hope I can count on your generous support today.**

[**Will you give $25, $50, $100 or more and give us the ammunition we need to win this legal battle?**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsk1am6g3muormqfsjun6vmm12ftlkmb9nv5dl18_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctgm8o72cth2bs)

My name is Christina Davidson, I'm a paramedic firefighter, and I've worked for the Department of Defense for 14 years.

**_If I did what the government is doing I'd lose my license on the spot._**

I'm not allowed to give my patients medication without their consent, and I'm not allowed to threaten them to take medication.

But that's exactly what's happening to me and thousands of other employees across the country, and that's why we need you on our side.

_Because what starts with us won't end with us._

**If they can do it to me, they can do it to you.**

We're taking on this legal battle because we know if we give up and give in, it's only a matter of time before they come after you, your livelihood and your family the way they came after ours.

We want to stop tyranny in its tracks and codify our medical rights into law once and for all.

[**But we don't stand a chance without you.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zer5akf0c17g6il5tsmqr7fof44a3q1sgo5jpv30_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctgm8o72cth2bs)

I won't mince words...we've got our work cut out for us.

The government is going to fight us every step of the way.

They've already shown us how far they're willing to go to push these mandates.

They've blatantly defied the courts, and are encouraging private employers to do the same. The President has even told businesses to ignore the courts.

Federal employees lucky enough to get an exemption are required to undergo "reeducation" training.

On top of regular threats, we're told we have no chance of promotion unless we shut up and take it.

And if we're fired, it won't just be a matter of finding a new job.

They're making it so that we'll never be able to find work again.

They want to make us so desperate that we have no choice but to surrender once and for all.

This has nothing to do with health.

**They want to break our wills, break our spirits, and send a loud, clear message that they have control over our lives.**

And if we let them win, there's no turning back.

[**Which is why I hope you'll fight along with me with a generous gift of $25 or more today to help fund lawsuits to fight vaccine mandates and preserve medical freedom.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6vvq6vevdu400qq5oofgmqmvei2dnsd57ehmob8_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctgm8o72cth2bs)

**I don't know if you're vaccinated - and I don't want to know.**

It's none of my business.

I want to know if you'll stand up for your countrymen when it matters most.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

Christina Davidson

| [ DONATE ](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf5lkeinlbn1j983na1o4vljkcgk1e3aqkoq2ii0_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctgm8o72cth2bs)
---

---

| Paid for by Health Freedom Defense Fund
[www.healthfreedomdefense.org](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvj5nm9utfdpgr64rrljr59dnv6cbkj49jlmdngo_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctgm8o72cth2bs)

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2zbgqoron9tfoe6k0ak7ppgkdfkscmk8n3m5r91a0).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0ofhkgrufesce9j9cjbs0kcbatlqll14e42p49o_rp22sh2s8i66ob5ctgm8o72cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

| | Peter,

As primary season approaches, Scott wants to make sure that he is accurately representing the will of the voters here in Orange County.

To that end, we here at Team Baugh thought we would ask directly what top issues are most important to you. **Would you take the survey below and let us know - what issue is your highest priority in 2022?**
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=bb4fae2966&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Whether it’s regaining control of our Southern Border or regaining control of inflation, protecting our Second Amendment rights or protecting our right to make our own healthcare choices, this election will be pivotal in deciding the course of our nation.

But far-left politicians in Washington – including Orange County’s Katie Porter – aren’t interested in accurately representing the views of their constituents. Instead, they forge ahead with their pro-lockdown, anti-liberty agenda.

**Scott Baugh is committed to ensuring that we have a real voice in Washington.** That’s why we want to know what your top issue is in this election cycle. **[Will you help make sure your voice is heard by taking the survey below?](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=606b7221ec&e=8a657725d1)**

Donald J. Trump February 23rd, 2022

subject: statists vs servants in Idaho
body:
RE: Idaho goon squad |
---
| | It's business as usual in Idaho (at least at the capitol)...

Because the Idaho goon squad is still coming up with unique ways to spend the $2 BILLION surplus they stole from Idaho citizens via over-taxation.

And they're still running cover for the taxpayer-funded schools indoctrinating out KIDS with anti-American, anti-white, racist, socialist propaganda.

These are "Republicans" doing this.

Well... at least they claim to be.

It's really quite pathetic.

I made a short 5-minute video about it this morning.

[Watch it right here if you feel so inclined](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=6cdcd0c5cf&e=dea908e0fe "Watch it"):

[](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=07aea7fc68&e=dea908e0fe)

Stay frosty,

Brian

**P.S.** The fight to keep Idaho a liberty-loving conservative bastion is just starting. The RINO sellouts have big money, big pharma, and big business behind them. Normal guys like me? Not so much. So, if you can, please [consider contributing to my campaign](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=e350961ac0&e=dea908e0fe "destroy the RINOS") ($100, $500, even $1,000). Thanks for being a part of this.

**P.P.S.** If you want to volunteer, I'm looking for people in Nampa, District 13 to host meetups, knock doors, make phone calls, and put yard signs out. [If you're interested in ANY of that, click here to let me know](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=ed7a2e88b8&e=dea908e0fe "Get involved") (or, just respond to this email).

---
| | _Copyright © 2022 Brian Lenney for Idaho, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Brian Lenney for IdahoPO Box 3753Nampa, ID 83653-3753
[Add us to your address book](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7)

name: Jena Tarantin
subject: Russian War - True Story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
|
---
My Dear Fellow American,

My name is Jena Tarantin, you’ve probably heard from my husband, [**James, who is running to be the next U.S. Senator from Maryland.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9183b89999a04a65ba9fdf5581a82d2e&_e=08SW7LQU2nBP-_j1IYUlV7GKSKCvUcAz4t6u2iESIrfwtT7P_Ie3dM1fr3CxO-jNmZxLwbM19ggr4aSJ48yAZjVVcPjgFP0AJ5a2tXtl1rt9YMPa3LZnPKrAVsa2XnnJL3R2su3cgrv7Wzmde2pLwq1YLXy20AVLdMz5ZjYVT82JIkFdiYSNcypVmy7Lz0xiUhogdeuq-vufoOE6SbjIFuVdZCjSfRsWbh0cQXKkfQvncyFTWKvDJKPYP28l6wpwNe5zCKEYpavzISCXJCPcS7qUxPUifAmyH1kNbxGmW1Tk8VZcpvB3di-t03brxjqU2aUONi-et2BVsmFg9A4Y3mpHA1_w3lYxELVmMsXsnaFb8-d36_o2YuKg2vc_EX_cUJ5xZZ7ub0kkkHljR6fWXeT-Iqkioes4QeL0CcuNOzE3wJoZNBPy96CVY8hJvmGvf7FM7oAUE9fjsOhNB7PcVFcGVAQ_d_H34aNF3A7NvmA%3D)

I know you’re busy, but I wanted to reach out because as a mother and a U.S. citizen, I am worried about what we’re seeing in our nation.

My parents and I lived during the dark times of the communist Soviet Union. I remember all the restrictions that were imposed on my family and all the liberties that were taken away from us.

Despite being so young, I remember those days, and I remember when my parents decided to take me and my sister to America – **the land of opportunity.**

My parents’ brave decision to leave everything behind and pursue the American Dream, allowed me to become a nurse and a mother of two wonderful boys in the land of the free.

However, I am truly worried that the dark times my parents escaped from, is the same thing that is slowly coming back again!

**As Ronald Reagan once said,** __**“If we lose freedom here, there is no place to escape to. This is the last stand on Earth.”**__

**He wasn’t wrong,** that’s why so much of what we’re seeing these days has me worried.

I am worried that career politicians want power and not our best interest.

I am worried that many cities support crime as it benefits them politically.

I am worried that some cities and states are allowing illegal immigrants to vote.

I am worried that inflation is robbing our savings.

I am worried that people and their livelihoods are being replaced by robots.

I am worried that Iran will gain nuclear weapons and threaten us all.

I am worried that politicians want to control our children’s education.

I am worried that our children are being mandated to get vaccines.

I am worried that our traditional values are vanishing!

_**I am worried that we are experiencing the death of the American Dream.**_

**The land of the free is only as free as we the people allow it to be.** Without that, there is no America Dream, and there is no shining city on the hill.

[**We need solutions, not worries.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9183b89999a04a65ba9fdf5581a82d2e&_e=08SW7LQU2nBP-_j1IYUlV7GKSKCvUcAz4t6u2iESIrfwtT7P_Ie3dM1fr3CxO-jNmZxLwbM19ggr4aSJ48yAZjVVcPjgFP0AJ5a2tXtl1rt9YMPa3LZnPKrAVsa2XnnJL3R2su3cgrv7Wzmde2pLwq1YLXy20AVLdMz5ZjYVT82JIkFdiYSNcypVmy7Lz0xiUhogdeuq-vufoOE6SbjIFuVdZCjSfRsWbh0cQXKkfQvncyFTWKvDJKPYP28l6wpwNe5zCKEYpavzISCXJCPcS-Hh3sEirc5V5T5vtTwgJ6B5Ho6VfigmKrsoofYA3H3frJVJkiIvGhVHWQyQblcBsxVzc7DM48Bcx9BsqIDGINnbtgYgJCfxz2cPK05O0njfJn-pC8MOvINIkoGYddcoKBzLFsS3F9HXwC_G8eKAO2qRp25XejT-A5VFopL2oKGc1R-Ns_lz4yaNg-SW-tvFbPiOleVRlv_VPPC5-23h1BA%3D) That’s why my husband, James Tarantin, is running to make history by being the first Israeli-Born Senator in the history of our country.

James is a wonderful father, a loving husband, a man of faith, an honorable fighter for traditional values and a successful businessman who legally immigrated to America with no money, no family, and no connections but was still able to build a successful life here.

Our family, along with families like yours, truly represent the American Dream. So if you are worried like I am about what we’re seeing in American, [**then please hear my voice and support my husband for the United States Senate.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9183b89999a04a65ba9fdf5581a82d2e&_e=08SW7LQU2nBP-_j1IYUlV7GKSKCvUcAz4t6u2iESIrfwtT7P_Ie3dM1fr3CxO-jNmZxLwbM19ggr4aSJ48yAZjVVcPjgFP0AJ5a2tXtl1rt9YMPa3LZnPKrAVsa2XnnJL3R2su3cgrv7Wzmde2pLwq1YLXy20AVLdMz5ZjYVT82JIkFdiYSNcypVmy7Lz0xiUhogdeuq-vufoOE6SbjIFuVdZCjSfRsWbh0cQXKkfQvncyFTWKvDJKPYP28l6wpwNe5zCKEYpavzISCXJCPcSwzEQ-qPn4idrZYMlWdaZ-alvwBbGA2JmZNbQtIgIgVbaANq3IkkH9MhmcDr_dCkt3UuYXp3XN6GXHrY2T9TZy25rDP57l9dOZV5R6akJc827wwBwq-VR6_jomrb6mGPXsqjkrHIMNcnMRF4iTdjo3mQeaS1tzuRvkxIZtSrIhLDFvowh9PT2F4Nnc4Prmabs77luIvEHTHwypSuQCITdMI%3D)

[**We must be a United Front.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9183b89999a04a65ba9fdf5581a82d2e&_e=08SW7LQU2nBP-_j1IYUlV7GKSKCvUcAz4t6u2iESIrfwtT7P_Ie3dM1fr3CxO-jNmZxLwbM19ggr4aSJ48yAZjVVcPjgFP0AJ5a2tXtl1rt9YMPa3LZnPKrAVsa2XnnJL3R2su3cgrv7Wzmde2pLwq1YLXy20AVLdMz5ZjYVT82JIkFdiYSNcypVmy7Lz0xiUhogdeuq-vufoOE6SbjIFuVdZCjSfRsWbh0cQXKkfQvncyFTWKvDJKPYP28l6wpwNe5zCKEYpavzISCXJCPcS83Tn-a0AZUoKtp6gFqg9FxZKGu_ECXgx-CVL1S4vqTzfc4zu-9T9w1BJdVvqP_yB0AoIS76I8FhxMN_JtXDDug1pCA5-OOboXOnSzN9bI6G5V8dppxWt69hNCpVR4Or7twhemR-erS5MQbWxykP7efYVyW2jCQiKGEk4f-LQHq0Y5NlTc20xBYgseK7PCTo0xq1QigMW0CzL6cI1zQ0PKk%3D) Please... if not for me, then for the love of God and our Country.

James is not a career politician. [**He is You. Our story is an America story.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9183b89999a04a65ba9fdf5581a82d2e&_e=08SW7LQU2nBP-_j1IYUlV7GKSKCvUcAz4t6u2iESIrfwtT7P_Ie3dM1fr3CxO-jNmZxLwbM19ggr4aSJ48yAZjVVcPjgFP0AJ5a2tXtl1rt9YMPa3LZnPKrAVsa2XnnJL3R2su3cgrv7Wzmde2pLwq1YLXy20AVLdMz5ZjYVT82JIkFdiYSNcypVmy7Lz0xiUhogdeuq-vufoOE6SbjIFuVdZCjSfRsWbh0cQXKkfQvncyFTWKvDJKPYP28l6wpwNe5zCKEYpavzISCXJCPcSw5rAZHGo3ltOfL6rH1__Ck7eO2edL3yYkGBpUjhzXjORGH5bTYavOxPAXweGakvbmcbr67gW11FuUI8MPElMLCp3Zg5K5Yfmu-fFlJPhMrOR3JvmMMV08RtNu9dQnbwl5QIg2Ia5TTcQg_AJdxL8j_7tLxZ-P1LrRgpEejdx-taA4QixPit-ck75k7AxiGQb7-PY3sX0XDs8TGIYCX2qzM%3D)

America’s future is up to us, let’s work together and leave it better than we found it.

Thank you,

**Jena Tarantin**

P.S. I wish to share with you a note my grandfather left for me before he passed away in the Soviet Union:

May the American People be with you down every road you roam.
And may its compassion surround you when you're far from my wooden home.
And may you grow to be conservative, kind and true.
And do unto others as you'd have done to you.
Be brave my dear child as the fighters in World War Two.
And in my heart you'll always stay bright as the Light that comes America’s shores.

America Forever
America Forever

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9183b89999a04a65ba9fdf5581a82d2e&_e=08SW7LQU2nBP-_j1IYUlV7GKSKCvUcAz4t6u2iESIrfwtT7P_Ie3dM1fr3CxO-jNmZxLwbM19ggr4aSJ48yAZjVVcPjgFP0AJ5a2tXtl1rt9YMPa3LZnPKrAVsa2XnnJL3R2su3cgrv7Wzmde2pLwq1YLXy20AVLdMz5ZjYVT82JIkFdiYSNcypVmy7Lz0xiUhogdeuq-vufoOE6SbjIFuVdZCjSfRsWbh0cQXKkfQvncyFTWKvDJKPYP28l6wpwNe5zCKEYpavzISCXJCPcS_TaitDxi5RZz0gi3E3R4-b5zEs3DdK3VRiNnGIxLd5acRonrYfV6HgCcUp6BDtIcwpIr_eH34pk-MSgMbDzf7vnkGe7scOgL6D04kGgWxE8evuEeZooC03w7pfPkZuivRh_OujbL8zMmnoTd5U6Cf8M9ejBUh7BOcRo_0GWbBYZSXDE52d04PrVEo68mT1TuWBDgiLOJlqbhjnG1ye4Hh8%3D)

| | Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
---

Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=9183b89999a04a65ba9fdf5581a82d2e&_t=SDc4u9sJw29coP2kiAD9C8FKkK8VViw60jzVxqOHBYVNNF-F8KssG6MAOdUQ7f_uUTStsSGt8deNaW-veXUTNOTX6j8pLx5ACFVLbJjC6_fO2Ii6NsmhD9ol3tpBkMzb0jbnNKFo3i1_orEp2WJb7srF69Dti-ZxRAawnEH97W4%3D).

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Update from North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
We finally have definitive Congressional and State House and Senate maps.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42193912/332026813/2087247564?refcode=BLU-VFC-20220224-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGQwYWQwOS1jNzk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p_cC4Gokmt1cJFI6iDP3YOIWiHx5x50kD_CWHxz5XOI=)
---
| Peter,

There’s been a lot going on in North Carolina lately. I know it can be exhausting to keep up with it all. **Let me break down where we’re at as of today.**

Just after noon yesterday, the trial court accepted the State House and Senate maps and rejected the Congressional maps drawn by the legislature. When they threw out the Congressional maps, they offered a new map, drawn by the special masters. Late yesterday, all three maps were appealed to the North Carolina Supreme Court by varying entities. Late last night, the State Supreme Court issued a decision that they would decline to take up the appeals or place a stay on filing. **This means that we *finally* have definitive Congressional and State House and Senate maps.** Filing opened today at 8am.

It’s been a long process, with filing halted twice, several different maps proposed, and the primary date being pushed back from March to May. But, we’re finally set.

**As such, I will be filing for NC Congressional District 4 on Monday. I have been honored and humbled by the outpouring of support within this district. I’m ready to get through filing and hit the ground running.**

[_**Please, consider showing our campaign support today by pitching in what you can. clean_body: We finally have definitive Congressional and State House and Senate maps. | = | Peter, There’s been a lot going on in North Carolina lately. I know it can be exhausting to keep up with it all. Let me break down where we’re at as of today. Just after noon yesterday, the trial court accepted the State House and Senate maps and rejected the Congressional maps drawn by the legislature. When they threw out the Congressional maps, they offered a new map, drawn by the special masters. Late yesterday, all three maps were appealed to the North Carolina Supreme Court by varying entities. Late last night, the State Supreme Court issued a decision that they would decline to take up the appeals or place a stay on filing. This means that we finally have definitive Congressional and State House and Senate maps. Filing opened today at 8am. It’s been a long process, with filing halted twice, several different maps proposed, and the primary date being pushed back from March to May. But, we’re finally set. As such, I will be filing for NC Congressional District 4 on Monday. I have been honored and humbled by the outpouring of support within this district. I’m ready to get through filing and hit the ground running. = | = With appreciation, = * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. clean_body: The latest polling shows we’re leading this critical Senate race by one point. Let’s make sure we build on the momentum. | GEORGIA SENATE POLLING: WALKER 49% - Warnock 48% This is urgent, Peter. The latest polling shows we're leading this critical Senate race in Georgia by just one point. You have been one of our most loyal supporters since launching our campaign, and we need your help again. Polling shows we cannot afford to let up - not even for one day. Our opponent knows the race is a dead heat, so he's already spending millions on his first advertising blitzes when we're still 8 months before the election! This poll has already fired up the Democrats in Washington, who are determined to do whatever it takes to hold their Senate majority. Let's win! clean_body: 🛑 Career Politicians ➡️ ⬅️ Peter, Katie Britt has been working for nearly 20 years to improve our state for the hardworking people who live here. One MAJOR part of her fight is her efforts to STOP career politicians from serving themselves over their constituents. We’re in the LAST 3 months of this race, and every single second counts in Katie’s fight to kick do-nothing career politicians OUT of Washington. With a Katie’s February end-of-month fundraiser, you will be instrumentalin her efforts to: 🛑 STOP career politicians, 🛑 STOP Biden’s radical agenda, and 🛑 STOP socialist influence. Team Britt has set a goal of raising $10,000 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline ends. Thank you, Sean Katie Britt for Senate Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

| | |
Friend,

I’m writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America’s truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we’ve endured over the past two years, _and we’re taking action._

**That’s right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!**
**_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=148108&L=80028&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMg== "SUPPORT THE
CONVOY")_**
We’ve had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it’s just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN’T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don’t stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=148108&L=80028&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMg== "which is why
we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our
independent fundraising platform.")_**

Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig!
**_[$15 = 10 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=148108&L=80029&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9MTU= "$15 = 10 Miles")_**

**_[$30 = 20 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=148108&L=80030&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9MzA= "$30 = 20 Miles")_**

**_[$150 = 100 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=148108&L=80031&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9MTUw "$150 = 100
Miles")_**

**_[$375 = 250 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=148108&L=80032&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9Mzc1 "$375 = 250
Miles")_**

**_[$750 = 500 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=148108&L=80033&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9NzUw "$750 = 500
Miles")

[$1,500 = 1,000 Miles](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=148108&L=80034&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMj9hbW91bnQ9MTUwMA== "$1,500 = 1,000
Miles")_**
We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we’re putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back.

**_[So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount.](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=148108&L=80028&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ncmVhdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1wYXRyaW90LXByb2plY3QvYXRmZl9kb25fb21fa3dfdHJ1LWZyZV9yc18yMDIyMDIyMg== "So, I hope you’ll
join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any
amount.")_**

In Liberty,

Truckers for Freedom

subject: BREAKING: we're just a couple points shy

body:
I’ve got an important update on our race, Peter.
We just got a new poll showing we’re just a few points away from hitting the 50% threshold we need to WIN on Election Day. Let me explain why that’s important: with multiple candidates in this race, we need to hit 50% on Election Day to avoid a runoff . If we do that, I will be our nominee for Texas’s 35th District and we’ll be that much closer to passing our bold agenda for working families .
This race is going to be close. With early voting ending TOMORROW, our campaign is working hard to turn out every voter ahead of the March 1st primary. Can you pitch in $35 right now to help us close the gap and win on Election Day? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.24_email]
>> HELP US CLOSE THE GAP << [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.24_email]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.24_email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.24_email]
We’ve worked so hard to get here, Peter. With your help, we’ve built a progressive movement in Texas for good jobs, Medicare for All, protections for reproductive rights, and a functional power grid. We’ve shown that we can deliver a better Texas for working families—and I’m so proud.
But we can’t afford to miss this opportunity. My opponent is spending thousands of dollars attacking me with negative ads – but with your help, we can close the gap to 50% and avoid a runoff. We can win this race on Election Day.
Help us close the gap — chip in $35 right now to help us close the gap and win this race next Tuesday. Together we can celebrate a better Texas for us all. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=02.24_email]
Let’s get this done,
-Greg

subject: Are you clutching your pearls?

body:
You might think gas prices are high now, but the fact is, they will likely become even higher in coming weeks |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=c1e485150a1c48449684da5c08796c96&_t=ezBaGPI3h8nbWFHCIQf9D5h8CilirP5CAlAGtZl_6PLUI9jRN0TsHgEz7Jo-u_vLlwM0WnSQyEC_KuLR5eQspf_tEtl8XI4PGOyGszGEzQMeGsSqHOvynkJT0YGtxdw_i2hoiCDpm3xidF495MB3aHq1IoEjJ7KqM1XPjjEenDM%3D).

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=c1e485150a1c48449684da5c08796c96&_e=U0SsoUvSBm0sREiD3Pe-yD0qhzT7VFmiNycvfzHO-StH6T2ahQ0E87XryXUTQZZBnfvyICN9OLrOPSgl8CVK6j6M6hSJo9w_K1fYJEQryYxoCJsiAizQlOK_skq-olDUAoHjt1oKwvvZfnxzgMRBjEBKrCLc3UEIZBpO0PtFTtsqMBQ1lDzx0LPS5TjB0MrY9zmDxw-Vzlthql2BOD_Lg7b0t2vkB6XLX3v-lofTuiKNFAoKbX8hl91znkMnxujX4st34Lz8Qj5XO0bMMRtSh0adYmPX7vLr6wuxL5mprqDp7_gnYz1_WjT659ZpmcRXdnHsoKUUFEv1zw7pRXebShJZAMC6Yox_9RSlkYKCyXr7OknELsMUqaCFRiFK8y9uhGhuOur6MQzhbbHApXQyUeNDOfthGhClINjLEMqN1Sdg7iGz0wlapT-hNGRbPHDCblPFhIgm39rXrhsLo4pG5L4_D1_H8ig2c3LyL83_60981nek8nHLQ6BTrDelsvfu__scp5OJHM77vanA5Oa6ftM5qSq0HpC8TqTPdmlB9pFuSxgrCXYbvJjgpqzxThE2kiLERVJXkYXCKsenfAEo6m3fQgzUopbSsEoFzbAP3vGVf3Om2GRAswmRE8ZIhbfb)

---
Fellow American,

Here in Palm Beach County, Florida we have the highest gas prices in the state.

You might think gas prices are high now, but the fact is, they will likely become even higher in coming weeks once the full scale of the events taking place in Eastern Europe become clearer.

I don’t know about you, but I’m not sure how much more we can take. Driving is a part of daily life for nearly everyone that I know. The pain at the pump is obviously real for most Americans, yet President Biden seems not to care. What’s more, the ripple effect of higher gas prices will be felt far beyond the gas stations. Higher oil prices mean higher costs of goods and services throughout the economy. Gird yourself, things are about to go from bad to worse.

It didn’t have to be this way, First Name. But then the American people elected Joe Biden and we lost our way.

We were energy independent and now we are relying on Russian oil.

As a candidate for public office, I’m curious to know where you stand on the issue of energy independence: **[Do you think it’s a strategic mistake by the Biden Administration to have come out against fracking and other avenues which America used to become energy independent under President Trump?](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=c1e485150a1c48449684da5c08796c96&_e=U0SsoUvSBm0sREiD3Pe-yD0qhzT7VFmiNycvfzHO-StH6T2ahQ0E87XryXUTQZZBnfvyICN9OLrOPSgl8CVK6j6M6hSJo9w_K1fYJEQryYxoCJsiAizQlOK_skq-olDUAoHjt1oKwvvZfnxzgMRBjEBKrCLc3UEIZBpO0PtFTtsqMBQ1lDzx0LPS5TjB0MrY9zmDxw-Vzlthql2BOD_Lg7b0t2vkB6XLX3v-lofTuiKNFAoKbX8hl91znkMnxujX4st34Lz8Qj5XO0bMMRtSh0adYmPX7vLr6wuxL5mprqDp7_gnYz1_WjT659ZpmcRXdnHsoKUUFEv1zw7pRXebShJZAMC6Yox_9RSlkYKCyXr7OknELsMUqaCFRiFK8y9uhGhuOur6MQzhbbHApXQyUeNDOfthGhClINjLEMqN1SdCbsB9XuCaakGJD61_thH_0YlE5nP3SHE7TvgIHFJDBh8Oolqzrm67hfuhaSlngak0X1A1p-T0SaPXfsBOHyrAX5tmddJOLvsKEqEV0lsO7DuPkX_b4jSSuecJ7oOqmKpIiav37rpTIJEkthQ9tR_SPXXvLqH79VatNGXxQalBdHaZP16OIkhPlSYcDrPqGSDEuZCdNIPMxO6gGVLOJjVf)**

Who do you think did energy independence better? Biden or Trump?

[** VOTE NOW>>**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=c1e485150a1c48449684da5c08796c96&_e=U0SsoUvSBm0sREiD3Pe-yD0qhzT7VFmiNycvfzHO-StH6T2ahQ0E87XryXUTQZZBnfvyICN9OLrOPSgl8CVK6j6M6hSJo9w_K1fYJEQryYxoCJsiAizQlOK_skq-olDUAoHjt1oKwvvZfnxzgMRBjEBKrCLc3UEIZBpO0PtFTtsqMBQ1lDzx0LPS5TjB0MrY9zmDxw-Vzlthql2BOD_Lg7b0t2vkB6XLX3v-lofTuiKNFAoKbX8hl91znkMnxujX4st34Lz8Qj5XO0bMMRtSh0adYmPX7vLr6wuxL5mprqDp7_gnYz1_WjT659ZpmcRXdnHsoKUUFEv1zw7pRXebShJZAMC6Yox_9RSlkYKCyXr7OknELsMUqaCFRiFK8y9uhGhuOur6MQzhbbHApXQyUeNDOfthGhClINjLEMqN1SdWpTjxsz9ITmaFChuyT_4nMrVHKSwbiIi8gTGMV9ehFmx73U4KQ2g4-k-jV_j3TfFcSjavaO5KbdDnNmgJnEAH5YbfZsif4XW4U7sBUZbT8L_XkVHHn_nE1t-EoXKM-nL-LPfcDo5tHqFHo-z6KSJ1zngUq6YfAJlnssSdYP51wwNK0rlc8d8S1b3leCjH1iDzWuilcy0aCJExLQ34izzb)

I know the American people have been clutching their pearls tightly since Biden took office. Unfortunately, we are going to have to clutch them that much tighter until we get some competent leadership in office.

Thank you for participating in my straw poll today!

For Country,

Rod Dorilás

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=c1e485150a1c48449684da5c08796c96&_e=U0SsoUvSBm0sREiD3Pe-yD0qhzT7VFmiNycvfzHO-StH6T2ahQ0E87XryXUTQZZBnfvyICN9OLrOPSgl8CVK6j6M6hSJo9w_K1fYJEQryYxoCJsiAizQlOK_skq-olDUAoHjt1oKwvvZfnxzgMRBjEBKrCLc3UEIZBpO0PtFTtsqMBQ1lDzx0LPS5TjB0MrY9zmDxw-Vzlthql2BOD_Lg7b0t2vkB6XLX3v-lofTuiKNFAoKbX8hl91znkMnxujX4st34Lz8Qj5XO0bMMRtSh0adYmPX7vLr6wuxL5mprqDp7_gnYz1_WjT659ZpmcRXdnHsoKUUFEv1zw7pRXebShJZAMC6Yox_9RSlkYKCyXr7OknELsMUqaCFRiFK8y9uhGhuOur6MQzhbbHApXQyUeNDOfthGhClINjLEMqN1ScyAuPgGerRqCVWxL3F4Y1MtWd8WtOcer_LPKljbun6W4WggrQX3WD2gLLtOaTuyTii06T6dL4_jHN4pUbZj7-84r-DXexXLwzn6ze2ZgfubEJGDE4xDlvfS87zRRLorGgp1i5bB2rf8_7xe5M4jJtMk_GMvHlEqvV2hnACv7j1Wq0i9f4n8q1DX2XQRTKd6oc5V4FTIo6MSMhKy1s_bSYp)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ed=20Thelander=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Russian Aggression Goes Beyond Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
As Europe remains on high alert, Congress remains silent. The world is watching us tosee if we will reject authoritarianism and protect democracy. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/59ed88fa2f54/a-strong-finish-to-8853478?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=e45f42ac80&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| |
> FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:
>
> RUSSIAN AGGRESSION GOES BEYOND UKRAINE
> _A Message from Ed Thelander, candidate for Maine’s 1st Congressional District Regarding the Situation in Ukraine_
>
> BRISTOL, ME – “As Europe remains on high alert, Congress remains silent. The world is watching us to see if we will reject authoritarianism and protect democracy like we have done so many times in the past. Congress has an obligation to convey to the American people what actions they are going to take to de-escalate conflict and prevent future bloodshed in Ukraine, and all sovereign nations around the globe. Congress should aid all preparations to assist American citizens still in Ukraine; we must avoid a repeat of the Afghanistan catastrophe.
>
> “The cost of a barrel of oil has skyrocketed to over $100, causing massive economic hardships for Americans in the very near future. Congress must pressure President Biden to reopen the Keystone pipeline and provide much needed economic relief to the American people.
>
> “This goes beyond Ukraine. If Russia is able to run unchecked into Ukraine, then China will likely seize the opportunity to take Taiwan. The world is changing right now before our eyes, more than any other time in decades. Are we falling back to a second-rate European nation? Lithuania just delivered stinger missiles to Kiev. What has America done?
>
> “We have an obligation to aid all our citizens here at home while also protecting democracy abroad. As your next Congressman, I will lead with courage, integrity, and an extreme sense of urgency; all sorely needed in today's US Congress.”
>
> _Ed Thelander is a retired Navy SEAL who lives in Bristol, Maine, and is a candidate for Congress in Maine’s 1st Congressional District._
> _###_
> * * *
>
> For More Information, contact:
> Mike Pajak
> Campaign Manager
> (207) 449-5636
> [www.thelanderforcongress.com](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=4082d1130f&e=f8a0a76a2b)
> * * *
>
>

subject: The Petition CHALLENGE!! Can YOU do it?
body:
50 Patriots --- 50 Petitions Each --- Are YOU up for the Challenge?

** Dear Patriots,
------------------------------------------------------------
The Martz Campaign has initiated a CHALLENGE. We are asking 50 people to commit to getting 50 Candidate Petition Forms signed by March 26th. This will help us reach the goal of 2600 signatures.

The forms must be turned in to the Campaign by March 26th. On March 27th we will have a celebration gathering where gifts will be given to participants.

The form can be printed from the Campaign website under the heading "Form". The forms can be mailed to the Campaign or they can be picked up my a member of the Campaign.

Please reply to this email if you are accepting the *Challenge!*

Thank you in advance for you help.

Stay Free,

Melissa Martz Campaign

### FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:
## Oregon Gubernatorial Candidate Marc Thielman Publicly Calls Out Woke Mob While Announcing Full-Time Focus on Candidacy
Gubernatorial candidate Marc Thielman addressed the public directly on [_social media_](https://u22856175.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=Qqu2eGArjYt8p8lYGOqE7auYGiA7P4zLGNKA6DRSTaIH3e2oLLWfXJJG9pssYVib9-2B4vdcx72D8ttXIVI19VnxiPUc6mnx1lshtfwvt3bmo-3D_Uc6_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6AztbqTZVwCYFtoUiqoanXIq85ixhQjH2CMqpWlOIjZKPLioixwPWADVYD96b0rGFThXTyeCr547f8luPXjBU-2F-2FldlmHlqncvuj-2FladFFxRE287xYuZbCWvvt516HoPPcuVuzi3OmQxRB0-2FKSsEm28LUpldCwO9kPr2JsIf0npgc8hRKlB-2B-2Fupv5tGDwA1dWQGegCqlNlQhk8NmpdNAHM3qlLDQWynQ3bfDRfuD4IeOi5-2FzRfiq9DcL71mHBQD5UTsD9EkcZ-2F2Yy1r15Frzi5Z-2FengHi0uC5A44eMUH1ZxugNQ7z9Z9d9XERtDd7x-2BPF-2FsskpaSuOyU7ivlQwCQuy-2Bxczk7RTmDyBZz6kj-2BYQ9x-2BSeiHGuFkB12iQocsa6RdIrKU79HG-2F-2F8mn8qavIgOD0Wd36iJmdFy7DXoi1NdEiM6QEHzZFeoXykNrCgFDVthzXJgHaKz-2FSEBj7-2FuuN9WD35qJCcd2Xuqzpbgrelrs8BXaZN5TX5eP-2F9tNjGdTqejIZZX6Gx6CHzcfRBAlY8gNSfNyVup6kcwapOU8bxTvz68mbIHV2NLupWTMebwo1euCWwpMuH8418JThpP8wvdva5PMPq5-2Fe8HDzuhUlAcJM3dUFsj8-2BYQOA5aatm9bxwtIDQ7detSUdCdKafKHzP68QbCrI5ybWCxdLIhwsqruX6gWXGC5OaY4-2FakG5xiXVOxJ8HfNka0b15lXAeB5eKQ7KOg6A3u0lToNexp3bi5CUKsWAum3QU5SVR5ktcuNL6ob8FrmvCVGnM45Nh8XlXs5Q0LgWylk7WV5f7-2BGXhamdFc-3D) following the announcement of his departure from his role as Superintendent of the Alsea School District in an emergency board meeting Tuesday night.
“I have realized that to affect the greatest good, I must fully get out of a broken system in order to fix it. Effective immediately, I have resigned as the Superintendent of the Alsea School District.

“Most recently under my leadership, and in concert with the School Board, we endeavored to FIGHT FOR THE FREEDOM to educate our children in person under local control and restore the right of students and parents to make their own decisions regarding masking. Little did anyone know that this reasonable action would shake the very foundation of the Oregon state government and spark a Mask Optional Movement that inspired whole communities and garnered national attention.

“This BOLD ACTION to advocate for children and parents violated the woke mob’s need for total control of your life. I invite everyone to pay close attention to how the mob continued to open new assaults against me. Disgruntled parties hell-bent on their own agendas are making up lies, spreading slander, and now leveraging board member recalls to make their compliance complete. They are uniformly focused on a hate war against me and this school board for daring to PRIORITIZE PARENTAL RIGHTS.

“Progressive activists and agencies of the press continue to launch attacks against me using slander and libel. They are wholesale printing unsubstantiated, libelous claims without even seeking the truth. Anyone who knows me knows the truth. But I know the vitriol focused on me isn’t even about me; it’s about total control.

“The woke mob didn’t know what it was doing when it came after me. It only awakened an even more committed warrior.

“I’m tired of their deceptive, insidious agenda. We all are. And we know it is going to take a total overhaul to undo their infected plans. The time is now: WE CAN'T WAIT ANY LONGER. There’s too much at stake—4.3 million Oregonians are waiting on a way out of this tyranny.

“Cancel culture fights against true freedom, instead of empowering individual autonomy because the mob is about forcing compliance.

---

“Be very clear that THIS MADNESS IS NOT ABOUT THE KIDS; it is about adult ideological agendas. And these agendas proceed from entrenched czars drunk with the power to make you—the taxpayers footing the bill—pay for their whims while they are stealing the education of your children and the FUTURE OF OREGON.

“With my departure, I am CHANGING THE ALTITUDE of where I’m fighting for you. Make no mistake, I am going to CONTINUE TO FIGHT, but not in the weeds with the snakes: I aim to fight for you—for all of us—as the future head of the Department of Education as YOUR NEXT GOVERNOR.

“I ask you to join me as we take on the Goliath mob and WIN.”

Upon the release of his public statement, Marc Thielman’s campaign has seen a steep rise in donations and public support from across Oregon.

**About the Marc for Oregon Gubernatorial Campaign**
_Marc Thielman is a Republican candidate for governor in Oregon and former Superintendent of the Alsea School District. The Marc for Oregon campaign is a grassroots constitutionally-minded campaign that promotes restoring the power to the people and ending government overreach. clean_body: | | | | Marc Thielman, Candidate for Oregon Governor and now former superintendent, calls out the woke mob as he aims his full focus on winning the Republican primary. Media Contact: mailto:media@marcfororegon.com?subject=&body= Phone:tel:8054032889 | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: Oregon Gubernatorial Candidate Marc Thielman Publicly Calls Out Woke Mob While Announcing Full-Time Focus on Candidacy Gubernatorial candidate Marc Thielman addressed the public directly on following the announcement of his departure from his role as Superintendent of the Alsea School District in an emergency board meeting Tuesday night. “I have realized that to affect the greatest good, I must fully get out of a broken system in order to fix it. Effective immediately, I have resigned as the Superintendent of the Alsea School District. “Most recently under my leadership, and in concert with the School Board, we endeavored to FIGHT FOR THE FREEDOM to educate our children in person under local control and restore the right of students and parents to make their own decisions regarding masking. Little did anyone know that this reasonable action would shake the very foundation of the Oregon state government and spark a Mask Optional Movement that inspired whole communities and garnered national attention. “This BOLD ACTION to advocate for children and parents violated the woke mob’s need for total control of your life. I invite everyone to pay close attention to how the mob continued to open new assaults against me. Disgruntled parties hell-bent on their own agendas are making up lies, spreading slander, and now leveraging board member recalls to make their compliance complete. They are uniformly focused on a hate war against me and this school board for daring to PRIORITIZE PARENTAL RIGHTS. “Progressive activists and agencies of the press continue to launch attacks against me using slander and libel. They are wholesale printing unsubstantiated, libelous claims without even seeking the truth. Anyone who knows me knows the truth. But I know the vitriol focused on me isn’t even about me; it’s about total control. “The woke mob didn’t know what it was doing when it came after me. It only awakened an even more committed warrior. “I’m tired of their deceptive, insidious agenda. We all are. And we know it is going to take a total overhaul to undo their infected plans. The time is now: WE CAN'T WAIT ANY LONGER. There’s too much at stake—4.3 million Oregonians are waiting on a way out of this tyranny. “Cancel culture fights against true freedom, instead of empowering individual autonomy because the mob is about forcing compliance. “Be very clear that THIS MADNESS IS NOT ABOUT THE KIDS; it is about adult ideological agendas. And these agendas proceed from entrenched czars drunk with the power to make you—the taxpayers footing the bill—pay for their whims while they are stealing the education of your children and the FUTURE OF OREGON. “With my departure, I am CHANGING THE ALTITUDE of where I’m fighting for you. Make no mistake, I am going to CONTINUE TO FIGHT, but not in the weeds with the snakes: I aim to fight for you—for all of us—as the future head of the Department of Education as YOUR NEXT GOVERNOR. “I ask you to join me as we take on the Goliath mob and WIN.” Upon the release of his public statement, Marc Thielman’s campaign has seen a steep rise in donations and public support from across Oregon. | About the Marc for Oregon Gubernatorial Campaign Marc Thielman is a Republican candidate for governor in Oregon and former Superintendent of the Alsea School District. The Marc for Oregon campaign is a grassroots constitutionally-minded campaign that promotes restoring the power to the people and ending government overreach. For more information about Marc for Oregon, visit , contactmailto:media@marcfororegon.com?subject=Press Release&body= or calltel:8054032889 for interview requests, emailmailto:info@marcfororegon.com?subject=&body= for general inquiries, and follow @marcfororegon on social media. | JOIN US | | | | PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, 97709

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: McSwain discusses rising crime, law and order plan in Pittsburgh
body:
Bill McSwain visited Pittsburgh to discuss the city's rising crime and share his plan to restore law and order across the Commonwealth. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/mcswain-announces-plan-to-restore-law-and-order-8850740?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**February 24, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain visits Pittsburgh to address rising crime, share plan to restore law and order
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain today held a press conference to address the surge in crime in Pittsburgh and to discuss his plan to restore law and order as Governor. In his remarks, McSwain promised to take back the streets of Pittsburgh from the rioters, looters, and repeat offenders who have been emboldened a result of soft-on-crime policies promoted by Governor Tom Wolf and AG Josh Shapiro.

McSwain, describing himself as the law and order candidate, promised to restore safety and security to Pittsburgh communities:
---
|
> **_"_**_**The city of Pittsburgh and its neighboring areas are currently in the midst of a destructive spike in crime, specifically violent crime, and law abiding citizens feel trapped and under attack. The**** progressive Democrat leadership are more concerned with protecting criminals than they are about protecting law-abiding citizens. **_
>
> **_Enough is enough. As Governor, I will demand on a daily basis that the Mayor, the District Attorney, the Attorney General and others in this city and all across this Commonwealth do their jobs. And when they don’t, I will force them to – using the full power of the Governor’s office. When it comes to protecting you, your families and our communities, I will do whatever it takes."_**
---
|
---
| McSwain also outlined his full plan to restore law and order to the Commonwealth:
---
| |
# **MCSWAIN'S PLAN TO RESTORE LAW AND ORDER TO PENNSYLVANIA: **
* Implement bail reform with automatic pretrial detention for violent felonies. There will be no more revolving door criminal justice.
* Aggressively pursue the death penalty for anyone convicted of killing a law enforcement officer.
* Increase funding for local law enforcement and hunt down violent criminals by any means necessary, including the use of the State Police and the National Guard.
* Stop rioting, looting, sanctuary cities, heroin injection sites, as well as Joe Biden’s ridiculous plan for crack pipe giveaways. As U.S. Attorney, McSwain stopped heroin injection sites and guarantees that they will not exist in this Commonwealth when he is Governor.
* Create financial incentives to recruit new law enforcement officers and ensure financial security for current law enforcement families by giving them more pay, and a secure retirement.
* Lead the effort to pass a state constitutional amendment that the District Attorney of a city of the first class will be appointed by the Governor. There is only one such city in our Commonwealth, and it is Philadelphia. The time has come for this change. The Governor should have the responsibility to appoint the chief law enforcement officer of the largest – and now, the deadliest – city in our Commonwealth. That is how we will rid Philadelphia of District Attorney Larry Krasner.

---
|
---
| Addressing local community members, McSwain blamed soft-on-crime policies for the untimely murder of Uber driver Christine Spicuzza, whose assailant was released on bail just days before Spicuzza's death:
---
| **_"_**_**The madness of revolving door criminal justice needs to end.**_**_The_** _** police do their job and arrest the perpetrators, but then they get out hours later on bail – or even no bail – only to commit the same violent crimes over and over again.**** T**_** _he accused murderer in Christi Spicuzza’s case had been arrested just days before the murder on a separate gun charge, but was immediately released. _**_**Violent criminals belong in jail – they need to be incapacitated so they cannot harm, maim, and murder in our communities. **

**To the Spicuzza family—please know that you are in our prayers. And also know that we will do everything possible to prevent this from happening to another family again."**_
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=18384385d2&e=b1ec95759b)
###
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=18f67f9990&e=b1ec95759b)
---
| | [](billmcswain.com)
---

You can [update your preferences](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=f8245c7a14) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=f8245c7a14).

name: Deb Finkenauer
subject: Sharing a special story about my daughter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
She's going to defeat Sen. Grassley and become the youngest woman elected to the Senate.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42195582/332043869/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk678-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRkNDIwZS1kMjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8wd6JSntb0Wkg1D6IwSL_LvQ6jamr_eCvZHaGh8UHE=)
Hi there, Peter – it's Deb, and you're looking at a photo of me and my daughter, Abby, enjoying cupcakes we baked together the other night. You might be wondering: What the heck do cupcakes have to do with Abby's Senate race against Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) here in Iowa? **Well, if you give me just a moment, I'd love to explain.**
In 2019, Abby agreed to host eight Democratic presidential candidates, multiple union presidents and hundreds of voters at her Finkenauer Fish Fry event. I knew this was an especially important moment for Abby and a valuable opportunity for Iowans to hear from these leaders. So when she asked for my help making the day a success, I happily agreed.
We knew that her guests would be eager to talk politics and just as eager to eat, so Abby tasked me with making dessert. **Over a few days, I baked nearly 1,000 cupcakes – chocolate, pumpkin, red velvet, a flavor for everyone!** I even ran out of space in my freezer to store them. (Thankfully, my husband's pickup truck and sub-freezing temperatures provided the perfect backup.)
**You see, our family understands the meaning of hard work and the importance of showing up for each other.** That's how we raised Abby, and it's how she won election to the Iowa House at only 25 and then became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from red to blue.
Now, thanks to that same work ethic, she's going to defeat Sen. Grassley, become the youngest woman elected to the Senate and give Iowa families the fighter in Washington that we need. **But this has never been a one-woman team. From cupcakes to grassroots donations, Abby is counting on this scrappy, passionate team to stand with her.**
**Iowa is ready for Abby – nearly two-thirds of likely voters here don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley![That's why today I'm asking you to make a contribution to my daughter's campaign of $5, or whatever you can spare, so that she has the resources to defeat Sen. Grassley, bring new leadership to Iowa and protect our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42195583/332043870/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk678-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRkNDIwZS1kMjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8wd6JSntb0Wkg1D6IwSL_LvQ6jamr_eCvZHaGh8UHE=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42195584/332043871/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk678-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRkNDIwZS1kMjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8wd6JSntb0Wkg1D6IwSL_LvQ6jamr_eCvZHaGh8UHE=)
---
Thank you for standing with my daughter. It means the world to Jerry, Abby and me.

– Deb Finkenauer (Abby's mom)

name: Team McGrath
subject: Voter suppression is a danger to our democracy.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
People’s right to choose our elected leaders is fundamental.

| **Peter, Republicans in Wisconsin’s legislature recently passed legislation that would make it more difficult for Wisconsinites to cast their ballots.**

Across the country, radical elements of the right-wing are attempting to reshape our electoral processes to give their party an edge — an edge that comes at the cost of our sacred right to vote.

In the great democracy we call home, it is our fundamental right to elect the leaders who represent us, and it is essential that we have a representative who will fight to defend it. I served in central Europe for years in National Security, and know that tyranny happens in small steps.

**[Deb is ready to go to Congress to be a champion for voting rights, but she needs your support. subject: What “toss-up” means
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
The outcome here will come down to us.

Friends, We’ll keep this pretty short. Every analysis of the upcoming election here in Nevada comes to the same conclusion: it’s going to be one of the closest races in the country. And the stakes are very high. Winning this close race would mean continuing our progress: making health care more affordable, helping our public schools, and recovering from the pandemic. But falling short would endanger it all — while also opening the door to new attacks on our voting rights and on Nevadans’ right to choose. **[Folks, we have a major fundraising deadline coming up in just a few days, and your support right now is critical. name: Eric Gash
subject: My thoughts on what's happening in Ukraine.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Gash for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42195755/332051663/-851526706?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzZmZjI2Yy1kNTk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QF7aNjMtLYi8O671y64RKE-gzGnMQsHEllNWCexCb0A=)
Friend,

Like many of you, I've been following the horrific, unprovoked Russian invasion of Ukraine as it unfolds. I want to make sure you know where I stand.

Ukraine is a peaceful, sovereign nation. Its people value their culture and their independence, and they are going to great lengths to defend their country. I've even seen reports of senior citizens and school children preparing for Russian attacks.

What Putin is doing is not "genius" and it's certainly not "peacekeeping." It's barbaric, and it's a violation of international law. Any American leader who doesn't unequivocally disavow his actions is standing with Russia, with China, and against the ideals of liberty and democracy on which our country was founded. Leading with misinformation, threats, and violence needs to be called out for what it really is - authoritarianism. We won't stand for it.

My family and I are praying for the strength and safety of the Ukrainian people as well as the thousands of Russian citizens who've taken to the streets to protest these attacks.

Eric
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42195756/332051664/-851526706?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzZmZjI2Yy1kNTk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QF7aNjMtLYi8O671y64RKE-gzGnMQsHEllNWCexCb0A=)
---

name: Erika Benfield
subject: I stand with our First Responders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress
body:
Will you join me? [](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRHKIqKh5TFndXS03uN380pSObTF5lpJIGdlxCMMbaaZ0fzVZQK-Uv0fBP24Ia8-_AKcU1b4MIcQuv1tFNHbwoDPCAZlmnglFVlD-GU4Wwhus1phRy6MXafNr00wU2wYkS4-3m0dP_nCix7TLRl7aJ-L0kQho_8U1gGOVu-bwqp056cBUM3f9qFMFzDizgHPQmu637xCd65BUBknhMkn4QMTNuWHTir-K6S0-PvP8rXHwHBFTuF6U2krNzYOCzcmGnyr854oP04YpwoQ9ehFlPG0i_kGlCAPwnbOzZeFQbKehxOaT_cwww69qSmxOIVhlsw%3D%3D) Hi Peter, [**Florida’s first responders put their lives on the line every day to keep our communities healthy and safe.**](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRHKIqKh5TFndXS03uN380pSObTF5lpJIGdlxCMMbaaZ0fzVZQK-Uv0fBP24Ia8-_AKcU1b4MIcQuv1tFNHbwoDPCAZlmnglFVlD-GU4Wwhus_-06wHmMp_XlP7s7PGrg0sc1L1jXNfyJbNawuvydseEvVdkUQYnNt4xAyUt0OgLI0IKY-DvDk1OdaBI0PpScx77XMqt_J7auPFo6QtocwanwytHGjG3DdD-_keLE58rZu8J-CEAj7Mi-jHpewhekI5uDa-5NjmFHYFKVS1r7YPb_VYsyLmRoPV1WU4v6E1kRbmBySaWlJOCputVJxWDQKA%3D%3D) There is no room for calls to “defund the police” or violence against our heroes in this district. Our first responders deserve so much better. When I get to Congress, I will make sure they get the support they have earned. Today, I am proud to share I have the support of the first responders – police officers, firefighters, and emergency medical service members – across Central Florida who came together and formed a support group for my candidacy. [**Would you kindly consider donating so we can make sure we have the resources needed to host events and volunteer activities on the campaign trail?**](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRHKIqKh5TFndXS03uN380pSObTF5lpJIGdlxCMMbaaZ0fzVZQK-Uv0fBP24Ia8-_AKcU1b4MIcQuv1tFNHbwoDPCAZlmnglFVlD-GU4WwhusbUoS1GI82RHMSgdrMTAoKHYGAkBQWiVKU1wD62cMtbKWyJ1dlUy0V00Kbwvepii5kEqRlSviDbW0ktsdTe4-4LIJ0EpULQXacSuHouW5G4EonF67CEkCLS_8BFB8_UAnDdEZJ5hzsExzc9Cp7QOJmVsy3SSSdrj4Teq3W_sHeBoPw9MklEJFi_VUUAbGdrc97Gj2oOwLANQcesFcl-buEg%3D%3D) [](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRHKIqKh5TFndXS03uN380pSObTF5lpJIGdlxCMMbaaZ0fzVZQK-Uv0fBP24Ia8-_AKcU1b4MIcQuv1tFNHbwoDPCAZlmnglFVlD-GU4Wwhus_Bt3L1nDw2OO1WgZqF1HmdlD2UvEDeDy05VGvIZ4kCJRnFwxE1U9cOPOE9ZmchdzgsQCbVQGTL2fpoZYEGCp2_QhLbpMt-z6Ci3ihF5pTEjflVxT2cHeoqD0q2bB6HVCouhbfKNQDHvezPMi7SySLn_XOwp8K4JcplQ4lKvoFn0fxx8XTkUCLYpFaWWxJw1ZDgbGgoiZ9gLMuK_tdSpkhQ%3D%3D) [**Donate $20
**](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRHKIqKh5TFndXS03uN380pSObTF5lpJIGdlxCMMbaaZ0fzVZQK-Uv0fBP24Ia8-_AKcU1b4MIcQuv1tFNHbwoDPCAZlmnglFVlD-GU4Wwhus6BlpX8Ucp5KGNnMecGmJMkP1BETgIhZq2RcSaViBFAzWVLobxfxa3MmB73-KLdUPBQGyMFsoo7uxHMVP8AfXT84DSKkvr_mZHqmHppri2g_YH193fxHIXvARbpAiqIU284Thv39xNMJCca3VSkCLfrB4y4zM6ZzJPTi7hnTHgaA_NfT5dX8E6XUvTCt4oOvUS4CkEJ70T5jOLxe3h513Gg%3D%3D) [**Donate $40
**](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRHKIqKh5TFndXS03uN380pSObTF5lpJIGdlxCMMbaaZ0fzVZQK-Uv0fBP24Ia8-_AKcU1b4MIcQuv1tFNHbwoDNyB82NKIF5LPP3iYK_Rw6n2Z6TkOYWAYZ0n-DikIcec-fUtGJE6RVje6sU33P5Tz1CXKEbjSvH6CX-BcqfAIB76PDTR7tsurcjTyWQ3sEJx3HlXm7KFjs6n5lGhyfEREQqPuBRe_kMVxJWt3iWgwuG2gizsXdTLYekRCkU_TRKoAAuhKhzZmMmH5oe3afLmUuA5pZQce8tgPOfWj3U1oIz7prcA-3K8KHWLpaC3dDMGyrhSJ2aE4j7bzysTUcZDlE%3D) [**Donate $60**](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRHKIqKh5TFndXS03uN380pSObTF5lpJIGdlxCMMbaaZ0fzVZQK-Uv0fBP24Ia8-_AKcU1b4MIcQuv1tFNHbwoDNyB82NKIF5LPP3iYK_Rw6nIjSKXuler2jltjq9cvRSsufbdLMx_fKl1PzNygs-vgjpd-k3loPrjw7Eio8MgLqrCclBSF03FKi4vvcp4GQ-cKi9RScsk0z_M3P6WYuW1XnFpXQ0vbscwXK9R8BFbsdo61apJehwMlw2LlOMtTIB63DQSH5Ch6o-CyFsd-e4fdSY_RSWCCXLUXO4964xOSu3gUzS07nu5I-ks4psJ2Ek_dohR0z098IhICRm5NrbjYY%3D) [**Donate Any Amount**](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRHKIqKh5TFndXS03uN380pSObTF5lpJIGdlxCMMbaaZ0fzVZQK-Uv0fBP24Ia8-_AKcU1b4MIcQuv1tFNHbwoDPCAZlmnglFVlD-GU4Wwhus3g1hr_6hCEowNlFBsL89InG7ifCzIHvJfEgY_WIKG1pwUp5cQfVzwxa0lxJmrN7IzzJ9yGjAZjSTpaK9wmvhWwADNlGGk6LglzxKXUnlkruGm4jHCVdwjEA-SLXg9iDzoQ7Y9WjVMAQtBsNDV-AZy6v7msSHSgBpOBi-x_R2HfToQUUawc05NOqNilVQ5L2DSWQeAi4Y3Ms-2qq-Fxbm0A%3D%3D) I can’t imagine a world without first responders, and, frankly, I don’t want to. It’s an honor to know this coalition has my back, and they know I will never stop having theirs. Join us, **Erika Benfield** _Candidate for Congress, FL_ | | [](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRCqCyR6PfTGIqAhskyOs5qm3FU4zDldAG4jeY-r-XC56aRgqiEcGiYvWJmLTy-kPftVXYu_IZZu1SgqQ0dVdXtQcjZy8xgYoj-3HnD-Ne5XMGFQUrfhHX-R6daAIKW0BmFJeXkoKJIJ2TFakuKP30cL8FlJogiA3S31C_IxzeH6FhdyXH1unNyolbAiBj8fJLO7NWfEml8G1mCvVAS8Ab9DZKwJPeQljIWF3ko1b1A1QDbd00uWVpoST2DC6umM7ZhIfVHFDIT7oaHwyB5GLuSk%3D) | [](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRKTXl5dXXf_hIwfYQh4iqWX9hlogSPmTPAWOKWyc6CFCSFhQiFZOgiq4us2t2DCJ3hyBcWpUa_rfpKvdf24B8HdolgrK_e80jI-k8b5SVW2Dv0CP4LLLpqApJOPJLQwtFDpvTbXUscnYbs4HI9mGCo0IVj9dbIxt2bjZWtvLPQn6c_sA6W217dfDTcuXu3poG1QlFS8xdwWocTClCTpMBvDRrW4p_2my6nwxlL0UhC8aidy0pJwkKoV6Fl8Hkv4WgQ%3D%3D) | [](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=27f9d376bb4744b68b5364df3c04d567&_e=JnLjhjRZ7RFM5QkcvkfZRBORzToYT6x9jc_RDnECkcAuPlUgLDfZZFI-d06YGewc-cEQoqIWI2K6s0I3lzhcIol_Dm0_WplSD7JVMzr-anREfUw-IpAqRvECET69UAYOMnoKGWjD0Q2KPQwp7DKwr52rmYcMLmhoShT9rw8I9afIfyHF7WYQ2JMJToM2EkW14Vxg7Rh6hmgCD6S4ZGcPj_7oj-t847gn6mShuYMRp-g6SqLYSW7vGnrD6bCS-iJZn19vuQQ1LLTWnxgdgpcTlSr7nbI-FtZjPpKgQx2P7CA%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Democrats continue to destroy our history
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e1e7baf64d91/democrats-continue-to-destroy-our-history?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=f2bfa5ceac&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| Dear ,

Yesterday, I joined a group of protesters in Prince William County in opposing the development of a new data center that would corrupt the landscape of the Manassas National Battlefield Park.

For years on the Prince William County Board of Supervisors I have proudly stood for smart development, working with developers and interest groups to make decisions that are good for residents of Prince William County, while also protecting and conserving our rural areas and historic sites.

This particular project would be a blight on the landscape of the Manassas Battlefield and would devastate the landscape of one of our most historic sites. [You can watch NBC4 Washington's coverage of the protest here, including my interview at the event.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=3dcace53c4&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [ ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d7a97057f7&e=fc83fb200d)
---
|
For months, I have been asking Representative Jennifer Wexton to weigh in on this issue and join us in our efforts to preserve history. Sadly, Representative Wexton has done nothing more than send a singular letter to the Board of Supervisors asking them to "consider carefully." Unfortunately, this kind of lack-luster language is far too common from the Democrats that represent us.

Now, I'm running against Jennifer Wexton to represent the constituents of Virginia's 10th Congressional District.

In Congress I will continue to defend our history and put an end to the destructive agenda of the radical left. Democrats would like to see our history buried under new construction and removed from our public education system. clean_body: | | | | | | | "Donate" | Dear , Yesterday, I joined a group of protesters in Prince William County in opposing the development of a new data center that would corrupt the landscape of the Manassas National Battlefield Park. For years on the Prince William County Board of Supervisors I have proudly stood for smart development, working with developers and interest groups to make decisions that are good for residents of Prince William County, while also protecting and conserving our rural areas and historic sites. This particular project would be a blight on the landscape of the Manassas Battlefield and would devastate the landscape of one of our most historic sites. | | For months, I have been asking Representative Jennifer Wexton to weigh in on this issue and join us in our efforts to preserve history. Sadly, Representative Wexton has done nothing more than send a singular letter to the Board of Supervisors asking them to "consider carefully." Unfortunately, this kind of lack-luster language is far too common from the Democrats that represent us. Now, I'm running against Jennifer Wexton to represent the constituents of Virginia's 10th Congressional District. In Congress I will continue to defend our history and put an end to the destructive agenda of the radical left. Democrats would like to see our history buried under new construction and removed from our public education system. I think it is important that our history is preserved, and that our children have the opportunity to learn the history of our great country. | "Contribute $10" | "Contribute $25" | "Contribute $50" | "Contribute $100" | "Contribute any amount" | Thank you for standing with me, and I look forward to serving our country on your behalf.
