name: Toby Anderson
subject: A statement from Toby Anderson on Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Toby Anderson for Congress Inc
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/5a5deec96549091a/0667ea6d39ecb15ac3d6b838967d376c/38863)
---
Biden has just announced another set of inadequate measures against Russia. Putin has made clear that he considers Ukraine, Poland, the Baltic Republics, and Slovakia to be historical Russian territory. He is invading Ukraine now. There is no reason to believe that a tyrannical dictator, motivated by evil, will end his conquest in Ukraine. When Russia pushes further, we are at war. Combination of Executive and Congressional legislation required:
1. Immediately Write-off all US public and private debt held by the Russian government, corporations, and private citizens wherever they may reside (unless they are US permanent residents). Any individual or entity that tries to purchase that debt will be subject to the same effect. This needs to be backed up by an act of Congress.
2. All Russian assets and income that are in US territory are to be frozen, seized and used to pay for supplies for Ukraine (military and non-military supplies) and for the training of the Ukrainians to fight Russian aggression until the Russians abandon this invasion.
3. Require all Russian Federation citizens legally within the US to declare within 14 days their goal to seek citizenship or not (if eligible). If they choose not to (or are not eligible), then they will face immediate expulsion to a 3rd country.
4. Open up all previously closed Oil and Gas production and distribution to boost supply to meet the demand needs of all of our allies that use Russian oil and gas. Also, bring our allies on board to do the same.
5. Provide a temporary subsidy to export LNG and oil products to Europe and Ukraine (to all Russian customers) to match Russian pricing. This subsidy expires when Russia withdraws from Ukraine or 1 year - whichever is sooner.
6. Liquidate seized Russian and Belarusian assets to pay for war materiel for Ukraine.

Executive/Diplomatic Actions:
1. Compel our allies and 3rd countries to leave Russian sources of energy once we have replaced their supply.
2. Require Each NATO country to put out an unequivocal statement that if Russia attacks any NATO country, no matter how close or small, they will declare war on Russia and defend their allies until Russia is expelled back to within its own borders or surrenders.
3. Require Belarus to immediately break with Russia or be treated as an aggressor that is subject to all of the same measures as Russia.

In 1 week (or sooner if needed) - if the invasion has not stopped and Ukrainian resistance is collapsing, then:
1. Immediately call upon allied countries close to Ukraine to call up their reserves for a long-term mobilization in preparation for a Russian attack.
2. Commit some US troops to the defense of NATO, but reserve the vast majority for a Chinese attack on Taiwan. Our partner NATO countries will need to carry much of the European fight so we can ward off China's next move.
3. Use the Defense Production Act to ramp up production of war material (weaponry, vehicles, and supplies).
4. Shut Russia and Belarus out of the SWIFT system (accommodates European requests, but forces the issue in a week).

We need strength through deterrence. If we are armed, ready, and poised to counter-attack, then we are more likely to get our enemies to back down or restrain themselves and avoid more violent conflict. Toby Anderson
---

clean_body: | | | Biden has just announced another set of inadequate measures against Russia. Putin has made clear that he considers Ukraine, Poland, the Baltic Republics, and Slovakia to be historical Russian territory. He is invading Ukraine now. There is no reason to believe that a tyrannical dictator, motivated by evil, will end his conquest in Ukraine. When Russia pushes further, we are at war. Combination of Executive and Congressional legislation required: 1. Immediately Write-off all US public and private debt held by the Russian government, corporations, and private citizens wherever they may reside (unless they are US permanent residents). Any individual or entity that tries to purchase that debt will be subject to the same effect. This needs to be backed up by an act of Congress. 2. All Russian assets and income that are in US territory are to be frozen, seized and used to pay for supplies for Ukraine (military and non-military supplies) and for the training of the Ukrainians to fight Russian aggression until the Russians abandon this invasion. 3. Require all Russian Federation citizens legally within the US to declare within 14 days their goal to seek citizenship or not (if eligible). If they choose not to (or are not eligible), then they will face immediate expulsion to a 3rd country. 4. Open up all previously closed Oil and Gas production and distribution to boost supply to meet the demand needs of all of our allies that use Russian oil and gas. Also, bring our allies on board to do the same. 5. Provide a temporary subsidy to export LNG and oil products to Europe and Ukraine (to all Russian customers) to match Russian pricing. This subsidy expires when Russia withdraws from Ukraine or 1 year - whichever is sooner. 6. Liquidate seized Russian and Belarusian assets to pay for war materiel for Ukraine. Executive/Diplomatic Actions: 1. Compel our allies and 3rd countries to leave Russian sources of energy once we have replaced their supply. 2. Require Each NATO country to put out an unequivocal statement that if Russia attacks any NATO country, no matter how close or small, they will declare war on Russia and defend their allies until Russia is expelled back to within its own borders or surrenders. 3. Require Belarus to immediately break with Russia or be treated as an aggressor that is subject to all of the same measures as Russia. In 1 week (or sooner if needed) - if the invasion has not stopped and Ukrainian resistance is collapsing, then: 1. Immediately call upon allied countries close to Ukraine to call up their reserves for a long-term mobilization in preparation for a Russian attack. 2. Commit some US troops to the defense of NATO, but reserve the vast majority for a Chinese attack on Taiwan. Our partner NATO countries will need to carry much of the European fight so we can ward off China's next move. 3. Use the Defense Production Act to ramp up production of war material (weaponry, vehicles, and supplies). 4. Shut Russia and Belarus out of the SWIFT system (accommodates European requests, but forces the issue in a week). We need strength through deterrence. If we are armed, ready, and poised to counter-attack, then we are more likely to get our enemies to back down or restrain themselves and avoid more violent conflict. Toby Anderson | | ---|--- | | Paid for by Toby Anderson for Congress Inc. | | id:2022-02-24-22:53:52:293t

name: Morgan Harper
subject: I stand in solidarity with the people of Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Last night, Russia began an aggressive invasion of Ukraine
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220224-707-footer-ak&t=2&akid=707%2E90090%2EdUO4tm)
Last night, Russia began an aggressive invasion of Ukraine, bombing infrastructure and population centers, and inflicting horrific violence on its people.
For context, this is part of a years-long effort by Vladimir Putin to assert more Russian control over Ukraine as its people chose democratic leaders who sought more alignment with NATO and the rest of Europe. First by seizing the Crimean peninsula in 2014 and then by backing separatists in the east of the country to destabilize its government, Putin has long wanted to keep Ukraine in Russia’s sphere of influence, no matter what its people decide for themselves.
**The people of Ukraine do not deserve this heinous attack by Vladimir Putin.** We need to stand in solidarity with them and their right to self-determination and peace. This devastating and unnecessary loss of life justifies aggressive sanctions to protect global security.
Across the world, authoritarianism is on the rise and now on the march, and it threatens the safety of millions of people in peaceful democracies. Leaders who align themselves with Putin or even go so far as to praise this invasion are threats to the fabric of our democracy and should be condemned, no matter their party.
Today the people of Ukraine are in my prayers, and I am grateful to hear that the United States is committed to aggressive economic sanctions to stop Russia and save lives.
Thank you,
Morgan
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate

[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
---|---|---
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

body:
| Is Joe a failure?

The State of the Union is coming, and we need to know the truth...

| _**Q1:** Will you be watching sleepy Joe’s SOTU speech?

[** ****Yes ➞ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b96f863c18c84eef916edfb8ad791078&_e=fER2WdumHU9wIhQ2Xn-f5uN7aO-CajpMPWX8Ni7c3-4AsxDT5cPXLnYS1iiRYdKAO2-Iy6P6_Et9umqE1DKhEukYG1LdBYPGiotdH72W6w4NOQp1sTLQ9Vzcnvx-qlV5wQVIY5ek5Y-R2a0ZvIbkqfhoFRTvQD0p2TMO9bVsQsdQrvK3KxSjWMI4eAwVdH8E_5_yqmTI3MTatBQ2bxw1kOXdxaLlrbzlk95dVROe3kDMRwQidLDikqDK4vAl0Jnp7H-KOSZbvUijgPfn6QCkJVyd2mhlN1XqZTb1hWzqfJqJ0P3G5u8c9QaEOp5LlfmwbK2ztE04EwkPbkV7lT3d9IBieT2iY6lk0aNDBymZgEXOy-T37pVCQRdEvP9zS5IOUEhzYsRkUj7Buo0W3CSAzzOfK8TwLjSJWCuqAR6_eWT1bZFgsbmgmvDRuscKrLVuTHpSDeipc2Nl7_ijymjOKA%3D%3D)

_Biden’s pick is expected to be the most liberal justice in history to serve on the Supreme Court._

body:
Innocent lives are caught in the crossfire!

| [](http://www.arviewforillinois.com/?e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pray_for_ukraine&n=1)
---
Peter -- Last night, Vladimir Putin declared war when he launched an attack on Ukraine. Buildings were laid to waste in an instant. More importantly, however, many innocent lives were almost wiped out in this senseless act of brutality. [Please sign the petition today to commit to praying for the innocent people of Ukraine](https://www.arviewforillinois.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYnzDxJtkM3BSrLjtBsDA6KBpIL_MdEn4Q2SEFyyZ9uSO4QkWgNUSj52OlGn-hg80kQ&e=828c8a89412a4fbdccb730df7e15cd8a&utm_source=timarview&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pray_for_ukraine&n=2 "Pray for Ukraine!"). Thank you,
Arview For Senate

Peter, _**Putin has officially invaded Ukraine.**_

I went on **[Fox News this morning](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=2f17bb5077fe43779e72a658186928bf&_e=6R1OyWODvxvG_qfUbNY-IPNQJRS9IAcRIHcmQN_NaY5Bw33CYXCGVrGyzeSQPpZvaCcbsMNUsDGGBfmx9zkG48noWqzepww35HRu8WrIRw0FOTbjnwzRtIPQjDntmJtPl5IEfYZUtsvxsLdsTQumccadtn0exlZMCRbgCvE-0U2vrkUMeK1mAzdxA_FD-X-h5pJs4K5jWZDDP1yoWIlJurcwek2GQ8NILUFwZ1XN_MJMaRNT5Ix7r4xrEy9jIpCtakfAt9avKHjLtY4_RuS-qrJSm0-U7lkrj2nVrAoWN0IT7DzlIM9dL3XYQHypRYqRgGKqzig-RZADjdvc5K7adrwfdiGb3MlbOZgVWccp3l0M6nVFiG57-t192y2dp4XiTtvARtSl9Ey6TbzLiqdcRw%3D%3D)** to discuss how Joe Biden’s weakness and his America Last policies are letting Putin reestablish the old Soviet Union. [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=2f17bb5077fe43779e72a658186928bf&_e=6R1OyWODvxvG_qfUbNY-IPNQJRS9IAcRIHcmQN_NaY5Bw33CYXCGVrGyzeSQPpZvaCcbsMNUsDGGBfmx9zkG48noWqzepww35HRu8WrIRw0FOTbjnwzRtIPQjDntmJtPl5IEfYZUtsvxsLdsTQumccadtn0exlZMCRbgCvE-0U2vrkUMeK1mAzdxA_FD-X-h37aHq6fvOP28II-tTgA4FDnaY4Evy3QQVNffxEmtFgGEkIUliP1c6pWPMmhcGiOr7vDtUyF53W8UllPTEGy2WIM_Ej-N5DPq2tJxip7e5KKR2P0W8S3kIDTiEH7lmB4Rk3647qR5yDQ4Kmkm0DM4eln3vq3i-dWGaqyl4-ADiJqnzvUP2vIYbBCiaLGH19XxjlOSyzmx36p1nhzTir7w9g%3D%3D) **In times of crisis like these, we need real leaders who will stand up to Putin and support the people of Ukraine.**

During my time serving in combat as a U.S. Green Beret, I fought alongside some of the best leaders in America.

_I know none of them would have let this happen._

Biden’s feckless leadership is now putting Americans and our national interests in danger. Biden’s weakness that led to the fall of Afghanistan only served to emboldened our adversaries. It emboldened Putin to take Ukraine. Now China and Iran watch from afar, encouraged that America has lost its place as leader of the free world. Enough is enough. We need to bring strong, conservative leadership back to Congress. We must flip the House and hold Biden and his failed advisors accountable for these actions. I can’t finish this fight without your help.

It emboldened Putin to take Ukraine. Now China and Iran watch from afar, encouraged that America has lost its place as leader of the free world. Enough is enough. We need to bring strong, conservative leadership back to Congress. We must flip the House and hold Biden and his failed advisors accountable for these actions. I can’t finish this fight without your help. During times of crisis, strong leadership is more important than ever. We must flip the house to hold Biden accountable. Education is so important to our campaign and Donna’s platform that she wants to ensure everyone knows that **we __can__ lower the cost of education and we can ensure everyone graduates debt-free!** That’s why our campaign is trying to keep this Ad running. These final days are _critical_ to give it everything we’ve got to get voters to the polls for Donna Imam. What happens here in Texas is reflective of what will happen in primaries across the country. Let’s make sure voters show up for democracy. Austin is not just the state and tech capital of Texas, it’s also a major college town. Donna led a non-profit as president that was founded in a donated space in a University of Texas at Austin basement. **We need to tell voters about the solutions for education that Donna will deliver in Congress, and then, we need to get them to the polls. ** **[Check out Donna’s video message right now, then chip in $5, $35 or $50 to help us keep it running until election day on March 1st!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42189798/332008130/-1959801201?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220223_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWU4MGFhMi1iMjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vRmv-Xbymp4uZI5vHMo4RwbVoPN3MFJwEjEgOCl05Tk=)** We appreciate your support. – Team Donna

Education is so important to our campaign and Donna’s platform that she wants to ensure everyone knows that we can lower the cost of education and we can ensure everyone graduates debt-free! That’s why our campaign is trying to keep this Ad running. = = The primary is less than a week away, and early voting is already underway. These final days are critical to give it everything we’ve got to get voters to the polls for Donna Imam. What happens here in Texas is reflective of what will happen in primaries across the country. Let’s make sure voters show up for democracy. Austin is not just the state and tech capital of Texas, it’s also a major college town. Donna led a non-profit as president that was founded in a donated space in a University of Texas at Austin basement. We need to tell voters about the solutions for education that Donna will deliver in Congress, and then, we need to get them to the polls. = We appreciate your support. – Team Donna | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: Protect democracy, everywhere.
body:
We need leaders who are going to stand up, and fight for us. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8c3af7a7b1ca/protect-democracy-everywhere?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
# Help me protect democracy, everywhere.

**Today we woke up to horrific news that Putin had begun a full scale invasion. **My thoughts and prayers are with the people of Ukraine, and those of Ukranian heritage around the world, including our Chicago community. I pray for the safety of your loved ones.

**Every Black person in America knows the cost of imperialism and conquest.** It’s in our blood and our skin and our bones. I am the living descendant of people who were were on the receiving end of an international system where countries used force to enslave other humans and rape an entire continent. It was not merely a side effect - it was the stated goal. Slavery and oppression were the very cornerstone of the empires they built.

**When nations are permitted to pillage and plunder, people suffer, and people die**. Real people, like you and me, with hopes and dreams. People with families who laugh and cry and love and sing and build. The violence that Putin is committing today is just the latest example in a long line of exploitation waged by the strong against the weak. **And that exploitation will not be tolerated in the world we are seeking to build. Not here, not anywhere.**

**We need leaders who are going to take a stand for justice, and say no to war.** We need to make sure that Putin understands that his actions are unacceptable, and continue to weaken him economically, and pursue every diplomatic solution possible. **We must protect democracy, everywhere**. I ask that you support my campaign for congress, and **[make a donation](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=852a689b7a&e=339f142c50) today so I can continue to fight for the people of the First District, and the people of the world**.

Yours in service,
Jahmal

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Garrett=20Soldano?=
subject: Another millionaire in the race...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
No more silver spoon elitists running the show | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=491ba8fd6e&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | **There's a new candidate in this race, Peter.**
Yesterday, a supposed "Quality Guru" formally launched his campaign with a small crowd of consultants and reporters in Lansing. You may have seen his ad on TV.

You know me folks - the movement we're building is all about unity. But before Republicans head to the polls in August, **we must make sure we put the best candidate forward.**

_No Republican will be able to buy this election._ Whitmer has a warchest of special interests and DNC cash at her disposal. To beat Gretchen Whitmer, it will take someone with guts to HOLD HER ACCOUNTABLE, fight like hell, and always stand up for **WE THE PEOPLE!**

**Michigan is DONE with silver-spoon elitists trying to run our government.** I didn't come from money, folks. I grew up in a trailer in Coldwater, Michigan. I had to build my business from nothing and earn my piece of the American Dream. _I don't have millions to burn or favors to sell to special interests._

**I am asking for your _grassroots_ support** \- [a donation of $50, $25 or just $10](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=6634c2d376&e=fe4b890356) \- to help our movement succeed in the Republican Primary and defeat Gretchen Whitmer this November.
---
| [CHIP IN $10](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=fea25c1ad0&e=fe4b890356 "CHIP IN $10")
---
| [CHIP IN $25](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=2377a8b8fd&e=fe4b890356 "CHIP IN $25")
---
| [CHIP IN $50](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=82267fae4c&e=fe4b890356 "CHIP IN $50")
---
| I have always had one simple question for anyone who decides to throw their hat into the ring for Governor - _**what did you do in 2020?**_

Were you fighting Governor Whitmer's unconstitutional orders, supporting our small businesses and students, and mobilizing Michiganders to stand tall for freedom? _Or were you sitting on the sidelines?_ That is a question every candidate who wants my vote must answer, and **I hope you're asking that question as well.**

Michigan finally has the chance to buck the political establishment and get a true outsider into the Governor's office. **I know that power belongs to the people** \- and to take our government back from the elitists and insiders, it will take _all of us_ chipping in.
[_**Click here to make a one-time donation in support of our grassroots campaign for Governor.**_](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=230f4363da&e=fe4b890356)

[_**Click here to become a Card-Carrying Member of our campaign with a monthly donation of $20 or more**_](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=b618ea601e&e=fe4b890356).
---
| Thank you for being a part of something bigger than self Peter.

The Power of One Leads to the Power of Many,
**[](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=2440f9ef8d&e=fe4b890356)**
**Garrett Soldano**
Republican Candidate for Governor

Michigan is DONE with silver-spoon elitists trying to run our government. I didn't come from money, folks. I grew up in a trailer in Coldwater, Michigan. I had to build my business from nothing and earn my piece of the American Dream. I don't have millions to burn or favors to sell to special interests. I am asking for your grassroots support \- \- to help our movement succeed in the Republican Primary and defeat Gretchen Whitmer this November. | "CHIP IN $10" | "CHIP IN $25" | "CHIP IN $50" | I have always had one simple question for anyone who decides to throw their hat into the ring for Governor - what did you do in 2020? Were you fighting Governor Whitmer's unconstitutional orders, supporting our small businesses and students, and mobilizing Michiganders to stand tall for freedom? Or were you sitting on the sidelines? That is a question every candidate who wants my vote must answer, and I hope you're asking that question as well. Michigan finally has the chance to buck the political establishment and get a true outsider into the Governor's office. I know that power belongs to the people \- and to take our government back from the elitists and insiders, it will take all of us chipping in. . | Thank you for being a part of something bigger than self Peter. The Power of One Leads to the Power of Many, Garrett Soldano Republican Candidate for Governor | | | | | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN 1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081 | Garrett Soldano for Michigan 1151 West Milham Avenue, Unit 2546, Portage, MI 49081 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Alek
subject: Every last one deserves to lose.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
Biden is weak. His party is in disarray. Every last Democrat in Congress deserves to lose ... I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=390a13ed2df742aa9068ed9de3a95f1f&_e=pKcOEfcSlDueQI6tOZj057T8b46Qwv52SnY-dD3v5xS0GG1NElklEATw_q2cgjmQJqU0SBN_T50zTRSOluyyFkhRhL2r5lUoSJ8OSSEg6ap4n9NCiBviTSFnWE7-BSr0M-Xys8pj9ky0_pdtbpyezPnSWbvUfMDdYIHFXcWW2BTn5cbCD8rMvfLQIUdQulQhoGWJL0Ge1iI_0jJ2T4kZBIpTfcPwcZ6r3w2tJrACbVm5PvWLYNfeNvMQ0ZVxSFAEi1krF-An9Kg5rzfn1mMn6EP5bTZIAMeEyN49_oyD-8ansVl1aBJRpurpOVpizqhmPmhXywxDbol458EfUCxFt1cFgICHYKX5DRqxLcrxXRyj5F0KJu-whmIQgyj0-3JRUsP5RPV3r3BZ1JsuUxWkXXC53msim8mrEqQRRWMUe2SghHGlhAaJLS_fLQd0szei)
---

Peter,

This morning as we woke up to the news that Vladimir Putin had invaded Ukraine, a sense of Déjà Vu came over me: haven’t we been at this juncture before?

Just six short months ago we witnessed the Taliban’s lightening assault over the whole of Afghanistan that resulted in an embarrassing defeat of the world’s most technologically advanced military. In Ukraine, much as was the case with Afghanistan in August, the American people played witness to a lengthy buildup of enemy forces; enemy forces who made no secret of their plans.

In both war theatres, President Biden has shown himself incapable of carrying out his duties as Commander-in-Chief. While President Biden may not be on the ballot in November, members of Congress who belong to his Democrat Party indeed are on the ballot.**Every last one of them deserves to lose.**

**President Biden is WEAK.**

Congressional Democrats are WEAK. Their threats and sanctions had no impact on Russian aggression.

As a veteran of Afghanistan, I know firsthand that war is never good, and my thoughts and prayers are with the Ukrainian people. Americans will feel the pain of Biden’s weak leadership through higher energy prices.

We MUST do better. **There is no alternative**.

Sincerely,
Alek Skarlatos

CHIP IN NOW -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=390a13ed2df742aa9068ed9de3a95f1f&_e=pKcOEfcSlDueQI6tOZj057T8b46Qwv52SnY-dD3v5xS0GG1NElklEATw_q2cgjmQJqU0SBN_T50zTRSOluyyFkhRhL2r5lUoSJ8OSSEg6ap4n9NCiBviTSFnWE7-BSr0M-Xys8pj9ky0_pdtbpyezPnSWbvUfMDdYIHFXcWW2BTn5cbCD8rMvfLQIUdQulQhoGWJL0Ge1iI_0jJ2T4kZBIpTfcPwcZ6r3w2tJrACbVk5aThnDaC86ehxSzyDgkFnjdavl5gQKLOSbDXGGs0OUznz3IWso3jCBPAA3pVNSuTBDbKxgtEOVhfexyFscp93l98OWrkQLeUkYlklWZVUlbKDYYYvz8ya8I9cX2PDHKoqx3rWk8vaYTQINd2c5Sigzji_jgm4F0AxL8J9fGp4YhTX2LROJzicx1VsHcRAnoSfR-vubsghReUe_uZZlYPv)

name: Tom Perez
subject: Ukraine
body:
I know it’s difficult to stay hopeful on days like today, but I find comfort in the knowledge that thousands of people bravely marched on Pushkin Square to protest this conflict, that we stand ready to join our NATO allies in support of Ukraine, and that we can offer our help right now.
#

Hi there,

The news of Russia’s unprovoked invasion of Ukraine is shocking and scary to say the least. Like many of you, I spent a fair bit of time today refreshing my feed, waiting for any semblance of good news. Instead, we were met with stories of Putin’s threats and grave images of war.

I know it’s difficult to stay hopeful on days like today, but I find comfort in the knowledge that thousands of people bravely marched on Pushkin Square to protest this conflict, that we stand ready to join our NATO allies in support of Ukraine, and that **we can offer our help right now**.

My team and I compiled a small list of organizations directly responding to the crisis in Ukraine. If you can, please consider making a donation of any amount to support their work:
**• United Help Ukraine** raises money for humanitarian aid, medical supplies for those injured by war, and support for wounded warriors and families of those wounded or killed in war: **[Donate here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42196870/332062366/755459924?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=FAXD9R7CFB4SJ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjNjMmJhNS1kZDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CUatbkOGBmWbd1YbMOHJ0RLiuT0f2TOTvp0Wm6lXh6Q=&emci=d8d4a2f2-d795-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b3c2ba5-dd95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**.
**• Voices of Children** raises money to help provide psychological and psychosocial support for kids in armed conflict areas: **[Donate here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42196871/332062367/-833605803?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjNjMmJhNS1kZDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CUatbkOGBmWbd1YbMOHJ0RLiuT0f2TOTvp0Wm6lXh6Q=&emci=d8d4a2f2-d795-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b3c2ba5-dd95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**.
**• International Committee of the Red Cross** offers humanitarian aid supporting the work of the Ukrainian Red Cross: **[Donate here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42196872/332062368/-969971460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjNjMmJhNS1kZDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CUatbkOGBmWbd1YbMOHJ0RLiuT0f2TOTvp0Wm6lXh6Q=&emci=d8d4a2f2-d795-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4b3c2ba5-dd95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**.
As President Biden said today, in the contest between democracy and autocracy, between sovereignty and subjugation, make no mistake that freedom will prevail.

God bless the people of a free and democratic Ukraine, Ukrainian Americans, and everyone holding them in their hearts.

Thank you,

Tom Perez
Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer.
Tom Perez for Maryland
PO BOX 5389
TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389
United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d8d4a2f2-d795-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/4b3c2ba5-dd95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjNjMmJhNS1kZDk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CUatbkOGBmWbd1YbMOHJ0RLiuT0f2TOTvp0Wm6lXh6Q=&id=116402624).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrew=20Roth?=
subject: An Upcoming Fight in Mississippi
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Patriots, An entirely avoidable catastrophe is playing out and **we need your help to prevent it!** In the ruby red state of Mississippi, a troubling story is emerging. Establishment Republicans, **at the behest of Speaker Philip Gunn,** gutted an election integrity bill (H.R. 1510) that was poised for passage in the State House. Despite having supermajorities in both chambers of the state legislature, **left-leaning Republicans worked with Democrats to completely strip the bill of key oversight provisions. ** **Republican Rep. Brent Powell offered an amendment to “strike all” of the election integrity provisions in H.R. 1510.** Among the common-sense provisions that Speaker Gunn and his cadre of left-leaning Republicans eagerly worked with Democrats to eliminate:
* Providing the Secretary of State with the authority to audit election procedures at the county level.
* Providing the Secretary of State with the task to audit every county’s procedures, results, and voter rolls every four years.
* Requiring counties to use voting systems that are capable of being easily audited.
* Requiring election commissioners in each county to conduct a risk-limiting audit for selected offices.
* Requiring social media companies to report to the Secretary of State if they shut down or ban a particular political candidate from their platform.

Even in Mississippi, conservatives face intense headwinds–from members of their own party–to preserve basic functions of our republic. Perhaps most egregious is the fact that election integrity remained a critical plank of the Mississippi GOP’s official platform as recently as 2016. Following the adoption of the Gunn-Powell “strike-all” amendment, **Powell assured Democrats that the amendment removed all the “bad stuff.** ” All that remained of the bill’s previously strong election security policies was a federal voter-roll maintenance provision. That provision, however, was then subsequently struck by Democrat House Minority Leader Robert Johnson through a voice vote. It was only after the gutted H.R. 1510 passed–**with half of Democrats voting in favor of its now toothless text** –that Mississippi Freedom Caucus (MSFC) member Rep. Dan Eubanks fought with House Leadership to restore the federal voter-roll maintenance provision that had also been swept away. Rep. Eubanks and other MSFC members pushed to hold the bill on a motion to reconsider and restore the federal voter-roll maintenance provision. While this small effort was successful, the overall efforts by Speaker Gunn, left-leaning establishment Republicans, and their Democratic allies succeeded and the gutted bill is now in the Mississippi Senate for deliberation and potential passage. I**t is critical for the Mississippi Senate to do what the Mississippi House refused to do: actually represent the people who sent them to the legislature.** The Senate must restore the provisions that Speaker Gunn, Rep. Powell, and other weak-kneed Republicans gutted. [Contact your State Senator today](https://statefreedomcaucus.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a363d70ccaaebc9e5732e6783&id=ef434b0b56&e=64ecec6d03) and tell them to restore all of the original election integrity provisions to H.R. 1510. The security of Mississippi’s elections and the integrity of our republic are counting on it! Keep Fighting,
Andrew Roth President, State Freedom Caucus Network
---
| |
### Find Your Local Representative
### SFCN is committed to building the army we need to win.
---

Did you hear the news? The Oregon Health Authority has just announced it will be removing the indoor and school mask mandates on March 19. While this is welcome news, Oregon is among the last to eliminate the indoor mask mandate, which has been particularly detrimental for our children.

It's never been more clear that Oregon needs to move in a different direction. As governor, I'll stand up for your medical freedoms and ensure the mandates don't come back. If you believe in medical freedom as much as I do, will you consider donating to my campaign to help send a Republican back to the governor's office?

name: Max Steiner
subject: my thoughts on Ukraine:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42190916/332012957/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ5ZTdkNC1iNjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ifmIwYVVFXUuIhYOdTN_5LKFEG_4n1QK9zDIzGiH3C4=)
Friend,

Last night, at approximately 7 pm PST, Russian forces began a full-scale invasion of Ukraine. This is a huge escalation by Putin and marks the end of years of peace in Europe. Thousands of civilians will die and many thousands more will become refugees. It is a dark day for democracy and for the west.

Many Putin apologists on the American right -- from Trump, to Tucker Carlson, and even former Democrat Tulsi Gabbard -- have blamed NATO and the West for this war. They are completely wrong and their victim-blaming is shameful. This is Putin's war.

In hindsight, America and the West should have been more aggressive in supporting Ukraine earlier. Too much faith was placed in the art of diplomacy and the threat of sanctions. Hindsight is always 20/20 though.

We live in dangerous times. The last 30 years of peace in Europe are over. America needs to step up as the leader of the free world and recognize that the autocracies of the world have no intention of abiding by the treaties they sign or the commitments they make. People like Putin respect only force, as well as the willingness and capability to use it.

As a veteran and a current Army Reservist, I bring a perspective on military matters that is all too rare in Washington. It would be an honor to use that perspective as a Congressman to make America and the World safe again.

Very Respectfully,

Max
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42190918/332012959/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ5ZTdkNC1iNjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ifmIwYVVFXUuIhYOdTN_5LKFEG_4n1QK9zDIzGiH3C4=)
Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by [making a grassroots contribution here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42190920/332012961/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ5ZTdkNC1iNjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ifmIwYVVFXUuIhYOdTN_5LKFEG_4n1QK9zDIzGiH3C4=)

If you'd like to receive less email, add your name [here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42190923/332012963/379103408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ5ZTdkNC1iNjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ifmIwYVVFXUuIhYOdTN_5LKFEG_4n1QK9zDIzGiH3C4=&emci=acc75b4c-9a95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d8d9e7d4-b695-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=11663292) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/acc75b4c-9a95-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/d8d9e7d4-b695-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGQ5ZTdkNC1iNjk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ifmIwYVVFXUuIhYOdTN_5LKFEG_4n1QK9zDIzGiH3C4=&id=113269053).

They are completely wrong and their victim-blaming is shameful. This is Putin's war. In hindsight, America and the West should have been more aggressive in supporting Ukraine earlier. Too much faith was placed in the art of diplomacy and the threat of sanctions. Hindsight is always 20/20 though. We live in dangerous times. The last 30 years of peace in Europe are over. America needs to step up as the leader of the free world and recognize that the autocracies of the world have no intention of abiding by the treaties they sign or the commitments they make. People like Putin respect only force, as well as the willingness and capability to use it. As a veteran and a current Army Reservist, I bring a perspective on military matters that is all too rare in Washington. It would be an honor to use that perspective as a Congressman to make America and the World safe again. Very Respectfully, Max | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by = If you'd like to receive less email, add your name We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Max Steiner is a combat veteran of the Iraq War and Sergeant First Class in the Army Reserves. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense. Max Steiner for Congress 2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370 #194 Chico, CA 95928 United States

**Doyle Canning is an exceptional candidate and will be a great Member of Congress.** Doyle is an across-the-board progressive, supporting policies that will improve the lives of poor, working, and middle class families-lifting up all of American society in the process. Doyle is pro-M4A, pro-GND, and for the PRO Act! Doyle gets an A+ on civil rights, immigrant rights, and voting rights! All of this would be enough for PDA to endorse Doyle, but what sets her apart and makes her campaign so essential is that Doyle comes to us from the environmental/climate emergency movement. As such, Doyle would be unique in the U.S. Congress. As climate science makes clear, we're well past the point where we need people with Doyle's background and commitment in the U.S. Congress-it's incumbent upon all of us who care about preserving a livable planet for future generations to help Doyle win her race.

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friends, Today marks 21 days since of my candidacy for Congress in 2022. Thank you for being with us from the very beginning. In the last three weeks we have kicked our campaign into high gear: building an outstanding campaign team, announcing our first major fundraising event with , picking up a dozen local, state, and national endorsements, and planning our first door knocking events in and . It is no surprise that the grassroots in the district has already thrown support behind our campaign, and that the national progressive organizations who were the very first to back Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Cori Bush in their bids for higher office are the very first backing us up in this race. Progressive leaders know that with only 62 days until ballots arrive in voters' mailboxes, our ramp up in this race must be ambitious and unrelenting. Believe me, me and my team are already working around the clock. Now we need you to join us today with a ! This election is a once in a generation opportunity to elect new leadership for Oregon and our country. This is our chance to make history, and it won't come again. With so much at stake, there's not a moment to waste. We can't wait. Yours always, Doyle | | ENDORSEMENTS | "I am honored to receive the endorsement of the Progressive Change Campaign Committee (PCCC) today and build the Elizabeth Warren Wing of American politics together with their over one million members. Bold progressive change #CantWait. Our movement will deliver the win in this election & deliver real change in Congress." | "Canning is an amazing champion for everything we care about as true progressives in Oregon. Learn more about her at canningforcongress.com!" | "Doyle ran for Congress in 2020, and Brand New Congress was proud to support her. Now she's running for the open seat in OR-04 and we are ready to help her win. In Doyle's 20 year record as a climate activist, she has taken on Wall Street Banks, big polluters, billionaires and the politicians in their pockets. We need fierce climate activists in Congress." | Doyle Canning is an exceptional candidate and will be a great Member of Congress. Doyle is an across-the-board progressive, supporting policies that will improve the lives of poor, working, and middle class families-lifting up all of American society in the process. Doyle is pro-M4A, pro-GND, and for the PRO Act! Doyle gets an A+ on civil rights, immigrant rights, and voting rights! All of this would be enough for PDA to endorse Doyle, but what sets her apart and makes her campaign so essential is that Doyle comes to us from the environmental/climate emergency movement. As such, Doyle would be unique in the U.S. Congress. As climate science makes clear, we're well past the point where we need people with Doyle's background and commitment in the U.S. Congress-it's incumbent upon all of us who care about preserving a livable planet for future generations to help Doyle win her race. | FUNDRAISERS YOU CAN ZOOM! | CLIMATE FOR CANNING! FUNDRAISER WITH SPECIAL GUEST JANE FONDA MARCH 8 Join us for a very special first zoom fundraiser for this 2022 campaign on international women's day with legendary activist and actor Jane Fonda! . | DEADHEADS FOR DOYLE! WITH SPECIAL GUESTS... MARCH 10 Join Carolyn Garcia and special guests for a special evening zoom to raise funds and spread good vibes for our campaign for Congress. . | VOLUNTEER EVENTS VOLUNTEER WELCOME ZOOM Tonight! Thursday at 6 pm, we will be welcoming volunteers and talking about how YOU can get involved on Team Canning. LAUNCH CANVASS IN EUGENE There will be a group leaving from Tugman Park at 11am to hit the doors around South Eugene and spread the word about Doyle! Childcare provided. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: House Majority Leader backing anti-abortion Cuellar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

House Majority Leader Steny Hoyer is backing corporate-backed, anti-choice
Democrat Henry Cuellar in his primary against Justice Democrat Jessica
Cisneros. This shows just how afraid the Democratic establishment is of
progressives like Jessica and the Squad.

Cuellar was one of the few House Democrats to delay and derail Build Back
Better. That piece of legislation was 90% of Joe Biden’s agenda, it would
have expanded the social safety net, and invested in the fight against
climate change. But Henry Cuellar was more interested in serving his
corporate donors than passing Build Back Better. Why is a Democratic
leader in the House supporting an obstructionist?

Henry Cuellar is the sole anti-abortion Democrat in the House. Party
leaders should welcome the chance to oust him and elect Jessica, a fighter
for working people, abortion rights, and the environment.

Last election cycle, House Speaker Pelosi backed Cuellar against Jessica,
even though Cuellar was still the conservative anti-abortion
obstructionist he’s always been. The Democratic establishment will line up
against Justice Democrats in order to maintain the status quo, even if it
means protecting Democrats like Cuellar BLOCKING the Democratic agenda.

Speaker Pelosi has already campaigned for at least one of our opponents
this cycle, Rep. Danny Davis in Illinois. We have to win our primaries in
Texas on Tuesday AND build our campaigns so we’re ready to win four more
primaries against the establishment later in the year.

Can you help us strengthen our fight,
Peter? [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95844?refcode=em20220224-22131&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=22131%2E1203867%2Efq6oOL ]Donate
$3 today and help us build strong progressive primary
campaigns and transform the Democratic Party. We’re up against big money,
corporations, and the Democratic establishment, so we need your grassroots
support today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/95844?refcode=em20220224-22131&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=22131%2E1203867%2Efq6oOL ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=22131%2E1203867%2Efq6oOL ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=22131%2E1203867%2Efq6oOL ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220224-22131-footer&t=1024&refcode2=22131_1203867_fq6oOL&akid=22131%2E1203867%2Efq6oOL

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=22131%2E1203867%2Efq6oOL

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:

#

Friends —
As you read this, we remain short of where we need to be in order to reach our February fundraising goals.
But if everyone who got this email chipped in $3, not only would we absolutely CRUSH our goals, we’d also immediately have enough money to fund this entire campaign.
But the problem is, not everyone will chip in. Not even close. So, if you believe Mark MUST win re-election — if you believe we cannot have Mitch McConnell become the Senate Majority Leader again — it’s especially important that YOU chip in.
As you read this, a number of people have already done so. Now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because while not everyone will give, if enough people like you do we’ll hit our fundraising goal.
And those wins add up to our ultimate goal: victory in November.

body:
I am asking all pro-lifers to urgently come together right now. **DEFEND LIFE: HELP US REACH OUR FEBRUARY FUNDRAISING GOAL!** _We need to raise $10,000 to support our pro-life efforts by the end of the month._ [** >>> DONATE NOW <<<**](http://links.donatetoaaf.com/u/click?_t=86a20c67f9c947c19050e12b2852ffe6&_m=443d5e77fcaa4e9d92f6be60ba98d8cd&_e=fwRnjaAm5bRi_M80y-0pdpegQ4rVc7AO0UJA7o_IBxHfqqATHpN5H9eMGsWNzbMyVhCNgfjgTB7MZnHcQeHQeOqaB_OQtrmkm6AObOtF548cfhKXK6Qr7TzDnjTKVWiBlTaMAn-72wVjm_8327gIFyhyqSsQd3o5RExrbJFneJZvk0LrWbnxVJs5NGlM1eXgPUw9SqSR6bepd-aG4NTANzZf5MExtdxAWGUm6mhISoaJOnZZFgOZYTVoxkfjFomWfkoXLlVdFalPKI8jtgyV2rRC1qO07D0t0hIqVWOm7xfP1aHNQFJ9uD5lTXXCzI5LIGalTS9_wc8pIlgTvOL00wxG6KYpdkdrrn9c6Mite3WYfRBZKd3Al1g9_Fs3eVHBjFyqXqiFvxheJgctqeE-StZc4vYmXzQfXabmpLdK_bgLi_dFySjmsq62ucOtAuXTN8R8vMJF5dtnkh7u1SmXiVX_FqjlsryNHMlin7me2CK-akJxQVbrdcg7OqgGJq2Y) | |

Fellow Conservative,

_Roe_ v._Wade_ has inflicted tragedy not only on our country but also on humanity. For two generations, the innocent lives of the unborn have been defenseless.

**But now is our chance to end**** _Roe_****v.****_Wade_****once and for all.** Let me explain.****
[](http://links.donatetoaaf.com/u/click?_t=86a20c67f9c947c19050e12b2852ffe6&_m=443d5e77fcaa4e9d92f6be60ba98d8cd&_e=fwRnjaAm5bRi_M80y-0pdpegQ4rVc7AO0UJA7o_IBxHfqqATHpN5H9eMGsWNzbMyVhCNgfjgTB7MZnHcQeHQeOqaB_OQtrmkm6AObOtF548cfhKXK6Qr7TzDnjTKVWiBlTaMAn-72wVjm_8327gIFyhyqSsQd3o5RExrbJFneJZvk0LrWbnxVJs5NGlM1eXgPUw9SqSR6bepd-aG4NTANzZf5MExtdxAWGUm6mhISoaJOnZZFgOZYTVoxkfjFomWfkoXLlVdFalPKI8jtgyV2rRC1qO07D0t0hIqVWOm7xdNXsjf5MCjvrTJJwUsy5VaUWTIamC3621UbXrk0HHEb8TJl4pKBdsc-QfFuJYRSUputeCUuKPsH1hVV0DrPOOoU5zZfCExKooSndLvoW7VCCrHJmMo2ZQtPRVFY0AaNKbKr63-sz0JJhN7-Hc9nhQJgPzl3-yai4LVonPoz1Zw8OW6znmbYejqZWwYmXACptB9zM3fItKfZ6PvtzkVuQUH)
[**WATCH THE EXCLUSIVE VIDEO MESSAGE FROM MIKE PENCE**](http://links.donatetoaaf.com/u/click?_t=86a20c67f9c947c19050e12b2852ffe6&_m=443d5e77fcaa4e9d92f6be60ba98d8cd&_e=fwRnjaAm5bRi_M80y-0pdpegQ4rVc7AO0UJA7o_IBxHfqqATHpN5H9eMGsWNzbMyVhCNgfjgTB7MZnHcQeHQeOqaB_OQtrmkm6AObOtF548cfhKXK6Qr7TzDnjTKVWiBlTaMAn-72wVjm_8327gIFyhyqSsQd3o5RExrbJFneJZvk0LrWbnxVJs5NGlM1eXgPUw9SqSR6bepd-aG4NTANzZf5MExtdxAWGUm6mhISoaJOnZZFgOZYTVoxkfjFomWfkoXLlVdFalPKI8jtgyV2rRC1qO07D0t0hIqVWOm7xemKQt7Hi1IZTK78DN4QXnBbCQajDVVE2-VxuVmPh9mN6PvoecvXNBq2Itqop9yJne8LrbdIDmNiZCk6SnF7mVLPPKIUIPsqR3c1ddvZEuAWnZSqOYkrZ7TA3NNm7fjtaCZ2zyfLRc5_YgrJVMbNbdL0quNP63b8OmEY4ZZkzAQG_kgAG0fhLY81eYjAuy5hC3RpF82DPvR93qCQok9THfM)
Advancing American Freedom filed an amicus brief in the Supreme Court to support the landmark abortion case being considered right now.

**The pro-life movement is alive and well, but we are now facing our biggest challenges yet.** We must:

* Fight to make sure President Biden’s Supreme Court nominee respects our Constitution, so the disastrous _Roe v. Wade_ decision can be overturned.
* Develop and support the pro-life policy agenda that will replace _Roe v. Wade_.
* And build the strongest grassroots conservative networks that will support these policies in all fifty states across America.

It’s a tall order. But I’ll carry the banner and as long as I have breath in my lungs, I will fight for the right for Life.

_But I can’t do this alone. clean_body: I am asking all pro-lifers to urgently come together right now. DEFEND LIFE: HELP US REACH OUR FEBRUARY FUNDRAISING GOAL! We need to raise $10,000 to support our pro-life efforts by the end of the month. | | | Fellow Conservative, Roe v.Wade has inflicted tragedy not only on our country but also on humanity. For two generations, the innocent lives of the unborn have been defenseless. But now is our chance to end Roev.Wadeonce and for all. Let me explain.** Advancing American Freedom filed an amicus brief in the Supreme Court to support the landmark abortion case being considered right now. The pro-life movement is alive and well, but we are now facing our biggest challenges yet. We must: Fight to make sure President Biden’s Supreme Court nominee respects our Constitution, so the disastrous Roe v. Wade decision can be overturned. Develop and support the pro-life policy agenda that will replace Roe v. Wade. And build the strongest grassroots conservative networks that will support these policies in all fifty states across America. It’s a tall order. But I’ll carry the banner and as long as I have breath in my lungs, I will fight for the right for Life. But I can’t do this alone. I need you to join me. Thank you, Mike Pence Founder, Advancing American Freedom | | | | Paid for by Advancing American Freedom Inc | | 801 Pennsylvania Ave NW Suite 930 Washington, DC 20004 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Truckers for Freedom
subject: The USA Freedom Convoy is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great American Patriot Project
body:
March 2nd we're hitting the road.
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e14ad6d2925402fa9c7c0dee8487de8&_e=6FHX0rEK03nmgoXLoYCBVvIeMTc4endgFu_aqKxOiEkk7aHP8iqHJDJBbBystAwsiKzrolSB57kwaEIYdgWkRyzqYOGwek8wHK7IFvcP-LD4tNxy65bEsOwSx1832p0J7mVRZYTCiNAr3pCaFRtsD2r-g4s8JYj5I3BG7ngkfcsB32FqA8pWmzrFXWOFHAFHBJVGbJUIAtwxom3BDhUojpIdzED40gUAzc5N54iBLwBmXV7PfTv7HIT4kT2KnYSfDywiBfW7vFEvzRvDV4tZYDbb8Uo-SvHMBOAb86V3GaCw6qCTQmNg1Sq7ticDaKzhmKcIN1yLuEFJrcHzciFRNrokQeD2cYsNk9SoHBWbNk4%3D)
---
| | | Peter,

I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, _and we 're taking action._

**That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd!** **_[SUPPORT THE CONVOY](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e14ad6d2925402fa9c7c0dee8487de8&_e=6FHX0rEK03nmgoXLoYCBVvIeMTc4endgFu_aqKxOiEkk7aHP8iqHJDJBbBystAwsiKzrolSB57kwaEIYdgWkRyzqYOGwek8wHK7IFvcP-LD4tNxy65bEsOwSx1832p0J7mVRZYTCiNAr3pCaFRtsD_cENvheu-w4pJr9POQOII_P-HEE6w6X7P_bLq_8sPeTpnCEPyXhtXj2E6EACmeXQWm7V1zGq-YUhf3yzWKpxxW14kRl-R8-Qz4olCdebzbna0QaeT6bO8_lPbY8IQ99OqUOc3RJV5H7iFMXFSU8h8ftHObqmmLWuCu86U9Jk7XNIGoljrBkOdNPAXgVDdSg76BLnZdO23i-HDR3Qf_ekcw%3D "SUPPORT THE CONVOY")_**
We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. **As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. **

When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, **_HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!!_**

These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, **_[which is why we're asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e14ad6d2925402fa9c7c0dee8487de8&_e=6FHX0rEK03nmgoXLoYCBVvIeMTc4endgFu_aqKxOiEkk7aHP8iqHJDJBbBystAwsiKzrolSB57kwaEIYdgWkRyzqYOGwek8wHK7IFvcP-LD4tNxy65bEsOwSx1832p0J7mVRZYTCiNAr3pCaFRtsD4obDHtvBYRXc797Elv-u3lD-RRqj_gVMSR1QOlK6-PbcCZrEHoyUGzbHhEDUewC4inaK-ZTBLPZN8-rlxU23IvN37f95Lm5w-Z5F98EwT8LxbNbxFybjr8yc8F88QjGY2w_XW5jn9kDSPzRlSq3_KFpJ0QwoIHbUDm6TaJ46VX8kekE9hFftpkCVGI0DPk-YxIVHdl3bc081zqc3P_SCa0%3D "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform. ")_**

clean_body: March 2nd we're hitting the road. | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, I'm writing to you with very exciting news. Just like our neighbors to the North in Canada, America's truckers are fed up with the unscientific and unconstitutional government overreach we've endured over the past two years, and we 're taking action. That 's right, a Freedom Convoy driving from California to Washington, D.C. is beginning on March 2nd! "SUPPORT THE CONVOY" We've had enough. Vaccine mandates, mask mandates, lockdowns, and restrictions have all failed to stop the spread of the virus. As we all know, it stopped being about the virus a long time ago, it's just about control and power. When Justin Trudeau announced he was using terrorism laws to freeze the bank accounts of peaceful protestors in Ottawa without due process, HE DIDN 'T MENTION COVID ONCE!!! These same tyrannical, thuggish tactics will come to America if we don't stand up and say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH, "which is why we’re asking you to join us by making a secure donation on our independent fundraising platform. " Your money will go directly to paying for fuel and food for the brave Truckers in the Freedom Convoy. With gas prices skyrocketing under Joe Biden, fuel for the cross country trip is $5,000 per Big Rig! "$15 = 10 Miles" "$30 = 20 Miles" "$150 = 100 Miles" "$375 = 250 Miles" "$750 = 500 Miles" "$1,500 = 1,000 Miles" We the Truckers, and We the People, have had enough of the creeping tyranny, and we're putting our lives on hold and our livelihoods on the line to get our Freedom back. "So, I hope you’ll join us as we embark upon this great journey with a generous gift of any amount." In Liberty, Truckers for Freedom | Paid for by Great American Patriot Project Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: democracy under attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
Earlier today, in response to President Vladimir Putin’s invasion into Ukrainian territory, President Biden announced a first wave of U.S. economic sanctions against Russia.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42192881/332022044/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=5e053aab-c195-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=Svm6BR/9hySLYgo3WdwSvo8xzd3cHtayvctez6PZiC4pq8wEI/yWzlnB5DW6ldIj&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTA1M2FhYi1jMTk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F3x_H5Z6eUjt38ebM5d3g4-2xmJ9eiKUssOAkTJLtZ0=)
Friends -
Earlier today the democratically elected President of Ukraine called on the Ukrainian people to take up arms to defend their country. A national resistance against Putin's tanks, missiles and state-of-the-art weaponry has now begun in the heart of Europe. My heart aches for the men, women and children caught in this unfolding violence.
From the very beginning our goal has been to prevent this tragedy. But Putin's chilling, delusional message earlier this week indicates he was intent on this war of aggression to extend Russian dominance over the people and territory of Ukraine. Every member of NATO, our other European partners, and freedom-supporting nations around the world must work to ensure that he fails to accomplish that goal.
As President Biden said today to the American people: "This aggression cannot go unanswered." I have called for applying our most punishing economic sanctions in response to Putin's decision to launch this brutal attack. In the hours and days ahead we must also step up support, together with our allies, for the Ukrainian armed resistance to Russian occupation and take steps to ensure that NATO frontline states are prepared to defend themselves.
Putin has blood on his hands and must be made to rue the day he unleashed this unprovoked violence. We must ensure that his attack is remembered by history as an epic miscalculation; and that we are remembered for standing with the brave people of Ukraine against this cold-blooded invasion.
The days and weeks ahead will be critical ones for the future of Ukraine, the international community and the hopes and goals of all of us working and wishing for greater peace, progress and prosperity at home and in the world.
Chris

* * *

Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Senate majority.
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42192882/332022045/396464211?refcode=em220224&refcode2=5e053aab-c195-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=Svm6BR/9hySLYgo3WdwSvo8xzd3cHtayvctez6PZiC4pq8wEI/yWzlnB5DW6ldIj&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTA1M2FhYi1jMTk1LWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F3x_H5Z6eUjt38ebM5d3g4-2xmJ9eiKUssOAkTJLtZ0=)****
** **
** **

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

[](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=d8e6be1725b144c1b6f9c96a4a644f9a&_e=zjBG2oFhCm82zL1kuiq2kkPXiFapV6y6_x3gMMAHlberPQpjX6SqZaT--8CJji0nm4B6c0NEJnehfEANWFGUxge2cOP4Y0TCXcFmGmHp4cwzRH0-kdz8OTxp5Qdieldqg6oIlTTGkRlITiAKaYOwClq60lPASR48fPm20CIARDLnH9QGXe5smO91sY6AEiZ2xSF1x8LxbNzdPPMxLE_FBp7_UfDLIhEVZWx5o7COrNUj5_j81KUrW10WK0mZKcjjBDft0IgFSeqqcuzgDSk3ag%3D%3D) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **February 24, 2022** **Contact:[press@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com")** **Website:[www.mattjacobsforcongress.com](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=d8e6be1725b144c1b6f9c96a4a644f9a&_e=zjBG2oFhCm82zL1kuiq2kkPXiFapV6y6_x3gMMAHlberPQpjX6SqZaT--8CJji0ndKqIdUDyKpx9D1YJJ4jSdaz0H3CJu-iQ0zhgv58_cy9W-fqDcD8XiRZe4sSr0lLsOEQZZTkd9srp6hYAHuzl6QGvIW6vz1k875FicbO0LMymIa3xbFTO5Cr6XqClhDCGdW2jPgkfQ4-yk-mgwT-QuxN_tTLLJoUA6XsWlGmY6Yzco_6mJpgzn5llWy_-FH2cSuCzG0e_M7an76czzTaWUw%3D%3D)** **Contact:[press@mattjacobsforcongress.com](mailto:press@mattjacobsforcongress.com "press@mattjacobsforcongress.com")** **Website:[www.mattjacobsforcongress.com](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=d8e6be1725b144c1b6f9c96a4a644f9a&_e=zjBG2oFhCm82zL1kuiq2kkPXiFapV6y6_x3gMMAHlberPQpjX6SqZaT--8CJji0ncJUAnRLhyEvp2hvh0q2kgxEP8qqjZ2u_9k9zvFZnmI7vDAhXnPfEKYjIzEaXDmxHTf0Q45jQ7BmJh0UijRbOeyxSaASJn1GoQ-Yq2CqEYxC8BXmvAughQ-eoSXzb1Ks3iVOKs7yUEhZVa0jWQErk--7vUpejHHKi5SGm8kRY0qUCnamXbOeCXtZkrAWTdES61a5WUBx6lhB8XRuzNNMVtw%3D%3D)** **Matt Jacobs' Statement on Ukraine** **Thousand Oaks, CA -** Today, Matt Jacobs, candidate for Congress in CA-26, released the following statement: "Vladimir Putin is a violent dictator and KGB thug. His unprovoked invasion of Ukraine is the first time in 80 years that a world power has tried to conquer a sovereign nation. The invasion is a tragic and predictable consequence of our appeasement following Russia’s 2014 annexation of Crimea – and our abject failure to deter Russia more recently as it readied for war. We must ensure that Putin’s regime pays for this naked aggression, however belatedly, by providing Ukraine with the advanced weaponry it needs to defend its people, imposing crippling sanctions, and expelling Russia from global institutions. We must also expand and modernize our national defense capabilities, and promote U.S. energy development as an alternative for European states overly reliant on Russian fossil fuels. The world is watching. If we fail to stand firmly against Putin, our allies will not trust America’s promises, our enemies will not fear America’s power. body:
Putin orders Russian invasion of Ukraine, threatens NATO, and what is Joe Biden’s message to Ukraine? “Stay strong.”

First it was the disaster in Afghanistan, now Joe Biden’s administration is allowing Russia’s delusional dictator to extend his reach into Europe. _
_ _
_When America's foreign policy approach is, "Lead from behind and cede the west to Russia,"_it's time for new leadership_._ **I spoke to the Delaware Valley Journal earlier this week about the crisis in Ukraine. I said,** _“Vladimir Putin recognizing the independence of breakaway countries is political theater and a transparent pretext to justify the invasion of Ukraine._
_ _
_Putin intends to upend the post-cold war global order and attempt to bring us back to the days of the USSR. name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
All democratic nations must come together to condemn this horrific act of war. |

| | **
********** Team,

In this morning’s predawn hours, Vladimir Putin’s Russia invaded the sovereign territory of its democratic neighbor Ukraine, without provocation.

Putin is a dictator who is totally opposed to a free society. His regime suppresses human rights, eliminates independent media, assassinates political opponents, and limits economic opportunity. This region of the world should be free and prosperous, not denied hope and opportunity by a corrupt and merciless tyrant.

**As co-chair of the bipartisan House Ukraine Caucus, I condemn this blatant violation of international law, as should all Americans.**
**Now is the time for the Free World to rise up in defense of liberty.** Together with our European allies, the United States will force Putin to fully grasp the consequences of his actions so that we may avoid the unique devastation of war.

As our hearts break for the people of Ukraine, we must deepen our resolve. We must take a stand for democracy and pray for peace.

Sincerely,

Marcy Kaptur

---
| | Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
---

KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
P.O. Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697, United States

clean_body: I need your help. | Peter, The end-of-month deadline is almost here, and conservative fighter Juan Ciscomani is still $10,115 short of his goal. With the kind of fundraising numbers Nancy Pelosi and the Left are posting, coming up short in this key race that will decide the fate of Pelosi’s majority simply isn’t an option. Can I count on YOU to ensure Juan hits this goal before this critical deadline? Thank you, Steve Scalise House Republican Whip \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Steve Scalise Date: Fri, February 4, 2022 10:45 A.M. Subject: This is a MUST WIN for conservatives To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Our chances of FIRING Nancy Pelosi have never been better... But control of the House will still come down to a handful of key races – including this toss-up Arizona district where conservative fighter Juan Ciscomani will go toe-to-toe with a radical, Pelosi-backed socialist. With so much riding on the outcome of this one critical race, Nancy Pelosi and her DCCC are gearing up to spend MILLIONS here in Arizona to try and torpedo Juan’s campaign. That’s why I promised him I’d reach out to every grassroots patriot I know to help him marshal the resources he needs to FIGHT BACK. As Republican Whip, I know what a successful conservative fighter looks like, and Juan is exactly the type of Representative we need to get America back on the right track. He embodies the American dream, and I know he’ll fight for YOU each and every day in the halls of Congress. That’s why I was proud to endorse his grassroots campaign: But Nancy Pelosi will stop at nothing to save her House majority, and she’s doing everything she can to destroy all the momentum Juan’s built. I hope I can count on YOU to help power us to victory in this critical race. Thank you, Steve Scalise House Republican Whip PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: "Hispanics could be key to Dems' midterm wipeout"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
South Texas shifted more dramatically toward Trump than any other region in the United States in the 2020 election. The counties comprising the Rio Gr I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6d52f91f766241c5b8d0c99fb91c46d0&_e=aCBVtS3EPvULR7GjA2TPizZMwD4jUHffBYfG9wVgyAtHmxuJNHe2UVXJqFj6-zuCJ1IYJxW-ioSrJF_KKbYW9sUkCL4AUSCGUsIwAI1A4pkQGoBtIN5FRs7Zk7DFbHR91rnDiyMBxl5XuhyGVqoXTIKxxHa3XRe6eQnbwNQKWr_dy7Xsz93Kn2DnAiIX1CARjBR7qV891pCQQCDDQoo-dEDTcgoSKrSRSrE3Xp8sTcIMkpH0LIicy1QCwzzP4x_98jWX0kFzjfdDFelUY3SVRxNmvqp0E0iYUCOxCJL0Kb_xbhTQuN37tVAy3ReIcZCQDDKR2XJ7g7hTgya3SdqrZflcAgEuO3-qRrsyeJo54-5sgJId6WZ42At_JRanFagAy7ze1D6X68uNdXp6bDN1TUbrUU8zBGLyPMg1FnYJRiWGLncK8PYg6fZoUODd0o5MTRSCd1QeYStjAYO2JAw3lcflxsOpWIUE4jSPBGUvfi2nzuvVnvsYS24j17_0c0MkuHmTSU7LsnpWYF6HUAl23g%3D%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Hispanics were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Hispanics were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Hispanic,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz, **a proud Hispanic Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

**This seat could not be more competitive. The race in Texas 15 is neck and neck right now - so close that even President Trump himself recently endorsed my campaign! **

Our first big test of the cycle is next week when I'll face off against 8 opponents in the Republican primary - right now we're focused on reaching as many voters as possible and could use all of the help we can get ahead of Tuesday's election. [**Might you consider helping with a gift to my campaign today?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6d52f91f766241c5b8d0c99fb91c46d0&_e=aCBVtS3EPvULR7GjA2TPizZMwD4jUHffBYfG9wVgyAtHmxuJNHe2UVXJqFj6-zuCJ1IYJxW-ioSrJF_KKbYW9sUkCL4AUSCGUsIwAI1A4pkQGoBtIN5FRs7Zk7DFbHR91rnDiyMBxl5XuhyGVqoXTIKxxHa3XRe6eQnbwNQKWr_dy7Xsz93Kn2DnAiIX1CARjBR7qV891pCQQCDDQoo-dEDTcgoSKrSRSrE3Xp8sTcIMkpH0LIicy1QCwzzP4x_98jWX0kFzjfdDFelUY3SVRxNmvqp0E0iYUCOxCJL0Kb-NgIOf0djYGNFFEBwVfDZ6pRoi5kuufqA27vMoh5Zv2DpjRKc2odsT-qtRWZ1rpyDkZC2rPBViy6WyBY7H1afU6HkUz-QENZNeKbR4t2XZLgYmvKWziIhGR0qhe2OK0tXlqWFM3D6Jg6w9Uq0pTjPBDo24FyAfmtf91WmNOm5SXo0C2dGeMi_Oxw070btXh7mHPa8Jbtxz6RcucYwXzz0EyvW__pYqclmogyNGWrFIlg%3D%3D)

**In 2020, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by _just_ 6,588 votes. ** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a HispanicRepublican from TEXAS!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6d52f91f766241c5b8d0c99fb91c46d0&_e=aCBVtS3EPvULR7GjA2TPizZMwD4jUHffBYfG9wVgyAtHmxuJNHe2UVXJqFj6-zuCJ1IYJxW-ioSrJF_KKbYW9sUkCL4AUSCGUsIwAI1A4pkQGoBtIN5FRs7Zk7DFbHR91rnDiyMBxl5XuhyGVqoXTIKxxHa3XRe6eQnbwNQKWr_dy7Xsz93Kn2DnAiIX1CARjBR7qV891pCQQCDDQoo-dEDTcgoSKrSRSrE3Xp8sTcIMkpH0LIicy1QCwzzP4x_98jWX0kFzjfdDFelUY3SVRxNmvqp0E0iYUCOxCJL0Kb8qanxvrkQ8fQ8ttaWXdXS-XJ2jsw5KBv7n9cmNrPbzMH1JwznoXiRDGLXqFPc3GrMO8D7GCVwE1kwd98qwxag66GLQvRYVuZsfRQUrWyCM9kBMAIw9SQAfchLPuL90XshdN_JAqbOIqvEwEZmS6UbwBLzElnJouVJgRMRo0-hVSjZvzwFqXFy5lZz6D8e5i5x8TeqtSiSDLFEIKACO7pZV-g2gTUeiHYTO8pVUyuerMA%3D%3D)

I am fully aware that you didn't ask to receive this email today, but I have it on good authority that you're one of the most engaged conservatives in the country, and as such **[I'm reaching out to ask if you'll join President Trump in supporting my campaign for Congress.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6d52f91f766241c5b8d0c99fb91c46d0&_e=aCBVtS3EPvULR7GjA2TPizZMwD4jUHffBYfG9wVgyAtHmxuJNHe2UVXJqFj6-zuCJ1IYJxW-ioSrJF_KKbYW9sUkCL4AUSCGUsIwAI1A4pkQGoBtIN5FRs7Zk7DFbHR91rnDiyMBxl5XuhyGVqoXTIKxxHa3XRe6eQnbwNQKWr_dy7Xsz93Kn2DnAiIX1CARjBR7qV891pCQQCDDQoo-dEDTcgoSKrSRSrE3Xp8sTcIMkpH0LIicy1QCwzzP4x_98jWX0kFzjfdDFelUY3SVRxNmvqp0E0iYUCOxCJL0Kb-56aTRnnbIij6ce3RvpuLoeVEfB5psB8w1xVlGu0UGDxyTiYwnLLMOPKRznf-GYhjmuB1O-fc43t0avrAcoxPRpB5Oyfb33wOMULa6Ak6X_YfjJEtKhBKsKAxhmjWRXjmAdbsXsb60R1oE4CXgtzfvDoYCI3ocQm7fkr4Izg3Qpb6SgeWntQHdwT0Xr8UGr2N0lywZdLAOKRFB4dk0z7k3w9gjUcXIpL9OXycR3zBflg%3D%3D) **

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6d52f91f766241c5b8d0c99fb91c46d0&_e=aCBVtS3EPvULR7GjA2TPizZMwD4jUHffBYfG9wVgyAtHmxuJNHe2UVXJqFj6-zuCJ1IYJxW-ioSrJF_KKbYW9sUkCL4AUSCGUsIwAI1A4pkQGoBtIN5FRs7Zk7DFbHR91rnDiyMBxl5XuhyGVqoXTIKxxHa3XRe6eQnbwNQKWr_dy7Xsz93Kn2DnAiIX1CARjBR7qV891pCQQCDDQoo-dEDTcgoSKrSRSrE3Xp8sTcIMkpH0LIicy1QCwzzP4x_98jWX0kFzjfdDFelUY3SVRxNmvqp0E0iYUCOxCJL0Kb9gFSg853128Yw1NlcSBDvifHpJODUHWRfKQygkCfMzo5GTbjtN4dKhP-HPEV1pIzioEtyAAggeqQLO4gxgdEl9qnmWBExCAvL5kLFm3Z3W4OqKTzBoWf-nhHK_Wxh6zR1HedX4_PIRoYnny-Oc9Phu5O72gGEJKg9fUya6XnVTtheXVkJrUknD38tSSve8wTOIVAgYAgtgduQtIhmBlfbGL5HSbeb7SjYlZlPFsyazUg%3D%3D)
In addition to having President Trump's support, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life, among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Hispanics?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6d52f91f766241c5b8d0c99fb91c46d0&_e=aCBVtS3EPvULR7GjA2TPizZMwD4jUHffBYfG9wVgyAtHmxuJNHe2UVXJqFj6-zuCJ1IYJxW-ioSrJF_KKbYW9sUkCL4AUSCGUsIwAI1A4pkQGoBtIN5FRs7Zk7DFbHR91rnDiyMBxl5XuhyGVqoXTIKxxHa3XRe6eQnbwNQKWr_dy7Xsz93Kn2DnAiIX1CARjBR7qV891pCQQCDDQoo-dEDTcgoSKrSRSrE3Xp8sTcIMkpH0LIicy1QCwzzP4x_98jWX0kFzjfdDFelUY3SVRxNmvqp0E0iYUCOxCJL0Kb8kpZ5dM3J78XlIXvO78z8OTGdlVOUbBOjfjyYnmjK54mkVZYNwIatWEhfje-AdTovMuP0cgX9rtZvtei5ncr2VM_h1U0W72XTL_d6WUcsgzNxfIyoCKq5ITWPbKAaLYMPq05-Bi66Uzk6oBK1yyjACvz5BkZi7LyShGeMbU1CXT1thGWVy-1QS3Px7f7gzbLLdoYuQOT02R-rtP41l7dlCndonyWv98OnxWqeLGpm6Ig%3D%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON Hispanics ⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6d52f91f766241c5b8d0c99fb91c46d0&_e=aCBVtS3EPvULR7GjA2TPizZMwD4jUHffBYfG9wVgyAtHmxuJNHe2UVXJqFj6-zuCJ1IYJxW-ioSrJF_KKbYW9sUkCL4AUSCGUsIwAI1A4pkQGoBtIN5FRs7Zk7DFbHR91rnDiyMBxl5XuhyGVqoXTIKxxHa3XRe6eQnbwNQKWr_dy7Xsz93Kn2DnAiIX1CARjBR7qV891pCQQCDDQoo-dEDTcgoSKrSRSrE3Xp8sTcIMkpH0LIicy1QCwzzP4x_98jWX0kFzjfdDFelUY3SVRxNmvqp0E0iYUCOxCJL0Kb8b8_VozgQnjPxtpGQ3bLm65xwtW3-oemT9RNsK-b81un8a76djnQ9i6_ZSHmnzOG2po8nk177AEAe7B4gbitKJjah0RftkfxNKwlG1iJl_iu5JbkpdTCqUPJTFV5rkf6lttc_ePBoHePTsKCv0DfiB3UBzL0LnCI-JX6ENGEROwgaQxNrVhMYqQhV939rd7UYpjv6DXcQ8hKAe3pEvU5QFaNxwFogZfhSAFroP680S2w%3D%3D)
Culturally, Hispanics are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Hispanic communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Hispanic Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Hispanic, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6d52f91f766241c5b8d0c99fb91c46d0&_e=aCBVtS3EPvULR7GjA2TPizZMwD4jUHffBYfG9wVgyAtHmxuJNHe2UVXJqFj6-zuCJ1IYJxW-ioSrJF_KKbYW9sUkCL4AUSCGUsIwAI1A4pkQGoBtIN5FRs7Zk7DFbHR91rnDiyMBxl5XuhyGVqoXTIKxxHa3XRe6eQnbwNQKWr_dy7Xsz93Kn2DnAiIX1CARjBR7qV891pCQQCDDQoo-dEDTcgoSKrSRSrE3Xp8sTcIMkpH0LIicy1QCwzzP4x_98jWX0kFzjfdDFelUY3SVRxNmvqp0E0iYUCOxCJL0Kb_Gdn0SVI7Ybaf_3UH52DynFa3HFW6_oZ_adf9OZelt7l_RK95ele-VAHDdhUttwh5AaqR_mOxW4Tgm2dqwQjgCuMGId9ipm6WJEiIeqjZlbKnTsyet23OUudRTd5w55nmPh1jIcJxf0GafLnhaEt7OrOsyfHooRgcV8mjvEqxmLVMWzW4Ujip_uS19QCVeVgWExolAt6ShEw-Wnnh5K0cFUmkNCEAcQmk8uMgOjRPFHA%3D%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz
Republican for Congress

name: Charles Booker
subject: My statement on the Russian invasion of Ukraine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Over the past day, my family — and millions of families across the globe —
watched in horror as Russian missiles leveled residential communities,
forcing civilians to take cover in subway stations and makeshift bomb
shelters.

Russia’s actions are not only a clear violation of international law, they
are a violent attack on democracy itself, and I strongly condemn them. The
world cannot afford yet another endless war.

As the global community works on solutions to bring this conflict to an
end, we have a responsibility as the world’s oldest democracy to lead with
diplomacy and humanity. We must meet this responsibility and immediately
increase our capacity to accept refugees fleeing Ukraine.

Kentuckians firmly understand the importance of standing up for family.
Together, we stand ready to offer shelter to those who have lost
everything in this reckless act of aggression by Russia.

We cannot lose sight of the human costs of this conflict. It is expected
that tens of thousands of Ukrainians could lose their lives in this war,
and millions more will leave everything behind to protect their families.
My family and I are praying for them.

Real people — children, parents, students — will bear the true cost of
this war. We must not turn our backs on them now.

Charles Booker

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1599%2E346206%2EMQvBKy

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
