clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | Folks – we were ECSTATIC when President Biden and Congressional Democrats passed the child tax credit last year. But Republicans let this historic bill EXPIRE in January! And now NBC News is reporting that a record number of American children are in poverty. It’s truly SHAMEFUL that Republicans let this important tax credit expire. So we’re polling Cresco Democrats to see if they want Congress to revive the child tax credit. But we’re still missing [8] responses so please let us know ASAP! | | | –Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:

Can we count on your personal endorsement? | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2daf25bbcc18436bbb5a94782199c629&_e=HhRHO_z2DW9tm3E83A2LdfnzQhC8kQlAIWRwQwdrZ__x4BItqKTBPlHE4KfoA_aBjP569kJzzqHF1FMpzgPW8vtyOrwUjtr0FkHlfH9SROpb21L7R8YRyA1PGLR4mVJXE_a0zQPTNBrk_P2SYhEee5xUWbS_9uIGHEE8u7FJzJL6K4ybvBE_RJPV4iQ3dhAKmOyaDyx7NGq42zyqLmTpLr_EhYdNQ6HVcvhtEagR1nlSSrONMF8N9Rws45F1CluYy6bsylSxNuctilhitGmP6lFK0qqDymZip7k9d23KXuRLxGN3ALtNUUHLLp1tKdzq-L7aHmraYD_uiZoMikixnYJ_Fd21AIQoaqK6Cxp7rRF6aM_ODq4c-Q0fgmSWb4lwgULi-rOq2k4DZg1aqy9DSEADP1UbnPN9C6hED7DQldsBN5IiJKetJgOy3WI3V2mLX4igh7ceshK3g9U-YB9aE2bw2pyDTp_k2Nc6gCrVnDSlTNTKfLYO9A5RkMX_LSjFJiwLW_HHVMhPhhet2V8aVVb6PO_mOjAWUsLXCA3LtXk1HpX9w5EZxGbj5Z0uXRE9)
---
Fellow American,

We've been in the race for the United States Senate for six months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat.

The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America.

President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote:

| _**"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."**_
---

Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including:

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2daf25bbcc18436bbb5a94782199c629&_e=HhRHO_z2DW9tm3E83A2LdfnzQhC8kQlAIWRwQwdrZ__x4BItqKTBPlHE4KfoA_aBjP569kJzzqHF1FMpzgPW8vtyOrwUjtr0FkHlfH9SROpb21L7R8YRyA1PGLR4mVJXE_a0zQPTNBrk_P2SYhEee5xUWbS_9uIGHEE8u7FJzJL6K4ybvBE_RJPV4iQ3dhAKmOyaDyx7NGq42zyqLmTpLr_EhYdNQ6HVcvhtEagR1nlSSrONMF8N9Rws45F1CluYy6bsylSxNuctilhitGmP6lFK0qqDymZip7k9d23KXuRLxGN3ALtNUUHLLp1tKdzq-L7aHmraYD_uiZoMikixnYJ_Fd21AIQoaqK6Cxp7rRFC6WXJS2FgXxImucw_VOV5ImTWV-doHCGyulm-d5ptgVLQGn2dw778coQ34VRHp67WeJ4nTf3H9GG3EpyYyA4nQirx2qb_BFGVlNzp3WaSDv9rxIUC9wYLhmlloFJe_KKM_xooslLlXjtmt5fSTQO2uMIVEUTCDwYvBZMba37iBvUuCwmNE6W8TYMFEPF8nfbfp3DyseoVgesAAsFDJbjc)
We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side.

I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. **_[So, I'm asking you to join our team today by offering your personal endorsement of our Senate campaign.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2daf25bbcc18436bbb5a94782199c629&_e=HhRHO_z2DW9tm3E83A2LdfnzQhC8kQlAIWRwQwdrZ__x4BItqKTBPlHE4KfoA_aBjP569kJzzqHF1FMpzgPW8vtyOrwUjtr0FkHlfH9SROpb21L7R8YRyA1PGLR4mVJXE_a0zQPTNBrk_P2SYhEee5xUWbS_9uIGHEE8u7FJzJL6K4ybvBE_RJPV4iQ3dhAKmOyaDyx7NGq42zyqLmTpLr_EhYdNQ6HVcvhtEagR1nlSSrONMF8N9Rws45F1CluYy6bsylSxNuctilhitGmP6lFK0qqDymZip7k9d23KXuRLxGN3ALtNUUHLLp1tKdzq-L7aHmraYD_uiZoMikixnYJ_Fd21AIQoaqK6Cxp7rRFVV2oXCh_KruMA8dCnn3UawFxvnaq8frccDeHp4nYrlHFeOAhX506ls8R6u0D3Cuuq4kqDOzoaBHLHY-Pp8Ax_UsEz9398zGaStKOjCLG7Y2U_-qkjTaBrmDFFpSAQxFncUO8b61dx8NQl_47olRhoDFWaQex4Tlau4QC4W-xPr2fgInF0OPOL9fTbN8UFP2cCdgmvqncUyRHudHmJa7I5)_**

I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams.

While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington.

**[Will you stand with us and endorse our campaign today in this critical race?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2daf25bbcc18436bbb5a94782199c629&_e=HhRHO_z2DW9tm3E83A2LdfnzQhC8kQlAIWRwQwdrZ__x4BItqKTBPlHE4KfoA_aBjP569kJzzqHF1FMpzgPW8vtyOrwUjtr0FkHlfH9SROpb21L7R8YRyA1PGLR4mVJXE_a0zQPTNBrk_P2SYhEee5xUWbS_9uIGHEE8u7FJzJL6K4ybvBE_RJPV4iQ3dhAKmOyaDyx7NGq42zyqLmTpLr_EhYdNQ6HVcvhtEagR1nlSSrONMF8N9Rws45F1CluYy6bsylSxNuctilhitGmP6lFK0qqDymZip7k9d23KXuRLxGN3ALtNUUHLLp1tKdzq-L7aHmraYD_uiZoMikixnYJ_Fd21AIQoaqK6Cxp7rRHffCUPnhUJQDmMGLqoi_ZAsrcT8IX6LCIUcQ0VtiwmleJxQipLIblY6QsEvcqHWbU8Fcn8hjxoG4ofckQGWFKuyyU0DOk1XnFvJJo-cV6NNP0JbGkYy7AJ7D_zvw9FhteRCZ5hBGD9ns5Kxd5E36zt_GnWRWhh0dC1drlhMT2lDIBHPOhgONpzlUofuko8A6OCk4ru1iJtyZ-3GLm7cs0A)**

Sincerely,

name: Katie Porter re-election update
subject: fwd: 2xmatch Thursday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

name: Conservatives to Save America
subject: Do you want Socialism in America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
Are you even a Conservative?

|
---

Friend,

We wanted to reach out to ask a simple question: **_Do you want Socialism in America?_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: America First means No More Pointless Wars
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
My opponent is trying to start WW3 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066193?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a638a91f9&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

Are you ready for World War III?

I’m not. **And I know you’re not either.**

But my warmonger opponent, along with most of the corrupt Republican and Democrat Uniparty Establishment, is cheerleading for a war with Russia over the Ukraine.

Just this week, my opponent Deep State Steve clearly implied that he supports sending American soldiers to die in the Ukraine.

This is **__MADNESS.__**

Some of these America Last Neocons have even talked about a nuclear strike! Pure insanity.

_These same RINOs are willing to send your children—and your hard-earned money—to die for Ukraine’s borders,_while they totally ignore the invasion at our own Southern Border!__

For 20 years, our Middle Eastern wars bled our nation dry, killed tens of thousands of our best and brightest young Americans, and enriched nobody but the bankers and defense contractors who bribe our politicians.

These very same defense contractors—evil corporate special interests like Raytheon, fueled by American misery—are the ones bankrolling my opponent’s $2 million war chest.

The military-industrial complex, which serves every interest in the world except our own, makes up a large portion of my opponent’s donors.

This blood money keeps our fat cat politicians rich, and keeps those politicians sending our boys to die in wars that don’t serve American interests one bit.

They’ve never met a war they didn’t love. But I don’t see them volunteering themselves or their loved ones to go to the front lines.

**If elected, I vow that I will NEVER send one penny of American treasure or spill one drop of American blood on ANY foreign wars—unless they are in _direct defense _of our homeland.**

_No more wars._ The American people are tired of fighting pointless, endless wars.

Putting America First and supporting our troops means only deploying our military when _absolutely necessary_.

**__The U.S. Army should only be in ONE place: Our Southern Border!__**

With his unhinged rhetoric trying to start a pointless war with Russia, my opponent is putting Arkansas Last—and putting his defense industry donors first.

**[_RINO warmongers are a clear and present danger to everyone in this country. Every single one of them must be removed from office. Start by electing me._

_Send a Defense Industry shill packing and elect a real Fighter who will NEVER support another pointless foreign war_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=76216f4b88&e=eda539b26b). **

[**_Help me tell the Establishment that the people are tired of endless wars_ _ \-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=b9e68de3ff&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not the D.C Fat Cats._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=29d3b35045&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=a79f298534&e=eda539b26b)** _._**
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 NeilforArkansas.com, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
NeilforArkansas.comPO Box 652Bentonville, AR 72712-0652
[Add us to your address book](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f&e=eda539b26b&c=94c94727e7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1a15bf667f&e=eda539b26b&c=94c94727e7).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mitchell?=
subject: ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Andrew Alvey Endorses Col. Swan for Congress
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Mitchell Swan Announces Endorsement from Former Georgia 10th Congressional Candidate Andrew Alvey **
February 22, 2022

**CONTACT**
Brandon Wear
Press@ColonelSwanForCongress.com
Good Hope, GA – Today, Georgia 10th Congressional Candidate Andrew Alvey announced that he is withdrawing from the race and endorsing Col. Mitchell Swan (Ret.). Mr. Alvey issued the following statement along with his endorsement:

**"My faith in Jesus Christ is what led me to run for Congress in the 10th district. It is what caused me to speak the truth in every situation and is what now leads me to endorse Colonel Mitch Swan for U.S. Congress. Colonel Swan is a leader full of faith, fidelity, and fortitude. He is the most qualified candidate in this race and will serve Georgia with a servant's heart."**

Mitchell Swan is a 30-year veteran of the United States Marine Corps and Marine Corps Reserve. Retiring as a full-bird Colonel after 30 years of service, Col. Swan has led Marines overseas, helped direct operations in the Pacific, and shaped United States policy in the Middle East. ###

body:

This upcoming election is HUGE for changing the future of America with control of the Senate up for grabs.

With Biden-Harris approval ratings in the gutter, I have a good feeling Americans will choose a change in leadership.

subject: Afghan Refugees Not Fully Vetted, Dozens with “Significant Security Concerns” in U.S.
body:
Dozens of Afghan refugees released in the U.S. have Pentagon records that “indicate potentially significant security concerns,” according to a new federal audit that reveals the multi-agency intelligence conglomerate created after 9/11 to protect the nation from terrorists has failed to properly vet thousands of Afghans.

# [Afghan Refugees Not Fully Vetted, Dozens with “Significant Security Concerns” in U.S.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58154&L=26836&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWZnaGFuLXJlZnVnZWVzLXNlY3VyaXR5LWNvbmNlcm5zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
Dozens of Afghan refugees released in the U.S. have Pentagon records that “indicate potentially significant security concerns,” according to a new federal audit that reveals the multi-agency intelligence conglomerate created after 9/11 to protect the nation from terrorists has failed to properly vet thousands of Afghans. Under the Biden administration’s Operation Allies Welcome (OAW), approximately 80,000 “displaced persons from Afghanistan” have been admitted into the country under a special immigrant visa (SIV) or humanitarian parole. The president directed the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to lead the chaotic plan to resettle the Afghans and the administration assured Americans the refugees would be thoroughly screened. That has not materialized and for months media reports have exposed crimes, including child molestation, assault and domestic violence committed by Afghans housed at military bases throughout the U.S.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58154&L=26836&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWZnaGFuLXJlZnVnZWVzLXNlY3VyaXR5LWNvbmNlcm5zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)

| |

Unfortunately, President Joe Biden has decided to adopt a critical race theory approach to fill the vacancy created by Justice Stephen Breyer’s retirement. The law requires states to remove registrations of voters who fail to respond to an address confirmation request and then fail to vote in two consecutive elections. ### [Lawyers Argue Pros, Cons of Law Requiring More Women on Some Corporate Boards ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58154&L=26832&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3eWVycy1hcmd1ZS1wcm9zLWNvbnMtY29ycG9yYXRlLWJvYXJkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) MyNewsLA.com The conservative judicial watchdog group Judicial Watch filed the taxpayer lawsuit in August 2019 against then-Secretary of State Alex Padilla on behalf of plaintiffs Robin Crest, Earl De Vries and Judy De Vries.

Judicial Watch argues that California’s quotas for women on corporate boards violates the California Constitution’s equal protection clause and asks the court to permanently enjoin any expenditure of taxpayer funds to implement the quotas. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Our military needs our help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Too much woke |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ae63e85e86&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

As a career soldier, I saw lots of waste in the military. Some of it even became a running joke.

But what Biden and his lackey, General Milley, are doing with the woke mandates and "re-education".... is beyond words.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am an America First Christian and combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8005588a6a&e=afa21b7626), a swing district south of Orlando. **

I spent decades in the military, and my sons as well. I know well that a military that is not solely focused on fighting and winning wars, won't be a military that's very good at all.

It would appear that's what we now have.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=cd1f196e31&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **FOX News has the report on how costly the military's woke agenda is- in dollars and cents. **

_The U.S. Department of Defense spent nearly 6 million man-hours on implementing President Biden’s "leftist social agenda" across the military, Republicans said Monday.

Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Gen. Mark Milley responded in a Jan. 6 letter to Sen. James Inhofe, R-Okla., ranking member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, following a request for data on the total number of hours and money the DOD spent on new trainings across the military regarding climate change, extremism and diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI). _

_Milley’s response, obtained by Fox New Digital, revealed that more than 5.3 million hours and $535,000 was spent on extremism "stand downs," or discussions about extremism in the ranks ordered by Secretary of Defense Lloyd J. Austin in February.

"This averages to just over 2 hours per Service member in a total force of 2.46 million members and is comparable to other Joint Force periodic training requirements," Milley wrote._

_**The letter also revealed that roughly 530,000 hours and $477,000 was spent on new DEI trainings and more than 1,000 hours and $5,000 was spent on coordinating the DOD’s Climate Adaptation Plan.**_

_Inhofe and 11 other Republicans on the Armed Services Committee issued a letter Monday accusing the DOD of targeting military members while relations with Russia and China continue to deteriorate.

"We face real threats across the world, yet the Biden administration is more focused on promoting its leftist social agenda in the military instead of countering China, Russia and Iran or creating an effective counterterrorism plan," the senators said in the letter provided to Fox News Digital. "Our military is not an extremist organization, and our service members, by and large all good people, are dedicated, faithful patriots."_

No wonder we lost Afghanistan. Look at the garbage we waste our time on!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=25f24c624f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| My opponent, Democrat Darren Soto, voted for this garbage. He has weakened our military and converted it into a woke indoctrination camp for social justice warriors.

**I have an idea. Let's kick this guy out of Congress and defund the woke education programs, permanently.**

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stand and fight the woke](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=48aa7912f7&e=afa21b7626).

Help me stand up to Biden and his woke generals, and make our military great again! [Help me stop all of Biden's agenda!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3f14e4fc53&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=221add1a2e&e=afa21b7626)
